name: Ann Coulter
subject: Liberals have lost their minds – butthere’s hope
body:
College campuses have gone absolutely insane.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc7tfove93kpsljfn08mf4p6joibcksdugtt6lng_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1iecob2cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tdm66r64s3161ibac3mciojfdllclqmaodncmr64srje1irac5kmti33c3kekrjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup32pjkciqjcdti69j35c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. Here's one thing you can do about it that can really make a difference.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqsgkfulet5irva2g3q895068bbc99jeial21ir8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1iecob2cjh2bs) Fellow Conservative, **College campuses have gone absolutely insane.** A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the University of California at Berkeley, the so-called “birthplace of the free speech movement.” As you may have heard, my speech was abruptly canceled because leftist thugs decided to riot and the administration wouldn’t stick up for free speech. Unfortunately, I’m not the only one to suffer threats and intimidation on campus. Far from it. [ **Fight the intolerant left on campus** ](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpehqtfec7o71httim8r67fv9s4reksi5jeinf0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1iecob2cjh2bs) As I point out in _Resistance is Futile: How the Trump-Hating Left Lost Its Collective Mind_ , ever since Donald Trump’s arrival in politics, **liberals have lost their minds.** But there’s no padded room to keep them contained! Instead, **these violent, masked lunatics have taken over college campuses, where young Americans are turned into automaton leftists just like themselves.** Young conservatives on college campuses across our nation are losing their right to free speech – and even the right to walk down the street without getting sucker punched – because of how intolerant the liberals have become. [**But lest you think I’ve given up hope, faithful conservative, there’s a group I trust that fights back against this onslaught and exposes leftist bias, abuse, and indoctrination on college campuses for all the world to see:_Campus Reform_.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcvpf8a8q1pq754rq98dutlkcugb5k7o7vamqaf8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1iecob2cjh2bs) **Campus Reform, a project of the Leadership Institute, is the single most powerful force for campus free speech in America today.** By sticking up for conservative students and giving them the tools necessary to defend themselves and their principles, Campus Reform provides an absolutely essential public service. **Bottom line – Campus Reform uncovers the liberal schemes that the mainstream media wants to keep hidden... and they shut down the liberals’ indoctrination on campus after campus.** [**To continue their vital work, Campus Reform counts on the generous support of conservatives just like you – yes, you! – which is why I urge you to partner with them today by making a generous gift of $25, $35, $50, $100, or more right now.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqecvcdggquav2unlo7eaqh05gatsh2op6rb2ti0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1iecob2cjh2bs) And to sweeten the pot – when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book, _Resistance is Futile_. Saving young conservatives AND getting a free book? What a deal! [ **Get my book here** ](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg84h386qqoh5qmt6rvjndm265gc3ocrtd9nu1h8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1iecob2cjh2bs) Campus police at the College of DuPage in Illinois told conservative students they’d **“lock them up” for handing out copies of the U.S. Constitution.** Yes, that dangerous document that the created the greatest country ever known to man. A teaching assistant at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln harassed the student president of a conservative group for recruiting students. With a gesture from her middle finger, she shrieked profanities at the conservative student and called her a “neo-fascist” and “Nazi.” Charming. At Purdue University in Indiana, a staffer called conservatives “vile, racist idiots” and **threatened to rape pro-life students.** (And you wonder why liberals prefer violence to debate.) In all three cases, LI’s Campus Reform exposed the truth. Armed with investigative reports from their student correspondents on campus, Campus Reform got word out to their nationwide audience of concerned conservatives. And they brought it to news outlets like Fox News, Newsmax, the Blaze, and numerous talk radio shows. Ultimately, Campus Reform’s exposure of the truth got _results_. In these cases and many others, **Campus Reform’s quick and powerful action forced universities to change their anti-conservative policies, discipline leftist student groups, and suspend or fire radical professors.** I believe an angel gets its wings every time a leftist professor is fired for their outrageous and unapologetic abuses against conservatives. But Campus Reform’s fight to make the left see the light and feel the heat won’t be won overnight. **To fight the forces of the intolerant left, stand up for free speech, and protect conservative students who want to simply share their beliefs without getting a black eye, Campus Reform is counting on your help.** [**Please make a generous investment of $25, $35, $50, or more today to support the Leadership Institute’s Campus Reform, stand up to liberal indoctrination, and ensure conservative students don’t lose their freedoms on college campuses.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs539t2e188qmc74rko73v308ufckcd3cpkvhkb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1iecob2cjh2bs) Friend, let’s make ‘em pay. [**Please help Campus Reform right away so they can empower conservative students and strike back at the lunatic liberals.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zts7iigjphr8cam7823vn22lel364jbpgka1sq38_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1iecob2cjh2bs) Thank you. In liberty, Ann Coulter **P.S. Remember, when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book,_Resistance is Futile_.** It’s just one more way I can thank you for joining this crucial cause. Because **if we lose the kids, we lose this country.** [**Please donate right away.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr6jeccckntvvf94r0653rhheff2u7v69bcmvtl8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1iecob2cjh2bs) Thank you.** [ **Yes, I'll join Campus Reform in the fight against leftist tyranny** ](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgs3dndmk1kona7uo98vnj1e5f4q2bh398l7h5i0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1iecob2cjh2bs)
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Marissa Tully
subject: One. Million. Dollars
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter —

You may have already heard about this from Nikki, but with news this big, it’s worth repeating:

By the end of March, our campaign officially raised OVER $1 MILLION in online donations since we launched in August.

We most definitely met our March fundraising goal and then some. But you know what’s even better? We raised over $1 million online with an average donation UNDER $35 — and we broke our record for individual donations in a single month.

That right there is a strong grassroots movement, Peter. And we need to keep this momentum going. Can you chip in $20 to help us do it? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=404recapmt]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=404recapmt] Express Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=404recapmt] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=404recapmt] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=404recapmt] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=404recapmt] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?refcode=404recapmt]

With numbers like this, it’s clear that Floridians are fed up with DeSantis’ authoritarian agenda. They’re ready for a Governor who fights to raise our quality of life and lower our cost of living, instead of attacking our freedoms and fighting a fake culture war.

That’s why we can’t let up now, Peter.

DeSantis is raising MILLIONS from far-right, special interest donors. If we’re going to win this race and bring something new to Florida, we need to keep the pressure on him and keep our momentum high. Click here to chip in $20 and keep our movement going strong. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=404recapmt]

Thanks!

— Marissa

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Hard at work on the campaign trail.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
I appreciate you taking time to read this update. I am hard at work on the campaign trail, just as I’ll work hard as Governor. | | | |
---
| | |
# Weekly Wrap Up
---
|
---
| Hello Peter:

I had another busy week on the campaign trail with stops in St Joseph County, Berrien County and Alcona County.

Had a great evening in St Joseph County delivering some signs and talking with citizens about the campaign. St Joseph County is one of the top growers of seed corn for the nation. In just a few weeks the farmers will start another year of providing for the nation. Agriculture has always been dear to my heart, and the ag industry will have my full support as Governor.
---
|
---
---
| I also visited the Countryside Middle/High School Academy where the Berrien County conservation district hosted numerous natural resources and agriculture groups. I had a great conversation with the Berrien County Farm Bureau President and representatives of Welch's Grape Cooperative. The grapes from my small vineyard go to make grape juice at Welch Foods in Lawton, Michigan.

The 4-H and agriculture programs offered by Countryside Academy make for successful students. I liked this display. At a young age I learned the value of hard work when I would milk the cows early in the morning each day.
---
|
---
---
| The Berrien County GOP held a very successful Lincoln Day Dinner. It was my honor to speak and highlight my plans for a more respectful government as Governor – one that leads Michigan into a future of prosperity for all.

It was great to have my friend and local business owner Sam Singh and his family join me, Carla Johnson, former County Commissioner Don Ryman and my Campaign Manager David Yardley at my table.
---
|
---
---
| I was also happy to help host two Michigan Lutheran High School students: Bella Swisher and Gavin Beilman at the event.
---
|
---
| Finally, I wrapped up the week at the Alcona County Republican Party Lincoln Day Dinner. It was a great turn out, and I was energized by the enthusiastic reception I received.
---
|
---
---
| |
---
It was a great trip to Alcona County this weekend. Counties like Alcona and Iosco turning out the vote will be crucial to win in November. That’s why I drove the 670 miles round trip.

Thank you Carrie Mullins and Alcona County GOP for the warm welcome.
---
|
### Endorsements

In case you missed it, former Berrien County Commissioner Don Ryman endorsed me for Governor this week. Don Ryman is a long-time friend, and someone who has dedicated years to serving the citizens of Berrien County. I’m grateful for his friendship and support.
---
|
---
|
### Sunrise Michigan - Transparency and Accountability in Government

Also this week I released my Sunrise Michigan plan for transparency and accountability in government. My pledge to you is that every morning in Michigan when the government opens it will be accessible to its citizens. Please take a minute to read my plan. It’s long past time we had an open and accessible Governor’s office. It will happen when I am Governor.
---
| [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=a35dbc5fe9&e=0636b97700)
---
| [READ ABOUT THE SUNRISE MICHIGAN PLAN](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=f180a31c02&e=0636b97700 "READ ABOUT THE SUNRISE MICHIGAN PLAN")
---
| I appreciate you taking time to read this update. I am hard at work on the campaign trail, just as I’ll work hard as Governor. I would appreciate your support in my campaign. Please visit my website [captainmikeformichigan.com](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=ca690eaa3a&e=0636b97700) to learn more, volunteer, endorse, and donate.

As always, I look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail!

Michael Brown
Conservative Republican for Governor
---
|
---
| [LEARN MORE ABOUT CAPTAIN MIKE](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=5e91992ba9&e=0636b97700 "LEARN MORE ABOUT CAPTAIN MIKE")
---
|

name: Primary Sinema
subject: Saving the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
Before we can toss Sinema, we need to first Save the Senate. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q8veK_buhNdD_xzOtqV0u4CkAxjlbMWxCdmhBgWzvKTfBG-Qr8QLVPGsKx0SHiDYrDemtkYO7evUxSWKvZpWaDzVTgnAfSGeK01arQ0mzkKILtIB0YmXhfMg_mGEdmCkoqA3v59DObYPx1vf5r-bL03XvtYKTPjy-ZaUUd5r_0jtSUubOhWU-8tFsM7ZjVd24wm6fiVD1gYc3kTEKhPv-nc/3kx/B_LKoOxkS0uqjKQnAo3Ssw/h0/yusFFSKzvjqU6zjDKX7B_Up6m8yOLkUjBVjauoexMTI)
Peter, you know why we’re in this fight: Kyrsten Sinema has obstructed the Democratic Party’s agenda and she’s been a lousy Senator for Arizona. That’s why we need to make sure that there is a well-funded primary challenger against her. Our goal isn’t changing, but with Sinema’s election still two years away, we need to help save the Senate first. By making sure that the Senate remains in Democratic hands, and by expanding our Democratic majority, we will lessen the negative impact that Sinema can have and we’ll ensure that President Biden’s priorities pass into law. Toward that goal, we’ve already been supporting and raising money for Sinema’s colleague Mark Kelly in Arizona. Now, we are also asking you to support another progressive Senator who is at risk because of Sinema’s obstruction: **Georgia Senator Raphael Warnock’s.** Sen. Warnock has been a true champion for voting rights and the rest of President Biden’s progressive agenda. He is one of only two Black Democrats in the Senate, and he represents a true swing state that, like Arizona, could flip either way. Republicans in Georgia are funneling millions into the race to beat him and his re-election chances are even harder because Kyrsten Sinema has obstructed federal voting rights legislation. State legislators in Georgia and around the country have made it even harder for voters — especially Black voters — to cast their ballots. **_[Can you split a donation between Primary Sinema Project and Senator Raphael Warnock today? We must defend this seat and keep Georgia blue.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeScDdqk1-uNuQE1IPvLkL9QRfsht0TCrjWQQ1Krwqq9tk1GWrGBqtSxKt0McVWpa6_HktaIC0w3kmn7pfy-swKOxFGL6Od2D1wwormBgNPF-wAuvGyNhdpCqDiR6FO2v0SdEfRL2WpsmWRf4wnsgCf65yz2v7vvacFYbz9aIM-utwCn1P5RdczAedPmVSTuLpOlceC9kBqwMYrqDuEWSWyZvvwRjj78W9BXcMQd7by7cOypTPWRZl5rm8q134oRbrEJLeRoBYVZLDH7xWbDySAvOGPTFolCrQQx8x7JKrZwmJmXHfEAEb1mmiDuU9mzhNI/3kx/B_LKoOxkS0uqjKQnAo3Ssw/h1/xu3yfxpQGSl_0cu6iz9KNlca91UNLO5Djzc9u2YBwtM)_** **[Contribute $10](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeScDdqk1-uNuQE1IPvLkL9QdtU6iKBtFIYnpgJIf6gee72Uu-I30QGgltx_zyleg1so2LMlM6XTaUnM1CooNJpHc2GvfAt0J5flBHWAAxNEGkRm4IFl4Z8IaI77N8y6GyjSaYt-4A2sykW9itUmTy_RNXELY1yYMmRC3yUKOPFq5szNXIMN_DZ6lKYykl__E7N1AC6zRJspNO1lKUnYJN4CabETlPWfeQlam0gLXTPYaPYaPwCjyb-Gz01J6YeHyFGDiPERV8Ti1z1JF8REWRrd9R9qIG9besTVV3wmVJAGiW9rzJjPB24OvwcGmxZEGBv/3kx/B_LKoOxkS0uqjKQnAo3Ssw/h2/gY6PememEcov6_ocp0KinUms7-lJpSzaAFKVsjfT9Ww)** **It’s not an exaggeration to say this race will determine Senate control in 2022.** Right now, the Senate is split 50-50. clean_body: Before we can toss Sinema, we need to first Save the Senate. | | | Peter, you know why we’re in this fight: Kyrsten Sinema has obstructed the Democratic Party’s agenda and she’s been a lousy Senator for Arizona. That’s why we need to make sure that there is a well-funded primary challenger against her. Our goal isn’t changing, but with Sinema’s election still two years away, we need to help save the Senate first. By making sure that the Senate remains in Democratic hands, and by expanding our Democratic majority, we will lessen the negative impact that Sinema can have and we’ll ensure that President Biden’s priorities pass into law. Toward that goal, we’ve already been supporting and raising money for Sinema’s colleague Mark Kelly in Arizona. Now, we are also asking you to support another progressive Senator who is at risk because of Sinema’s obstruction: Georgia Senator Raphael Warnock’s. Sen. Warnock has been a true champion for voting rights and the rest of President Biden’s progressive agenda. He is one of only two Black Democrats in the Senate, and he represents a true swing state that, like Arizona, could flip either way. Republicans in Georgia are funneling millions into the race to beat him and his re-election chances are even harder because Kyrsten Sinema has obstructed federal voting rights legislation. State legislators in Georgia and around the country have made it even harder for voters — especially Black voters — to cast their ballots. It’s not an exaggeration to say this race will determine Senate control in 2022. Right now, the Senate is split 50-50. And as you know, that slim margin has empowered obstructionists like Sinema and Manchin. But we can’t afford to lose even a single seat to the Republicans. So we need to focus on Saving the Senate, and then together, we’ll kick Sinema out of it. Thank you for your support, Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Great America Update
subject: You’ll be surprised who’s being cancelled next
body:
You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn by Mark Twain. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6866%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=xphIewX5wswUrdIhudDWkw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60568%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2baUuuEEdwBHcJq4gDjiuxg&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60569%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P8Z%2f%2bcE5Ip3vkqCz5Y%2fDwg&sysid=1) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I’d like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60560%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=awNxvlPtue7M6K0BGbJNUA&sysid=1).
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60561%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WPThMYjTBRGtKY0udNxGsw&sysid=1)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they’re gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of **“Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60562%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XP8IT2Xra0TciC4zGTGdIg&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, “All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ ” Don’t let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **“Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories” **right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60563%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E726TbxVo%2fmn0%2bx%2b4lZVvQ&sysid=1)
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6866%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=xphIewX5wswUrdIhudDWkw&sysid=1)_

Hello,
Russian state media is now airing clips from Fox News of people like Donald Trump and Tucker Carlson praising Vladimir Putin.
When I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy and the commander of all U.S. forces in East Africa, I requested that Fox News be turned off in the mess halls during meal hours. Its lie-filled propaganda was a national security threat to my troops’ ability to carry out our mission.
I’ve seen the real-life consequences of disinformation and media lies that are manufactured and repeated by people like Donald Trump and his acolytes like my opponent Chuck Grassley. And as January 6th showed, it is a threat to our very democracy.
It will take significant campaign funding to fight back against all of the lies Fox News and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are going to tell about me. That’s why we’ve set a goal of raising another $50,000 before our critical deadline at midnight tomorrow.
Right now, we are still falling a little short, but with the help of grassroots donors like you now, we can defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue:

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: The latest stop of our Berkshires to Boston Tour in Essex County was a great success!
body:
| | | |
---
| Dear Friends,
I had a great day in Essex County on Thursday during the latest stop of my Berkshires to Boston tour of the Commonwealth.
We started at the historic Agawam Diner, meeting diners and greeted by owners, and sisters, Angela Mitchell and Ethel DePasquale.
---
|
---
| Leah Cole Allen and I then went to her Alma mater, Lynn Vocational and Technical Institute for a tour of their facility by principal, Fred Gallo. I was joined by Lynn City Councilor, Rick Starbard, also a former teacher at the school.
---
|
---
| We then visited Boston Clear Water Company in Lynnfield, MA, a natural spring dating back to 1640. We were amazed by the cross on the property which came from a Polish church, honoring the last pandemic, the Spanish flu. Thanks to Lynnfield School Committee candidate Corrie Doyle Luongo. Best of luck to her in her election on April 12th!
---
|
---
| Next up was lunch at Mills 58 in Peabody, and a visit to the Peabody Area Chamber of Commerce and a discussion of small business needs.
---
|
---
| Leah and I then visited for a question and answer meeting with residents at Brooksby Village.
---
---
We then stopped at Salem Superior Court, the site of our rally with Jeffrey Kuhner a few years ago. Thanks to all who came to meet us there!
---
---
| We stopped at Village Restaurant for a mid-afternoon snack of fried clams, and chatting with friends in Essex, Massachusetts.
---
|
---
| Last, we stopped in at Beverly Depot, an awesome bar and restaurant created out of an old train depot.
---
|
---
| Thanks to all the businesses who hosted us, and all who came out to show support and ask great questions on the trail.
I can't wait for next week's stop in Hampden County! The itinerary will be posted this weekend; check for it and information on other upcoming events on the [Events page](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CuH1c5pAIBTE3ZIfVCHWD9KpTKIPYn0TsCEqSewkJlmonbLfsUHz10_WwvZwj28ZnL4U3Jw3q-l8Ao5kKWO1Moh2UgjqYYfBJsjgVgaUQg7tExxmb_gKRxxh0XfZdAxfIkRglMBfKJ3syvY_kEh9At38NnA7oRlN&c=1kEy9xkpat5HzMjx7qokPbqD1zeIUj54IVBrC8VD0n9SptsiREU_OQ==&ch=GM_bB_evYNUm-4250uM6T-ADi0emvc0nXjBEEP7Apds7Sg30rkn2bA==) of my Website.
---
| By the way, Leah and I love the Berkshires to Boston Tour, but of course it isn't our only campaign event. We're busy criss-crossing the state every day, attending different events and chatting with voters. You can find out more information at this link:
---
---
| [View Upcoming Events](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CuH1c5pAIBTE3ZIfVCHWD9KpTKIPYn0TsCEqSewkJlmonbLfsUHz10_WwvZwj28ZnL4U3Jw3q-l8Ao5kKWO1Moh2UgjqYYfBJsjgVgaUQg7tExxmb_gKRxxh0XfZdAxfIkRglMBfKJ3syvY_kEh9At38NnA7oRlN&c=1kEy9xkpat5HzMjx7qokPbqD1zeIUj54IVBrC8VD0n9SptsiREU_OQ==&ch=GM_bB_evYNUm-4250uM6T-ADi0emvc0nXjBEEP7Apds7Sg30rkn2bA==)
---
---
We also have a very active group of campaign volunteers, who have already collected more than 12,000 signatures in support of my campaign:
---
|
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| Thank you as always for your support!
---
| Sincerely,
---
|
---
|
---
| | [Click Here to Make a Donation to Geoff's Campaign](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CuH1c5pAIBTE3ZIfVCHWD9KpTKIPYn0TsCEqSewkJlmonbLfsUHz1wt3H02oezapRxW-o71i4v8YjVlZoZKex88h8_IIOVRDHmWFcsSAcwxzvuP1QO0VLOirgjsrYyxi4vO6ILdK-X0HLVOoqrDVVEH5mqmwDiPaDGltWfEsHplVLcYwzfxlKw==&c=1kEy9xkpat5HzMjx7qokPbqD1zeIUj54IVBrC8VD0n9SptsiREU_OQ==&ch=GM_bB_evYNUm-4250uM6T-ADi0emvc0nXjBEEP7Apds7Sg30rkn2bA==)
---
|
---
|

|
---

subject: Did we miss you? FWD: It all comes down to you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| |
---
| | |
Nick here from House Republicans.

Congressman Dan Crenshaw said it best: **Taking back the House all comes down to you!**

Did you miss his personal message to you? Because too many Patriots like YOU didn't act, we FAILED. Now? _**[1100% match is LIVE because we need to catch up. Don't let it waste away!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60037776:JXvZEyowN:m:1:3299561967:1FCDE492C324AB060EEFADBFB32E20A1:r "1100% match is LIVE because we need to catch up. Don’t let it waste away!")**_
**CRITICAL END OF QUARTER DEADLINE PASSED. WE FAILED!**
---
| | | [USE YOUR 1100% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60037776:JXvZEyowN:m:1:3299561967:1FCDE492C324AB060EEFADBFB32E20A1:r "USE YOUR 1100% MATCH NOW")
---
Sincerely,

Nick
House Republicans

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Dan Crenshaw
Subject: It all comes down to you!
To: <**_[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60037776:JXvZEyowN:m:1:3299561967:1FCDE492C324AB060EEFADBFB32E20A1:r)_** >

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60037776:JXvZEyowN:m:1:3299561967:1FCDE492C324AB060EEFADBFB32E20A1:r "Dan Crenshaw Headshot")
---

Hey -

Dan Crenshaw here. _**This is bad. Really bad.**_

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.

_**[That's why I've started an emergency end-of-quarter victory fundraising push with 1000% matching to bridge this gap.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60037776:JXvZEyowN:m:1:3299561967:1FCDE492C324AB060EEFADBFB32E20A1:r "That’s
why I’ve started an emergency end-of-quarter victory fundraising push with 1000% matching to bridge this gap.")**_
**CRITICAL END OF QUARTER DEADLINE!**
---
| | | [USE YOUR 1000% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60037776:JXvZEyowN:m:1:3299561967:1FCDE492C324AB060EEFADBFB32E20A1:r "USE YOUR 1000% MATCH NOW")
---
I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

_**[Can I count on you to rush a 1000% matched donation? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60037776:JXvZEyowN:m:1:3299561967:1FCDE492C324AB060EEFADBFB32E20A1:r "Can I count on
you to rush a 1000% matched donation? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.")**_

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

_**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made to meet our goal will be 1000% matched >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60037776:JXvZEyowN:m:1:3299561967:1FCDE492C324AB060EEFADBFB32E20A1:r "BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and
leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made to meet our goal will be 1000% matched >>>")**_

---
| | | **_** CRITICAL END-OF-QUARTER DEADLINE ** _

1000% Match: ACTIVE

EOQ DEADLINE: MARCH 31, 11:59 PM**
---
| | | | [USE YOUR 1000% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60037776:JXvZEyowN:m:1:3299561967:1FCDE492C324AB060EEFADBFB32E20A1:r "USE YOUR 1000% MATCH NOW")
---

**CRITICAL END OF QUARTER DEADLINE!**
---
| | | [USE YOUR 1000% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60037776:JXvZEyowN:m:1:3299561967:1FCDE492C324AB060EEFADBFB32E20A1:r "USE YOUR 1000% MATCH NOW")
---
We're in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we're just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she 's panicking._

_She 's dialing up dark money donors.

She's depositing max-out checks.

And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._

**Pelosi 's working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can't let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There's no way we make our mark without you.

_**[BUT to ensure your donation is 1000% matched, chip in AS SOON AS YOU SEE THIS EMAIL!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60037776:JXvZEyowN:m:1:3299561967:1FCDE492C324AB060EEFADBFB32E20A1:r "BUT to ensure
your donation is 1000% matched, chip in AS SOON AS YOU SEE THIS EMAIL!")**_

Thank you,
Congressman Dan Crenshaw
**CRITICAL END OF QUARTER DEADLINE!**
---
| | | [USE YOUR 1000% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60037776:JXvZEyowN:m:1:3299561967:1FCDE492C324AB060EEFADBFB32E20A1:r "USE YOUR 1000% MATCH NOW")
---
| | | | |
* * *

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60037777:JXvZEyowN:m:1:3299561967:1FCDE492C324AB060EEFADBFB32E20A1:r "RedWaveFooter")
---
Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60037777:JXvZEyowN:m:1:3299561967:1FCDE492C324AB060EEFADBFB32E20A1:r "Can we count on

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Regarding my 2022 reelection bid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
I've come to the decision that as it pertains to the next chapter in my public service, the best move is no move at all. I'm running for reelection an It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=36c6f0f3d1cb41bc8df79942322009ea&_e=oJyaKMXvgZ4Uxx2oPFHd0Hm700JHWzWOoxPA64UD3IE_XiJ0MrRSwpDET_8iuCy1Af0rN68mm6cWIjwIHbFthD-v15Dtp0C9P_DJKxuW3C2vt7o284Ck95LbWf00KwOOMEW0WCgfhRHeeCnDV2r5WG3iJRTtm8jrtm0HsrNug9Kjsmjt5Fpuve2PjKSne5YK3ms3j96ev_-9ddD24sQRVwxLzAZaFeSuXW-NtdlK658AXkz1dItSNkhYlzwzViwwZPMyksmnh2YcyEoocMkyvD2hJdjrVPqkPAN41x1cNvZN6zJGuHUJdfw3oKY6mqfiPgAGP1KV45CIQB5JTdA4Ybw_Bw6yYehuNSe332-TdQwuJDb64-xHQPVUJTOrZ6VKb1fKX4UTmy7frijIAK1wWJ4l0zmI85FhHffC4JlxQDXhk3vMoFarUFBccr9Lr20gITMs3M1FcCD4UEwRgSVzlx30M4V_9exYC7biIa2_OMo%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. Ever. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself. I promise you that.**

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=36c6f0f3d1cb41bc8df79942322009ea&_e=oJyaKMXvgZ4Uxx2oPFHd0Hm700JHWzWOoxPA64UD3IE_XiJ0MrRSwpDET_8iuCy1Af0rN68mm6cWIjwIHbFthD-v15Dtp0C9P_DJKxuW3C2vt7o284Ck95LbWf00KwOOMEW0WCgfhRHeeCnDV2r5WG3iJRTtm8jrtm0HsrNug9Kjsmjt5Fpuve2PjKSne5YK3ms3j96ev_-9ddD24sQRVwxLzAZaFeSuXW-NtdlK658AXkz1dItSNkhYlzwzViwwZPMyksmnh2YcyEoocMkyvFj9XIpb5im7EgEd-M6pulgvkEZgCnzA_BLm4gIvUlSiZe6yMkarp7309ao9GgfsCnmUk7AlD1-OGgZorpb_hX8S5ObO3O7WNz3DOTlIBGcD_4sK0SpY9I9iKsKq7nUS3mD8OAPD4m9-BtDic15rG8mz9-Czj0wwJyJaWlpdCqVv0lUIEi96Gdr1vCxsKgCQqSXITBI6ssxl1qMQUPDdNLc%3D)
I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll endorse me for re-election](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=36c6f0f3d1cb41bc8df79942322009ea&_e=oJyaKMXvgZ4Uxx2oPFHd0Hm700JHWzWOoxPA64UD3IE_XiJ0MrRSwpDET_8iuCy1Af0rN68mm6cWIjwIHbFthD-v15Dtp0C9P_DJKxuW3C2vt7o284Ck95LbWf00KwOOMEW0WCgfhRHeeCnDV2r5WG3iJRTtm8jrtm0HsrNug9Kjsmjt5Fpuve2PjKSne5YK3ms3j96ev_-9ddD24sQRVwxLzAZaFeSuXW-NtdlK658AXkz1dItSNkhYlzwzViwwZPMyksmnh2YcyEoocMkyvAVo9B1OBj7h5xF4iKA2FCZzbYNXQEtHthTHn3m8r01RMIVBfmxqC7It-Nwpw9ndWUavpTcHFV7ELhlKuzQ6DtL79heq3UaKDbtddeBdl4Bu2d4kmjtF3spiIci12p3NP6ot3zGrfzxYF0P-RyT87qXtWDUo-9fOdMMDXMZ0xdMSCW7AU3fQ9p4yMB1xFVmI3sToxoMqmD3qwwNsakcVvPA%3D)**.

I’ll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I’m in Congress, **[which is why I’m asking for your support today.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=36c6f0f3d1cb41bc8df79942322009ea&_e=oJyaKMXvgZ4Uxx2oPFHd0Hm700JHWzWOoxPA64UD3IE_XiJ0MrRSwpDET_8iuCy1Af0rN68mm6cWIjwIHbFthD-v15Dtp0C9P_DJKxuW3C2vt7o284Ck95LbWf00KwOOMEW0WCgfhRHeeCnDV2r5WG3iJRTtm8jrtm0HsrNug9Kjsmjt5Fpuve2PjKSne5YK3ms3j96ev_-9ddD24sQRVwxLzAZaFeSuXW-NtdlK658AXkz1dItSNkhYlzwzViwwZPMyksmnh2YcyEoocMkyvAQDRgvLto6cjHQBf3uRPx0m2mHmDjaqxpa6ZdqMkESprkgqP9IhThS7M3f8o3Hcvyc2Yix73drgtvP_qAsRaVyyHDGkn3jufiqS7FXP5wjXqyo40Y8HMcIGeHQG0P8t_EoI8xI5o_YccGP3J_8mGtRG_L1qV2uK3mnbVg1xqogHH0jTv9VzRBWBsLBcEqv9Le6uwWO2pUCQ5kAjdx3Yijg%3D)** It’s imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. clean_body: I've come to the decision that as it pertains to the next chapter in my public service, the best move is no move at all. I'm running for reelection an It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight? | Fellow Conservative, I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since. I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. Ever. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people. I will never take the position I currently hold for granted. For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself. I promise you that. I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable. I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote. I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office. But first, I have to win reelection. . I’ll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I’m in Congress, It’s imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. Then, in Congress, she fought and won millions in funding for women's health care research. Just imagine what Abby can do in the Senate. If Abby wins, she'll become the youngest woman EVER elected to the Senate, and Democrats will be virtually guaranteed to maintain our majority. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

name: Giffords.org
subject: Sacramento (again)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
They just wanted to have a good time.
#

Friends -
They just wanted to have a good time.
DJ Elements—the Sacramento Kings DJ—was playing at the club. People were dancing, hanging out, and just enjoying their Saturday night.
And when the night ended and the club was let out...
Gunshots. Lots of gunshots. Rapid fire. If you watch the video online, the firing came in very fast succession as people ran for their lives.
Another tragic night in America. This time in Sacramento, just blocks from the State Capitol and miles from another recent mass shooting.
6 dead. A dozen injured. Hundreds exposed to the trauma of gun violence.
45,000 Americans died last year from gunshots. And without comprehensive national, state and local action, this will continue.
Enough is enough.
Imagine living in a country where tragedies like this one in Sacramento don’t happen.
It’s possible—if our leaders have the courage to act.
At Giffords, we will never stop fighting to make our communities safer from these senseless killings. But we cannot do it alone.
[**Please make a contribution—$3 or whatever you can afford—to help us continue the fight for legislation that will make our communities safer from gun violence.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr22?refcode=em220404-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1779_3935704_BYDYf6&akid=1779%2E3935704%2EBYDYf6)

name: Georgette =?iso-8859-1?b?R/NtZXo=?=
subject: This is the last you'll hear from me before Election Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gómez for Assembly 2022 Special Election, #1443884
body:
https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]
Hi friend — I'm writing this to you in between knocking on doors, so it'll have to be quick.
Tomorrow is Election Day, and we're working to turn out as many voters as possible.
When I decided to run for this seat in January, I knew it would be a really fast, tough race. But I also knew how often our community is ignored, devalued, and exploited — and I knew that I could help change that in the California State Assembly.
By working together, we can invest in affordable housing, clean energy, public transportation, and good-paying, dignified jobs.
If you are eligible, please make sure to cast a vote tomorrow. If you aren't, would you chip in now to help me and my campaign reach as many voters as possible before tomorrow? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_040422_OneDays]
Thanks for listening,
-- Georgette

body:
On Wednesday, April 6, at 8:00 PM EST, we're hosting a virtual fundraiser for Jasmine Crockett.

| [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43757016/338579935/192917737?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.02.15_X_footer_X_F1_S1_C1__footer&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.04.04_b1_crockett-invite_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_FR_2022.04.04_b1_crockett-invite_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1NDlhM2I2LTIzYjQtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KcnZgnAEeeoN3AiOFns4s2YkbqWuGwpWVNUcGpt5IkM=)

You're invited!

On Wednesday, April 6, at 8:00 PM EST, we're hosting a virtual fundraiser for Jasmine Crockett.

She’s a former public defender, current state representative, and a candidate for Congress in Texas's 30th District. She recently won her Democratic Primary Election on March 1.

Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

To help level the playing field, Democrats Serve was born. Since launching in May 2021, of the 29 endorsed candidates who have appeared on a ballot so far, every single one has won their election.

For the 2022 midterms, the PAC has made endorsements nationwide in competitive elections, including: U.S. Senate Candidates Cheri Beasley (NC), Val Demings (FL), and Sarah Godlewski (WI); U.S. House Candidates Christina Bohannan (IA-01), Matt Castelli (NY-21), Jasmine Crockett (TX-30), Val Foushee (NC-06), Kara Hahn (NY-1), Jonathan Logemann (IL-17), Seth Magaziner (RI-02), Karin Norington-Reaves (IL-01), Ruben Ramirez (TX-15), and Tony Vargas (NE-2); Incumbent House Democrats Carolyn Bourdeaux (GA-07), Jahana Hayes (CT-05), Andy Kim (NJ-03), Tom Malinowski (NJ-07), Tom O'Halleran (AZ-01), Katie Porter (CA-45), Mikie Sherrill (NJ-11), Abigail Spanberger (VA-07), Elissa Slotkin (MI-08), Lauren Underwood (IL-14), and Susan Wild (PA-07); Gubernatorial Candidate Katie Hobbs (AZ); and Attorney General Candidate Aramis Ayala (FL).

If you’d like to support Democrats Serve, you can [click here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43757023/338579942/-1840301555?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.02.15_X_footer_X_F1_S1_C1__footer&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.04.04_b1_crockett-invite_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_FR_2022.04.04_b1_crockett-invite_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1NDlhM2I2LTIzYjQtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KcnZgnAEeeoN3AiOFns4s2YkbqWuGwpWVNUcGpt5IkM=) to make a donation.

Our first end-of-quarter fundraiser is finally on the books, and, team, I am impressed. I always know I can count on our grassroots supporters coming through, and, once again, you did not disappoint.

We had hundreds of new folks make their first-ever donation, and thousands more double down to flip CA-27 from _red_ to _blue._ That's because you know as well as I do how much hinges on this election.

[**If you didn't get a chance, you can still donate! body:
so can I count on your support as this campaign heats up? |
---

| | Hi Friend,

Can you believe it’s already April 4th? Before we know it, it’ll be Election Day, Floridians will be casting their votes, and we won’t be able to do anything else but wait for the results.

But the election isn’t here just yet — and frankly, what we do _today_ , and _tomorrow_ , and the day _after_ that will determine what happens on Election Day.

My team and I have been meeting with folks from every corner of Florida and working to earn each and every vote. But I know we can’t defeat Gov. DeSantis and build a Florida for All on our own.

**_[As the clock ticks down toward Election Day and this campaign heats up, I hope I can count on your continuing support. If you can spare a few dollars, please donate today to my campaign for governor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43770188/338624282/1278717326?refcode=20220404_f_2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjNkMTBlZi00NWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pazyyCRkwb02eMzzW0pogj6ySPyf_Lgl6ce_flr6zjk=)_**

Thank you, and God bless,
Charlie

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7d7c08b8db254b0f874941fef6593f27&_e=-6lQVYga1we2v3lhykDfupRDapkTMy-jf0lVgZ_gHOSI_pDfY3z6Ex3cDkNHxcIUO0p7bWnsJLS61PDDo64VDrjmQUpMPg2xJNmKysBX67Gz_yA5QCe955QobnkYL7eY6-Msd4TZ8iaJO1Vw1hMwe7Se4rq8FSqxAfus4ghg085GktnpJL24rj2QlMLUSYOLUvPfm77iIAL-AfRKLSROp41rsAj_ZDO9aPTpEtIplUynT1qubY5yPrqYXyrKGzMmLu59jnQmGmsO_Iupk_I5cmIi9oz-hfMmOyYQI264fy-2ZWs0UloYu517EoUG5lZAN34_vlKBJ_NEnKFw1_v4VDXpjHulN93n10B9tJNYdpCA9Xm4afqRJvYKJxysfMab) | | Peter,

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fb8436a6c6c2/join-us-for-virtual-phone-banking?e=7bbb93570f)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

The Republican Primary on May 24th is coming up fast and we must choose the right candidate to face Raphael Warnock in November, and that candidate is Kelvin King. So let's come together and share Kelvin's Win for America message with Republican voters across Georgia.

Team King will be hosting Virtual Phone Banks on Tuesday, April 5th and Monday, April 11th.

The minimum requirements to participate are: a windows computer, headphones with a microphone, and an internet connection.

And since phone banking is more fun as a group, we will jump on a Zoom meeting and then start dialing together! Team King will be right there with you making calls and answering questions.

Please RSVP through Eventbrite below:

---
| [RSVP HERE](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=d090972952&e=7bbb93570f "RSVP HERE")
---
| Together, we can #RetireWarnock, take back the Senate, and #WinforAmerica!

Thank you,

Sarah Pritchard
Director of Operations
Kelvin King for US Senate
(404) 401-5500 (cell)

|

Thanks to you, our organizing efforts and fundraising numbers show that Jasmine is the candidate best suited to take on Cawthorn. We have the grassroots support and the momentum to win, but we can’t slow down now. Jasmine’s organizing across the district connecting with voters one-on-one and sharing her vision to address climate change, expand pre-k, guarantee access to affordable healthcare, and more – but we’re crunched for time. The race to register new voters and get them to turn out at the ballot box is on. clean_body: | = | | Peter, Next month, voters will cast their ballots to decide which Democrat will face Republican Madison Cawthorn in November. Thanks to you, our organizing efforts and fundraising numbers show that Jasmine is the candidate best suited to take on Cawthorn. We have the grassroots support and the momentum to win, but we can’t slow down now. Jasmine’s organizing across the district connecting with voters one-on-one and sharing her vision to address climate change, expand pre-k, guarantee access to affordable healthcare, and more – but we’re crunched for time. name: Nan Whaley
subject: Important: Ohio’s voter registration deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
Today is the last day to register to vote in Ohio to be eligible to vote in the primary election.

Team,
I just wanted to check in and make sure you knew that **today is the last day to register to vote in Ohio to be eligible to vote in the primary election.** You can register or update your voter registration online in Ohio on the Secretary of State’s website.
Early voting in Ohio opens tomorrow, and the primary is less than a month away. This is going to be an historic moment for our campaign, thanks largely to the support and dedication of grassroots supporters like you.
**[We’ve knocked on doors, we’ve made phone calls, and we’ve visited all 88 counties, but the fight for a stronger Ohio is never over. We’re in the final stretch of this chapter of the campaign, and slowing down isn’t an option. Can you contribute $5 now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43770784/338627472/-857966602?refcode=nw_em_220404_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODY1ZTM2ZS00OWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fBokWL26APSsaPpkIiQ5ygPZ98grIg5PTUPb1Uejqzo=)**
The primary is only part one of this race. After that, an even bigger obstacle is ahead: defeating Mike DeWine and the Republican money that stands behind him. This race is getting national attention, and there will be a lot of people who want to stop us.
But if you’re anything like me, you’re not afraid of a challenge. Especially when it comes to making Ohio the state we know it can be. One where one job is enough, where people don’t have to leave for opportunities, and where our students can thrive.
**[Ohio deserves better. You deserve better. I’m fighting for Ohio, and I’m fighting for you. But a stronger state is only possible if we stay in this fight. Donate $5 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43770785/338627473/-857966602?refcode=nw_em_220404_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODY1ZTM2ZS00OWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fBokWL26APSsaPpkIiQ5ygPZ98grIg5PTUPb1Uejqzo=)**

Onward,

Nan Whaley

name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43761237/338590288/-679993507?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220404ty_yc_allop_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWRhYjk4YS0yOWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VVq0G60lH1aqjqhE3Ob5saJGPlp01u0u9lFR225ii54=)
---
Thank you, Peter. Because of supporters like you, we not only hit our ambitious end-of-quarter goal — we _smashed_ it. We had our best fundraising month of the year so far, and we’re just getting started. Since the beginning of 2022, our average online donation from thousands of individuals here in Colorado and across the country is just _**$21.25**_. That small-dollar, grassroots power is how we’re going to end big corporations’ stranglehold on our politics, and finally deliver for working families. **We’ve still got a long way to go.** The June primaries are the next big test of our campaign, and then we’ll be battling the GOP’s extremism all summer long. But I’m so proud to be running a campaign that’s by and for working families — your clear belief that what we’re building together is worth fighting for is what sustains me even in the toughest of times. So, truly, thank you. I hope to see you out there on the campaign trail soon! With gratitude,
Yadira P.S. One of the best ways you can help make our campaign sustainable over the next nine months is by setting up a recurring donation—[**if you’re able, will you sign up for a recurring donation of $10 every month from now until November 8?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43761242/338590295/-679993507?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220404ty_yc_allop_xx_l1&amount=10&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWRhYjk4YS0yOWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VVq0G60lH1aqjqhE3Ob5saJGPlp01u0u9lFR225ii54=) | [SET UP RECURRING DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43761262/338590304/-679993507?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220404ty_yc_allop_xx_btn&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWRhYjk4YS0yOWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VVq0G60lH1aqjqhE3Ob5saJGPlp01u0u9lFR225ii54=)

Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. name: United Rural Democrats
subject: ALERT: Dems are under attack in rural America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
They need our support more than ever

| |
---
Hi Peter – **We just heard that no Democrats have filed to represent the Carroll County area in the Iowa Statehouse.** Here's what the Carroll County Democratic Chair C.J. Peterson had to say: “People feel they are going to be ostracized just for putting their names on the ballot." **We can't afford to leave Democrats off the ballot in rural districts.** Iowa has 99 counties – and every one of them needs a Democrat in the race. Will we win every single district? Like all fights, the answer is no. But that doesn't mean we back down from even trying. Here's why: we have won these rural districts in the past, and with hard work and the right resources, we can win there again. Democratic candidates don't back down from a fight – and neither should we. Let's show Democrats running in rural districts that we support their fight against the GOP. [**Peter, 2022 is already shaping up to be a difficult battle. The last thing we need is Democratic candidates feeling a lack of support. Will you chip in $10 or more so we can equip Democrats with the resources they need to fight and clean_body: They need our support more than ever | | Hi Peter – We just heard that no Democrats have filed to represent the Carroll County area in the Iowa Statehouse. Here's what the Carroll County Democratic Chair C.J. Peterson had to say: “People feel they are going to be ostracized just for putting their names on the ballot." We can't afford to leave Democrats off the ballot in rural districts. Iowa has 99 counties – and every one of them needs a Democrat in the race. Will we win every single district? Like all fights, the answer is no. But that doesn't mean we back down from even trying. Here's why: we have won these rural districts in the past, and with hard work and the right resources, we can win there again. Democratic candidates don't back down from a fight – and neither should we. Let's show Democrats running in rural districts that we support their fight against the GOP. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you for fighting with us. – United Rural Dems HQ | United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. name: Jim Jordan
subject: Asking for a small favor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
I've come to the decision that as it pertains to the next chapter in my public service, the best move is no move at all. I'm running for reelection an It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a0181384ae794d0e98a69c3f7b2baacf&_e=E_pH7TauNMbLAgooMEIPxIhYGU6W90Wgw1lpKZkMa1Wlob58iozmADIuZcdaNsAovxSpPS26F6rdrUX5z9QbfNTT_WNAzs3IL8h1tjPIVwqJ18wMYinFl_BN-eb0VF1au6xTiy2mgtj618fjCP8b_Xjo0ciV2S2Gv8OWmj5wpUvZrWOpRIdmcAhH1iJnKqyaC56D9vKyh5wttd4ZRtFSG3RZ2VIigckxfdeEC7bXF-qxPJ5bqkMxOabKVsNSBlNp6OsBoRTSfEWhGX2pxLj97NkpySmbCcjB-e-Em8uH0NhNdKBixIL0NZwXjeOzIXB3-lmdXdiGjkRlQTA-LnqWaxBmXbk9DbFE9L_M0yHmihYLZn3QFvHjvLbdXodNBAu6QViwFBOoCrDnB9FhtcLJ35I_jtkafhQTbJAY1mnzIjGwKHePO85VRePGGbOvRDCgNp7WS8M4Sfa2p8tQ1DdbBD2i68gceAQ_P0mf7WTG4WM%3D)
---

Peter,

I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. Ever. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself. I promise you that.**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a0181384ae794d0e98a69c3f7b2baacf&_e=E_pH7TauNMbLAgooMEIPxIhYGU6W90Wgw1lpKZkMa1Wlob58iozmADIuZcdaNsAovxSpPS26F6rdrUX5z9QbfNTT_WNAzs3IL8h1tjPIVwqJ18wMYinFl_BN-eb0VF1au6xTiy2mgtj618fjCP8b_Xjo0ciV2S2Gv8OWmj5wpUvZrWOpRIdmcAhH1iJnKqyaC56D9vKyh5wttd4ZRtFSG3RZ2VIigckxfdeEC7bXF-qxPJ5bqkMxOabKVsNSBlNp6OsBoRTSfEWhGX2pxLj97MyvXAglRB7sEKKJM6pPSStc-JbAuHj5BV0kGIsjrtYaUdZpSfaT6SQ2fb6Jy64zTV_SM2ePwjncaqxciOUhmna4AjhvX6T6RwFkR6MUtqz_DO9_P3N7et7LQydwPJFf9GLwmp8Sm-MQUJatRIaQbNhTTU-hQWfCFKDZisrV-62qS-bUKEbhQH9VSRg-q6pJhvIIVCwib7iLq1_hrHuseWc%3D)
I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll endorse me for re-election](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a0181384ae794d0e98a69c3f7b2baacf&_e=E_pH7TauNMbLAgooMEIPxIhYGU6W90Wgw1lpKZkMa1Wlob58iozmADIuZcdaNsAovxSpPS26F6rdrUX5z9QbfNTT_WNAzs3IL8h1tjPIVwqJ18wMYinFl_BN-eb0VF1au6xTiy2mgtj618fjCP8b_Xjo0ciV2S2Gv8OWmj5wpUvZrWOpRIdmcAhH1iJnKqyaC56D9vKyh5wttd4ZRtFSG3RZ2VIigckxfdeEC7bXF-qxPJ5bqkMxOabKVsNSBlNp6OsBoRTSfEWhGX2pxLj97AUGeA0JSn_vHYgg2ekEJVLlLWx4YS3-iiZzifduvbiE_OhkOmoCcMlHJJvHIxEO-6sX4FRWzmja00Y11wpo-TL5EQ-Z0BnRlXWDAq0j4BJJUvItPbpaN-vDOxgunUyPdmXCWJ2pvTFcIL11j7yKZoCqr7KEJyHgCjibmVoI_NsIrekDZeu7NEWhw1he6HPaqjBUUdsTFxvDlIJCyWFNiQE%3D)**.

I’ll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I’m in Congress, **[which is why I’m asking for your support today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a0181384ae794d0e98a69c3f7b2baacf&_e=E_pH7TauNMbLAgooMEIPxIhYGU6W90Wgw1lpKZkMa1Wlob58iozmADIuZcdaNsAovxSpPS26F6rdrUX5z9QbfNTT_WNAzs3IL8h1tjPIVwqJ18wMYinFl_BN-eb0VF1au6xTiy2mgtj618fjCP8b_Xjo0ciV2S2Gv8OWmj5wpUvZrWOpRIdmcAhH1iJnKqyaC56D9vKyh5wttd4ZRtFSG3RZ2VIigckxfdeEC7bXF-qxPJ5bqkMxOabKVsNSBlNp6OsBoRTSfEWhGX2pxLj97PuR9XoNxphn1E6q_x_qOAyQ2kNXcdzmsFejq2T41uspKgVDYMZ6nJ9N4YrUrz5pAYsN4jaVR17GdbJ2IY0QISNg0QSHC1YeWtXUkcHpHaeRvzytk6HHRzSFeMVjzBco-frBd7wN6ydnLtmPZ2n0EntMRoDZiQ7ra3UPM89p8rcQT7KwQFW-YWYlM4bLIYCbHBrk2XwAw8TJxXtYF-SSf8U%3D)** It’s imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I’m worthy of your support and **[I hope you’ll offer your endorsement of my candidacy today](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a0181384ae794d0e98a69c3f7b2baacf&_e=E_pH7TauNMbLAgooMEIPxIhYGU6W90Wgw1lpKZkMa1Wlob58iozmADIuZcdaNsAovxSpPS26F6rdrUX5z9QbfNTT_WNAzs3IL8h1tjPIVwqJ18wMYinFl_BN-eb0VF1au6xTiy2mgtj618fjCP8b_Xjo0ciV2S2Gv8OWmj5wpUvZrWOpRIdmcAhH1iJnKqyaC56D9vKyh5wttd4ZRtFSG3RZ2VIigckxfdeEC7bXF-qxPJ5bqkMxOabKVsNSBlNp6OsBoRTSfEWhGX2pxLj97ESxpd9BzP6geifx0ona58H4h2vtHYLg4xbwp-s4zD6sJrRRALtrmm26LxXryFpUkBK1nPhqJSSSCUznbr1rw-mF6v-qeexWg1qQsHNkakNvj6tqUF5kbvxEj2xANoVfKytK7vJaNarVtXa2U7h7JQfVlqjETwH6RGUVrTAfPmUytwVOJGgFct8MDOHt25BOWu2hO06U7ipjiMIxCLsomcE%3D)**.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a0181384ae794d0e98a69c3f7b2baacf&_e=E_pH7TauNMbLAgooMEIPxIhYGU6W90Wgw1lpKZkMa1Wlob58iozmADIuZcdaNsAovxSpPS26F6rdrUX5z9QbfNTT_WNAzs3IL8h1tjPIVwqJ18wMYinFl_BN-eb0VF1au6xTiy2mgtj618fjCP8b_Xjo0ciV2S2Gv8OWmj5wpUvZrWOpRIdmcAhH1iJnKqyaC56D9vKyh5wttd4ZRtFSG3RZ2VIigckxfdeEC7bXF-qxPJ5bqkMxOabKVsNSBlNp6OsBoRTSfEWhGX2pxLj97A81Q0Q-hyCB-p_7gk-WpTgRJxx64VOyRPYfTs7Gf3LTzdCMrSjTyDfz4SAlRLB8LUMYJaWbsDf2vktpMkGbu4VkXWxtfzKp78d4SF2ZW2jftRZvm5mb2x5RTpfdFh9JTuTlYtF8D0jVesbK92aL__UYHRi0XRRJJcdnfelGBIdfpS-P97cM5MCTZdS2fYbLT-cdCKao_5l7-IDqBs8G46I%3D)
We’ve got so much work to do in the remaining three years Joe Biden has in the White House.

Biden and his people have no idea what they’re doing and it’s going to take a herculean effort on the part of House Republicans to keep them from ruining our country; to keep Big Tech and big media from colluding to keep the truth about this White House -- and the people at the helm – from the**American people**.

body:
You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you hav
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc1bo2u7h9s2m7186vtpq66g5duemkhns1ibma78_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1ie9pr4c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65slh6prmadjlmiqb1o5jegp3bd1m6dqeco5hmph38p5im1j74pjlcmqbcsdlm9o6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5l61g7eob6e5qb6oj7m2qmash5u)
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjmpv6qsn47frtfuo0642t62epjt4ba0gl031jko_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1ie9pr4c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5dhldvq3r8nc0nt9rtjrdmtd4hjfj69j8haarf8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1ie9pr4c5h2bs) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I’d like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt6p88svv10a06kojm45vrf3q6slpqijjkmgas78_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1ie9pr4c5h2bs).
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd58r79jm75uetsf91ob37d2afqjf34sel0f7bng_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1ie9pr4c5h2bs)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3ag7u30ueanfp4b450metdqb9fsq9usuqepi3f0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1ie9pr4c5h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, “All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ ” Don’t let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbkuotgtv3fu4ivh1p1rdsi9pm2vsi56besl5eig_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1ie9pr4c5h2bs)
---

But here’s the deal, Republicans can try and jam up the process, and we must show that we stand with Ketanji Brown Jackson and support her swift confirmation.

clean_body: [] Friends , our fundraising deadline ends TOMORROW AT MIDNIGHT and we’re short of where we need to be to hit our goals for the month. The timing is NOT GREAT and Mark needs your help. Can you PLEASE split a contribution today between Mark Kelly and Seth Moulton? [] Things are really heating up... FIRST: A Mitch-McConnell-backed dark money group started spending millions of dollars to defeat Mark Kelly. THEN: One of our opponents unleashed a $10 million super PAC to beat us. AND THEN: Trump told his supporters that beating Mark was one of the most important things they can do this year. [] This fundraising deadline is serious. The goals are NOT arbitrary. Hitting them is what we need to win. Falling short is not an option. So, please. This is so important: Can you PLEASE make a contribution -- split with Seth Moulton -- to help Mark Kelly defend this seat? Every donation means a lot when so many people are chipping in. | | Dear Friend,

As the leading challenger in the race for California Attorney General, Nathan has raised over $1.65 million, 40% from Democrats and Independents, and has received bipartisan endorsements ranging from Democratic LA County Sheriff Alex Villanueva to Republican Orange County Sheriff Don Barnes, from former Republican LA District Attorney Steve Cooley to former Democratic LA District Attorney Jackie Lacey.

In case you missed it, below is a clip of Nathan's appearance this past week on Fox LA's "The Issue Is" with Elex Michaelson.

In the interview, Nathan outlined his experience and qualifications to serve as Attorney General and his plans to solve the key problems facing Californians: rising crime, the fentanyl epidemic, homelessness, and human trafficking.

It was incredibly clear in the interview that Nathan is the best positioned candidate to win the race for Attorney General and deliver substantive results for the people of California.

Check it out below and be sure to head over to [www.NathanHochman.com](https://strategyinsightshq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=1cf3f6590a&e=94837ebab3) to join the team, donate, and help us get through the June 7th primary and win this election in November!

Best,

Team Hochman

name: Supreme Court ALERT
subject: Judge Jackson’s confirmation vote >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | |
---
**BREAKING: Committee vote TODAY on Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson's nomination to the Supreme Court!**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7284?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220404-SupremeCourtALERT-KBJVotePreview-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220404-SupremeCourtALERT-KBJVotePreview-Pros-sl1&akid=3658%2E9716520%2ETjikn5)
History is about to be made, team.

A **_pivotal_** Senate Judiciary Committee vote is coming up TODAY on Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to become the **first Black woman _ever_ on the Supreme Court!**

Judge Jackson is already one of the most popular high-court nominees in DECADES, but in order to track changes in public opinion, **our campaign strategists need to know where you stand BEFORE this history-making vote.**

**So please, tell us now:**

name: Eden Hill
subject: Release: Burg for Congress Suspends His Congressional Campaign and Endorses Mike Blasi.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burg for Congress Inc
body:
__
Running for Congress also has opened my eyes to the astonishingly corrupt political system in this state. | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
|
---
For Immediate Release
Contact: Eden Gordon -- [hello@edengordonmedia.com](mailto:hello@edengordonmedia.com)
Cell: 202-714-6014
*** PRESS RELEASE***
David Burg for Congress Statement
_David Burg Suspends His Congressional Campaign and Endorses Mike Blasi_ (Howell, New Jersey) MONDAY, APRIL 4, 2022 --- David Burg, Republican Candidate for Congress in New Jersey’s 4th District, announced yesterday that he has suspended his campaign and is endorsing fellow primary challenger Mike Blasi to unseat incumbent Chris Smith.

"It has been a tremendous privilege and one of the most meaningful experiences of my life to run for Congress. Because of the incredible generosity of my supporters I’ve had the opportunity to articulate my views about the perilous future of our country far and wide, and to fight as hard as I can to preserve and protect our sacred Constitutional Republic.

But this campaign has never been about me. From the outset, it’s been about our country, our culture, our faith, and our families.

Mike Blasi is a fellow Republican who preceded me in this race and now is in a stronger position to unseat our 42-year incumbent. Like myself, Mike is a political outsider who is not beholden to anyone or anything other than his principles. He’s a good man who has served our country, he’s a family man, and Mike and I see eye-to-eye on all significant issues.

Under these circumstances, the last thing I would want to do is stand in Mike’s way. So it’s my honor to wholeheartedly endorse Mike Blasi to be our next Congressman from New Jersey’s 4th District. I intend to do everything I can to help Mike win this critically important primary on June 7.

Running for Congress also has opened my eyes to the astonishingly corrupt political system in this state. I find it shocking and wholly unacceptable that a small cabal of entrenched insiders determines whom the Republican Party will endorse for political office – which these operatives then publish on the very ballot through which we exercise our right to vote.

Given this mutual back-scratching racket it’s hardly surprising that a RINO swamp creature like Chris Smith has held our Congressional seat for 42 years!

So, in addition to doing everything I can for Mike Blasi, I intend to use my legal skills to help abolish New Jersey’s corrupt line-voting system. It’s time to empower ordinary New Jersians to express their own preferences for the candidates who best represent their Republican values – without undue influence by entrenched insiders.

Two other extremely important points for those of you in the NJ area:

First, a truly courageous patriot who has become a dear friend through my Congressional campaign, Elizabeth Nader, is organizing what promises to be an incredibly informative and inspiring event on April 28 entitled ‘A Seat At The Table.’ There will be a number of nationally-prominent conservative luminaries there and I strongly encourage all of you to attend. You can learn about and register for this very important event here: [https://www.conservative.org/2022/03/16/a-seat-at-the-table/](https://www.conservative.org/2022/03/16/a-seat-at-the-table/).

Second, another courageous patriot and prominent conservative talk-show host on NJ 101.5, Bill Spadea, and others recently launched a critically-important grassroots conservative organization in New Jersey, the Common Sense Club. The Common Sense Club is growing rapidly and is positioned to affect important and deeply impactful change in our great state. I’m a member and I strongly encourage each of you to join here: [https://commonsenseclub.org/](https://commonsenseclub.org/).

I’m so gratified to have had this opportunity to run for Congress. Thanks to all of you from the bottom of my heart, and please know that this has been just the start of my ongoing fight to defend our beloved country from the leftist abyss.

God Bless America.” ###
| Paid for by Burg for Congress Inc.

Hey Derek — I wanted to take a moment real quick to say _thank you_.
**Because of folks like you, we secured key endorsements from both local county parties and thousands of union workers, and surpassed our end-of-quarter FEC goal!**
All the hard work you’ve done to power this campaign is bringing us one step closer to victory. Chris is so grateful to have this level of grassroots energy and overwhelming support of Western Pennsylvanians behind him.
We have a huge opportunity to elect a champion for workers who will take on corporate greed, defend our fundamental right to vote, and fight for our common good in Congress.
**But there’s still a lot of work ahead now that primary election season is in full force.**
With you by my side, we will continue to grow our people-powered movement so every voter across Western PA knows that Chris is the best person to win this competitive seat.
With gratitude,
Caitlin Handerhan
Campaign Manager
Chris Deluzio for Congress

body:
The energy here in Cleveland is real
#

**GOOD NEWS:** Thanks to an incredible surge of grassroots support, we were able to hit our fundraising goal before the FEC deadline and set our campaign up for success in the early voting period that starts _tomorrow._
**BETTER NEWS:** We did it on the strength of thousands of individual donations, which is how we’re funding this entire campaign because Nina isn’t taking a DIME of corporate money.
**BEST NEWS:** When you fund a campaign this way, people on the ground can feel it. Folks know Nina isn’t beholden to corporate special interests or massive Super PACs and that she’ll fight for all of us.
**The energy here in Cleveland is real. We can pull this off — _if we have the resources to finish this race strong._ Can Nina count on your support today?**
**[Please, make your first contribution to Nina Turner for Us today. We have an unprecedented opportunity to make real, lasting change in the lives of everyday people in OH-11 and across the country if we are willing to stand together and fight for it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43772501/338638826/413031954?refcode2=dfea49a3-53b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220404-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmVhNDlhMy01M2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLIMFIP9iGXaVR2oFwL__HX1pMhDjLDgpUUlD1Nb0Tc=)**
