name: Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
subject: I am the Candidate Tim Walz is Afraid Of
body:
| Peter -- Tim Walz knows his days are numbered if I am the nominee. Other candidates in this race, for various reasons, lack **electability**. The worst thing delegates could do is choose a candidate who will **LOSE** to Tim Walz. It would **destroy** momentum for Republicans down the ballot, give the Senate and House to the **radical Dems** , and keep the clown who has destroyed our state in power. We **cannot** let that happen and that is why we are fighting so hard. I truly fear that a milquetoast, uninspiring candidate will lose to Tim Walz. Minnesotans see straight through **politicians** and their scripted talking points. If we choose a candidate that **looks** , **acts** , and **sounds** like a **politician** , Tim Walz will out-maneuver them. The left has something to vote for because Tim Walz has been successfully pushing their radical Socialist agenda, meeting no real resistance from Republicans. If we do not give a clear alternative to politics as usual, we'll leave moderate voters uninspired and sitting out. We cannot allow this to happen! I’ve dedicated my life to _curing skin cancer_ and _saving lives_. I never wanted to be involved in politics, but was left with no choice after Walz locked us down, forced us into masks, and threatened us with an evil jab or job ultimatum. I cannot stand by and watch another Republican politician lose to the Democrats. My state senate opponents have records that anger both Conservative and Independent voters. They know we need an **outsider,** and that we can no longer ingratiate ourselves with the political class. While some of my Republican opponents were voting to expand socialism in the Senate, I challenged Walz to a debate on his home turf. Walz **hid** behind the unions to prevent it. Before other campaigns could track what was happening, we called out corrupt officials in Morrison County for **deleting duly elected delegates** from their lists. Most candidates still stay silent. Unlike the majority of candidates, I will never support **Omnibus Bills**. They are Unconstitutional, are never read by the politicians, are written by lobbyists and special interests, and fund everything we hate! I am the only candidate who has **never** run for office, this is not a career move for me. This is about saving our state and **nothing else**. Tim Walz would **hate** to face off against me. I am the [**strongest debater**](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRY7Q_y8gylUG48rZfpnzF5j&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_am_the_candidate&n=1) in the field, I have the most capable and dedicated team, and we have the **momentum** to beat Tim Walz. He will not know how to attack an Indian-American who hates **Critical Race Theory** , and we will reverse course on the failed legacy of Tim Walz! At the [State Convention](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=9zEdMKiVzdmYzogJISNiX-EZNgkCrmiTei2KSbOpE3ENOF1Pak7pzEKHPqI2WXjqebXgJ66JPfiJtyfd2Y6mHk2v_1o66NtlOUznIeYRghWa5i7H2JWH1qt59n8T-tmR&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_am_the_candidate&n=2) Republicans will choose between running the same failed play again, or choosing a different candidate and a different result. We are the **real deal** and will bring out the voters we need to WIN, something other campaigns cannot do. Please chip in to support THE Grassroots Campaign for Governor! [$25, $50, $100, or more goes a long ways in our fight!](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rDwg01bMOn9gGWui5cl2dLg&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_am_the_candidate&n=3) | [](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rDwg01bMOn9gGWui5cl2dLg&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_am_the_candidate&n=4 "SUPPORT OUR GRASSROOTS CAMPAIGN") [SUPPORT OUR GRASSROOTS CAMPAIGN](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rDwg01bMOn9gGWui5cl2dLg&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_am_the_candidate&n=4)
---
With your help we will defeat Tim Walz and Save Sota!
Thank you!
Dr. Neil Shah
Conservative Candidate for Governor
ElectNeil.com
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · 855 Village Center Drive #245, North Oaks, MN 55127-3016, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_am_the_candidate&n=5). -=-=-
Created with [NationBuilder](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_am_the_candidate&n=6), software for leaders.

name: Beto for Texas
subject: “Pretty much tied”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
This is a two point race.
#
This is big news!
**A brand new poll shows Beto within just two points of Greg Abbott.** And those two points are well within the margin of error. One news anchor said it best: this race is “pretty much tied.”
Greg Abbott: 42%
Beto O’Rourke: 40%
_The Texas Lyceum_
[ Beto can win this race but we need your support right now to make it happen. Please chip in $3 to help Beto reach more voters, continue our momentum, and defeat Greg Abbott.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54793?refcode=ema20220404-183529&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=183529%2E444211%2EvJ2AKw)

name: Kara Hahn
subject: Sincerely -- thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43766021/338604532/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTUyN2E1Yi0zNGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8cQum0MYgkhvSnAknIrFOqCOr92QBD_YC3g3un7weRs=)

Team,

Thank you to everyone who stepped up to support this campaign last month, whether it was carrying petitions, chipping in toward our fundraising goal, or just spreading the word about my vision for our community.

I know what it means to give what you can to a campaign, and to invest your hard-earned dollars or valuable time to bring people together for a better future. And as the only candidate who has pledged they won't take money from corporate PACs, every dollar we raise is a measure of the grassroots support we have.

We've got a long way to go, and a lot to do before the primary in June. It's incredibly inspiring to know that so many of our community members are willing to be a part of what we're building.

Looking ahead, I'm fueled by a profound sense of gratitude and a determination to do right by this community I love.

Thank you again,

Kara

P.S. If you missed the deadline but would still like to help out, **[make a contribution today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43766022/338604533/1307566342?refcode=em22_220404_eoqTY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTUyN2E1Yi0zNGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8cQum0MYgkhvSnAknIrFOqCOr92QBD_YC3g3un7weRs=)** toward our next goal!

Friend,
Today is the day. It’s our final end-of-quarter deadline. Each quarter, we have to hit our fundraising goal to keep fighting to expand voting rights. I wouldn't be here if it weren't for grassroots supporters like you — and I know that if I'm going to win this race, I simply can't do it without you by my side again.
Unfortunately, the campaign isn't where it needs to be. We’ve had some generous donors step up to help—but we aren’t quite there yet, so we count on grassroots support from people like you!
**[The end-of-quarter deadline is tonight, and then the fundraising blackout begins tomorrow. We still have about $1,200 to make up in our budget, and I'm hoping I can count on you. Your grassroots donation to the fight for clean and fair elections is the most important funding our campaign receives. Will you chip in $30 and get us to the finish line? The hours are ticking away quickly.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43766102/338605036/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220404EOQ4_EOQ_MTO_90DO_3_G_N_L1&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjI2MDQ3YS0zNGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gTMoqhUG0Uw5fb7PSZOEaOSWzboPHAV4ICoVkBJVYqg=)**

Endorsement of Sarah Palin
Wonderful patriot Sarah Palin of Alaska just announced that she is running for Congress, and that means there will be a true America First fighter on the ballot to replace the late and legendary Congressman Don Young. Sarah shocked many when she endorsed me very early in 2016, and we won big. Now, it’s my turn! Sarah has been a champion for Alaska values, Alaska energy, Alaska jobs, and the great people of Alaska. She was one of the most popular Governors because she stood up to corruption in both State Government and the Fake News Media. subject: TPPA Weekly Call to Action: April 4th
body:
| | | |
---
---
This week, we are trying to help Rep. Chip Roy get a vote on his legislation to stop the Biden administration from rescinding Title 42 (read more below), and you still have time to try to stop the COVID spending bill. **In this week’s call-to-action**
* Save Title 42 and protect the border!
* Previous AlignAct campaigns that are still active

_Remember, when you use our AlignAct campaign, you can contact all of the Senators with just a couple of clicks – it will literally take you one to two minutes to do!_
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwOTQtMjczODNmOGUzOGYxNDY3MmFmODMzZDE4ZTFhOTU0M2MiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL3N0b3AtdGhyb3dpbmctbW9uZXktYXQtY292aWQ_bWlkPTQ1MTQ5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/jNAnuoKhxwlWiAovJ_vKcA)
---
Title 42 is a public health order put in place by President Trump and it is up for renewal soon. Of course, Joe Biden wants to eliminate it. Our border is already practically nonexistent at this point. Should Title 42 be lifted, we would have no border. [This Fox News article](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) has more details about Title 42: _The Title 42 public health order was implemented by the Trump administration in March 2020 and allows for the rapid expulsion of migrants at the southern border. It has been used by both the Trump and Biden administrations to quickly expel more than half of all migrants coming to the border rather than allow them into the U.S._ _The order is up for renewal in the coming days, and the Biden administration is believed to be considering revoking it -- despite fears that it will encourage even more migrants to attempt to cross the border, and quickly overwhelm authorities._ The article also discusses Rep. Chip Roy’s discharge petition for his legislation that would keep Title 42 in place. A discharge petition is a mechanism by which any member of the House can bring a piece of legislation to the floor for a vote, bypassing the Speaker. Pelosi obviously will not allow a vote on this, so this is the only way it will happen. **Your action for this week is to contact your representative with a message of support for this discharge petition and for the legislation itself. We especially want to target Democrats who are not retiring this year and so, are up for re-election.** **If you have a Republican representative, your message is:** _Thank you for support Rep. Chip Roy’s discharge petition and his legislation to keep Title 42 in place. Thank you for putting Americans first. Thank you._ **If you have a Democrat representative, your message is:**_Revoking Title 42 is a national security and public health disaster. It is unbelievable that the Biden administration is even considering revoking it. I am asking that my representative sign Rep. Chip Roy’s discharge petition for his legislation that would keep Title 42 in place, and to vote for the legislation if it gets a vote. Thank you._ If you have time to email them as well (use their online contact form), please do so.
---
[FIND MY REPRESENTATIVE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
| | |
---
Biden's new [$5.8 trillion](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MTQ5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/QoCWnGHOEjOL9W8J_8A0Zg) budget plan is the stuff of fantasy for Big Government liberals. [Spending priorities](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MTQ5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/v55BjIpEhw6z2e3pIacIJw) would include $3.3 billion for new Green New Deal projects and another $18 billion for "climate resilience programs," which includes funding for a hyper-political "Civilian Climate Corps." The budget also includes $7.5 billion to "land the first woman and person of color on the moon." The president proposes paying for this out-of-control spending spree by increasing the IRS' budget by 18% and passing the largest tax increase in American history. Under this plan, almost every American would pay more in taxes because Biden would repeal the Trump tax cuts, [cutting](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._dnQuZW8zQuSQ) the standard deduction in half. He also wants to enact a tax on the American Dream, which would confiscate at least 20% of income from households worth more than $100 million. This proposal is a wealth tax by a different name, is extraordinarily [complicated](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MTQ5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/ixUkVYqQGIeVviuzwdn59Q), and almost impossible to implement fairly.
---
|
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwOTQtMjczODNmOGUzOGYxNDY3MmFmODMzZDE4ZTFhOTU0M2MiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL3N0b3AtdGhyb3dpbmctbW9uZXktYXQtY292aWQ_bWlkPTQ1MTQ5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/gNrlqv5HH-TOz9CRpipbcQ)
---
Our elected officials in D.C. have already spent over $5 trillion to “respond” to COVID. Now, they’re trying to spend over $15 billion more – no, wait – Nancy Pelosi wants to spend another $45 billion! Don’t let them! While the House is in recess this week, we can still make calls and email and use social media to pressure the House to vote against the COVID spending bill, H.R. 7007.
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwOTQtMjczODNmOGUzOGYxNDY3MmFmODMzZDE4ZTFhOTU0M2MiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiOCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL3N0b3AtdGhyb3dpbmctbW9uZXktYXQtY292aWQ_bWlkPTQ1MTQ5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/CPYn_qWk6ZNeIwS022-NDQ)
---
| | |
---
Just when no one could imagine the crisis situation becoming any more alarming, President Biden has managed to make a bad situation [exceedingly worse](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.). Border patrol agents have encountered almost one million illegal immigrants less than six months into the 2022 fiscal year because the president is [encouraging](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MTQ5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/whQ9NzJK1MDqCMR1uQZEXA) illegal immigration. Things are likely to become worse yet. Biden is expected to rescind Title 42, a Trump-era policy that [allows](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._g) for the rapid deportation of illegal immigrants during a public health emergency and which has discouraged illegal immigration during the pandemic. Homeland Security officials are bracing in anticipation for a tidal wave of 18,000 illegal immigrants every day. Instead of working to secure our border, Biden is trying to [change](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MTQ5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/ZE9KsK6ZP5Qp4Wlia6M13Q) [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MTQ5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/4v6iKca9tWIdrqmYEMg3XA)American immigration policy on the fly. His budget proposes moving away from enforcement and toward processing illegal immigrants. He is willing to [spend billions](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) on tax credits for electric vehicles and millions on [voting by mail schemes](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.), yet his budget for border security is nearly nothing by comparison.
---
|
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
**Reopen the Keystone Pipeline!** Under President Trump, America was energy independent, exporting energy to other nations, and we (and the world) were safer as a result. One of the pieces of our energy independence was the Keystone Pipeline. Within hours of being sworn in, Joe Biden cancelled the permits for the pipeline, killing the project. Now we see, in real time, the consequences of his actions, as we import energy from Russia, and in effect, are helping to fund their invasion of Ukraine. Furthermore, Biden and the radical left that owns him want to exploit current events to stop Americans from using oil and gas full stop. Remember their motto, never let a crisis go to waste.
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._gLZOfg7h59yq-uuNLw)
---
| | |
---
In Georgia, [Atlanta Public Schools partnered with the New Georgia Project](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._xuBGCBOJfHliS17g), a group funded by Stacey Abrams, to indoctrinate public school students. The New Georgia Project created lessons railing against voter ID and any efforts to provide for better voter integrity. The group's CEO allowed her mask to slip last year when she said the group was focusing on Georgia voters, "who are the swingiest voters in our country," and trying to "turn them into super voters." Clearly, this means trying to turn high school students into loyal Democrats. Nationally, President Biden is targeting charter schools with a new rule that [limits](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) the amount of federal funding they can receive. This rule, if implemented, would likely cause many charter schools to close, according to former Department of Education Senior Counselor Robert Eitel. The administration is trying to enact these unnecessary regulations on an expedited timetable to satisfy their allies in teachers' unions. These stories show how the Left wants to indoctrinate America's children while ensuring parents don't have alternative options.

The article also discusses Rep. Chip Roy’s discharge petition for his legislation that would keep Title 42 in place. A discharge petition is a mechanism by which any member of the House can bring a piece of legislation to the floor for a vote, bypassing the Speaker. Pelosi obviously will not allow a vote on this, so this is the only way it will happen. Your action for this week is to contact your representative with a message of support for this discharge petition and for the legislation itself. We especially want to target Democrats who are not retiring this year and so, are up for re-election. If you have a Republican representative, your message is: Thank you for support Rep. Chip Roy’s discharge petition and his legislation to keep Title 42 in place. Thank you for putting Americans first. Thank you. If you have a Democrat representative, your message is:Revoking Title 42 is a national security and public health disaster. It is unbelievable that the Biden administration is even considering revoking it. I am asking that my representative sign Rep. Chip Roy’s discharge petition for his legislation that would keep Title 42 in place, and to vote for the legislation if it gets a vote. Thank you. If you have time to email them as well (use their online contact form), please do so. | | | Biden's new budget plan is the stuff of fantasy for Big Government liberals. would include $3.3 billion for new Green New Deal projects and another $18 billion for "climate resilience programs," which includes funding for a hyper-political "Civilian Climate Corps." The budget also includes $7.5 billion to "land the first woman and person of color on the moon." The president proposes paying for this out-of-control spending spree by increasing the IRS' budget by 18% and passing the largest tax increase in American history. Under this plan, almost every American would pay more in taxes because Biden would repeal the Trump tax cuts, the standard deduction in half. He also wants to enact a tax on the American Dream, which would confiscate at least 20% of income from households worth more than $100 million. This proposal is a wealth tax by a different name, is extraordinarily , and almost impossible to implement fairly. | | | Our elected officials in D.C. have already spent over $5 trillion to “respond” to COVID. Now, they’re trying to spend over $15 billion more – no, wait – Nancy Pelosi wants to spend another $45 billion! Don’t let them! While the House is in recess this week, we can still make calls and email and use social media to pressure the House to vote against the COVID spending bill, H.R. 7007. | | | Just when no one could imagine the crisis situation becoming any more alarming, President Biden has managed to make a bad situation . Border patrol agents have encountered almost one million illegal immigrants less than six months into the 2022 fiscal year because the president is illegal immigration. Things are likely to become worse yet. Biden is expected to rescind Title 42, a Trump-era policy that for the rapid deportation of illegal immigrants during a public health emergency and which has discouraged illegal immigration during the pandemic. Homeland Security officials are bracing in anticipation for a tidal wave of 18,000 illegal immigrants every day. Instead of working to secure our border, Biden is trying to immigration policy on the fly. His budget proposes moving away from enforcement and toward processing illegal immigrants. He is willing to on tax credits for electric vehicles and millions on , yet his budget for border security is nearly nothing by comparison. | | | Reopen the Keystone Pipeline! Under President Trump, America was energy independent, exporting energy to other nations, and we (and the world) were safer as a result. One of the pieces of our energy independence was the Keystone Pipeline. Within hours of being sworn in, Joe Biden cancelled the permits for the pipeline, killing the project. Now we see, in real time, the consequences of his actions, as we import energy from Russia, and in effect, are helping to fund their invasion of Ukraine. Furthermore, Biden and the radical left that owns him want to exploit current events to stop Americans from using oil and gas full stop. Remember their motto, never let a crisis go to waste. | | | In Georgia, , a group funded by Stacey Abrams, to indoctrinate public school students. The New Georgia Project created lessons railing against voter ID and any efforts to provide for better voter integrity. The group's CEO allowed her mask to slip last year when she said the group was focusing on Georgia voters, "who are the swingiest voters in our country," and trying to "turn them into super voters." Clearly, this means trying to turn high school students into loyal Democrats. Nationally, President Biden is targeting charter schools with a new rule that the amount of federal funding they can receive. This rule, if implemented, would likely cause many charter schools to close, according to former Department of Education Senior Counselor Robert Eitel. The administration is trying to enact these unnecessary regulations on an expedited timetable to satisfy their allies in teachers' unions. He’s citing a phony internal poll that gives him a meager 1-point edge, compared to the 13-point LEAD that President Trump’s trusted pollster gave us in this must-win Senate race. With the first FEC deadline of the election year now in the rearview, it’s imperative that we take stock of where we stand in the race and PROVE our lead against our RINO opponent. Which is why I immediately instructed my team to commission our own flash poll to set the record straight. Official U.S. Senate Flash Poll Participant: Peter Willis Submission Status: [PENDING] Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: “How Joe Manchin Aided Coal, and Earned Millions”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, a new
report in the New York Times details how Joe Manchin has used his power to
profit from the fossil fuel industry.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/101969?refcode=em20220404-22712&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=22712%2E1203867%2EsY8050 ]NY headline that reads How Joe Manchin aided coal and earned millions.
Mr Mancjin's ties to the Gratn Town plant date to 1987 when he had been
elected to the West Virginia Senate, a part time job with...

One of the fundamental problems with Congress is that far too many
lawmakers are there to pad their bank accounts and do the bidding of
America’s largest corporations. Justice Democrats is trying to change
that. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/101969?refcode=em20220404-22712&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=22712%2E1203867%2EsY8050 ]Chip in right now to support bold, progressive change in Congress
»

We’re working to elect more progressives who will join the Squad in
Congress to transform a Democratic establishment that continues its
support for elected officials like Manchin. If we have representatives
personally profiting from the destruction of our planet, we don’t have a
government for the people.

Here’s just one snippet from the article: “As the pivotal vote in an
evenly split Senate, Mr. Manchin has blocked legislation that would speed
the country’s transition to wind, solar and other clean energy and away
from coal, oil and gas, the burning of which is dangerously heating the
planet.”

Manchin’s situation is a clear conflict of interest and it’s preventing us
from dealing with an existential threat to the planet. But it’s not just
Joe Manchin blocking critical legislation to address the climate crisis,
it’s a slew of other corporate Democrats funded by the fossil fuel
industry and Wall Street giants that make money from Big Oil.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/101969?refcode=em20220404-22712&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=22712%2E1203867%2EsY8050 ]We’re doing everything we can to advocate for swift, transformative
action to address the climate crisis. And we’re electing more progressives
to Congress who will lead this fight. Can you chip in $3 to
fuel our work to expand the Squad and take on Manchin’s wing of the party?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/101969?refcode=em20220404-22712&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=22712%2E1203867%2EsY8050 ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=22712%2E1203867%2EsY8050 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=22712%2E1203867%2EsY8050 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220404-22712-footer&t=1026&refcode2=22712_1203867_sY8050&akid=22712%2E1203867%2EsY8050

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=22712%2E1203867%2EsY8050

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: The Heritage Foundation
subject: Our most cherished document
body:
As a conservative, you know and feel the pressure being put on you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the radical
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjhi32vs24fm963ofmt0gcfno43ncltpu1v5g0so_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg66o34clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65shkchhb0oj7miojeoj4spim0p3lchr64c5gmpoe5dr1m9gn1o5lcmqm7dlkspjrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup32pjgmspm6ptmc5j33c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoshdlvrk9fvp5t8ggiuncisvkcp7jao08u0ke68_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg66o34clh2bs)
---
Hello, As a conservative, you know and feel the pressure being put on you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the radical Left. You know that fighting back for what you believe in is the best thing to do. In these trying times, we conservatives must turn to the greatest document in the history of the world that promises freedom and opportunity to its citizens for guidance, **our Constitution.** That’s why I’m writing personally to you today. I’d like to offer you the chance to gain [**free access to Heritage’s Guide to the Constitution today to help you defend your principles against those on the far left.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3ljokn07ctucqt54ctod281fisp3ple68q99h80_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg66o34clh2bs)
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg1jv1k1ea302vp2ppce71faa8sci54olncni248_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg66o34clh2bs)
---
In this free digital interactive guide, you'll find:
* **Useful, clause-by-clause analysis** of the entire Constitution and each amendment
* Input from more than **100 constitutional scholars and legal experts** including President Reagan's former Attorney General Ed Meese
* **A thorough review** of what the Constitution actually says and how it applies today
* **A copy of the Constitution** and the documents that served as its foundation

This is a critical year in our nation’s history. The country is polarized and divided on a great number of issues, and roughly half of the voting population is being swayed towards greater government control over our lives through the trojan horse of “COVID safety. They want government control of anything they can get their hands on. It is for this reason we need to educate as many people as possible, of all age groups, on the freedoms safeguarded to us in the Constitution. Because if we don’t truly understand the freedoms that it protects for us as citizens, then we will not fight to defend those freedoms. To get your free access today and to help us make sure that everyone in the conservative movement has refreshed their understanding of the Constitution this year, will you activate your free access by [**clicking this link today**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv00vmtl207teoripen9bkdkerjh5sv3eac9ceog_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg66o34clh2bs)? If so, please use this link to activate your access to the guide today: [**https://secured.heritage.org/constitution/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd445kl2fmvo1o1mie2me5fdd1vtgihoa6t5t7ig_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg66o34clh2bs) This resource has been hailed across the nation as an "outstanding Guide," which is why I consider it one of the finest resources Heritage has ever produced. I think you'll enjoy reading it, and I know you'll find use for it each day. With this powerful Guide in hand, you'll be ready to stand up to the radical Left and confidently defend the vision of our Founding Fathers. [**I hope you'll claim your copy today.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs2evnp883s405hetv8j27cqu5oblgj1fppckun0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg66o34clh2bs) Thank you, Dr. Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zftp9ue49m7l51mul6gihbiavo7d991r3pe2hl6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg66o34clh2bs)
---
The Heritage Foundation | 214 Massachusetts Avenue, NE | Washington, D.C. 20002
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Ohio's open Senate seat isn’t for sale

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3095%2E3611125%2EWjZnA1 ][IMG]

Folks,

I’ll cut right to the chase:

Tim Ryan is not only a champion for working families, but he’s also the
Democrats’ best chance of holding onto—and expanding—our Senate majority.

Tim tells me he's running behind on his fundraising this month and
catching up is crucial to keeping his campaign’s momentum. But, unlike his
millionaire opponents, he can’t write himself a blank check. He’s counting
on you, folks.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10244?t=1008&amount=25&akid=3095%2E3611125%2EWjZnA1 ]Will you chip in
$25 to help
Tim’s campaign so this Ohio Senate seat isn’t sold off to the highest
bidder?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10244?t=1009&amount=25&akid=3095%2E3611125%2EWjZnA1 ]Donate
$25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10244?t=1010&amount=25&akid=3095%2E3611125%2EWjZnA1 ]Other Amount

Whether it’s Peter Thiel or any of the ultra-rich backers pouring money
into this race, it’s clear that millionaires and billionaires are trying
to put their thumbs on the scales to buy this seat.

I’ve faced down Republican millionaires in Senate races before, and with
you by his side, Tim is ready to do the same.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10244?t=1011&amount=25&akid=3095%2E3611125%2EWjZnA1 ]Tim will go to bat for Ohio in the Senate, but he needs your help. Can

name: Josh Riley
subject: personally thanking you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
I want to personally thank you for everything you’ve done for our campaign.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43767958/338614343/-1015964469?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220404-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTg0NTc4NC0zY2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ilISY3Vz8o3yBl28se3QLU0zsjqbHOg2LKR_yOmLOTA=)
---
| Peter,

This email is brief, but it’s really important. I want to personally thank you for everything you’ve done for our campaign.

Because of grassroots supporters like you, we finished our first quarter of the year on a strong note, not only meeting but actually surpassing our goals.

In March, we had an outpour of grassroots donor support, and thousands of voters signed our petition to get on the ballot. I can’t wait to share more with you about both of these efforts, so stay tuned.

We have a lot of work to do before Election Day, and we’re putting in the effort every day to build the broad coalition that will win this race.

And, Peter, with you on our team, I know that we will get the job done, win this election, and put the voices of working families across Upstate New York front and center at the table in Congress.

So again, thank you for all that you do. I am excited for the road ahead, and I’m so thankful that you’re a part of it.

With gratitude & high hopes,

Josh Riley
---

name: Henk Conn
subject: Green Party's Henk Conn and Veronika Fimbers chat about being political candidates!

| | Candidate for Insurance Commissioner and endorsed Green Party Member Veronika Fimbres joins me for a chat about getting on the June 7th ballot. This (shorter) 15 minute video covers a lot of area and encapsulates the hurdle that is now in our past! See these two candidates who are set in doing good. As it makes sense, Veronika's key platform promise is to bring Single-Payer medical insurance to the state of California. And I am sure she can do it! Both Veronika and myself are now formally on the California Ballot. Please click [here](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f8N-raSRw/c?w=o71A5WgxWh2XyPoANRVwooqVKFCK-IPl1dcLxocxDeE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9lbGVjdGlvbnMuY2RuLnNvcy5jYS5nb3Yvc3RhdGV3aWRlLWVsZWN0aW9ucy8yMDIyLXByaW1hcnkvY2VydC1saXN0LnBkZiIsInIiOiI2ZmRiZmFkZC03YzhjLTQyMzAtOTY2OS0yZDk2ZTIzODA2Y2IiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI2ZTM0Yjg4ZC00MzI5LTQzMDctYjQzZi01Yjg1ZDUzY2UyNWEifQ) for the Secretary Of State's certified list of candidates. Again thank you sincerely to all those who donated to help pay the ballot filing fees and for us to pay for a ballot statement on the 2022 Voter Information Guide. Go Green Party! I stand by my platform that our working poor are, economically, precariously placed and most likely are set to see historically hard times in the years to come. The environment is on the precipice to endure events unlike anything humans have witnessed. We must act. We must be prepared. Unlike anytime before. I believe now is the time for the Green Party to make a difference. Thank your for your support!Sincerely,Henk Conn

body:
Be a guest of Amanda's at the debate this Wednesday at 6:30 p.m. | | | |

| Hi Friend!

It's mega momentum Monday here at Team Makki! We're gearing up for another exciting week on the campaign trail. Amanda had a tremendous turnout at Ferg's on Thursday to celebrate being the first and only candidate on the FL-13 ballot (see article below), as well as the FIRST Republican Female in Florida to qualify for Congress, and an awesome Free Self-Defense class on Saturday. Now, she’s ready to WIN the first FL-13 Republican Debate! Your support matters more now than ever.

**Tell Amanda you're with her as she fights for our conservative values!**

---
| [Chip in $20](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=6b0f2a4400&e=c2296cffff "Chip in $20")
---
| [Chip in $50](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=ddd82a24d6&e=c2296cffff "Chip in $50")

---
| | | | _**Amanda would love to have you in the audience**_ as she takes on the other Republicans running for FL-13 and shows everyone why she is the BEST candidate to WIN in November and flip Charlie Crist's open seat RED!

**Florida District 13 Congressional Republican Debate
Abundant Life Ministries Church
[1550 S. Belcher Rd.
Largo, FL 33771
Wednesday, April 6th
6:30 p.m.](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=7357ea323a&e=c2296cffff)**

[Reserve your tickets now!](mailto:info@amandamakki.com?subject=Debate%20Tickets&body=Please%20include%20your%20name%2C%20email%2C%20address%2C%20and%20phone%20number%20for%20ticket%20confirmation.%20Thank%20you!)

The debate comes just days after voters made Amanda Makki the first candidate in FL-13 to qualify by petition and the first female Republican for Congress to qualify in Florida! [Did you see the article in Florida Politics? Check it out here. ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=2bed6c298b&e=c2296cffff)

Amanda thanked all of her supporters, volunteers, and voters in a statement:

**“Voters are sending a clear message that they want a community conservative in Congress. While my opponents focus on their exclusive high dollar fundraising events, I’ve held more than 27 widely attended ‘Meet and Greets’ that are open to everyone in the community,” said Makki.**

“I’ve always made it a point to attend every major event from Country in the Park in Pinellas Park, to King of the Beach in Madeira Beach, to the John’s Pass Seafood Festival, and Seminole Pow Wow, just to name a few.”

**“I will not be outworked and I will always be available to the constituents of this district,” Makki continued. “I’m grateful to the voters who have rewarded me with this honor to be first on the ballot.”**

We look forward to seeing you at the debate and at more events along the campaign trail!

Team Makki

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: “I try not to be selfish with the money I raise”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Crenshaw for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| Peter-
Because of the financial support of patriots like you, I've been able to build one of the strongest political campaigns in the country. And people are starting to take notice.
The Houston Chronicle is out this morning with a report on all our hard work. You can scroll down to read the full article. It highlights how we're the #3 biggest fundraiser in the U.S. House - only behind Leader McCarthy and Nancy Pelosi.
The report also details how we are not letting the money sit idly in our campaign coffers. We put your resources to immediate use by supporting strong conservative candidates in swing districts across the country.
And it highlights how we're growing the next generation of the conservative movement with big events like my annual youth summit. Your financial support allowed thousands of high school and college students from across America to spend two days in Houston with thought leaders and legends like Ben Shapiro, Tony Robbins, and Megyn Kelly.
I try to spend as little time as possible on fundraising, but it's necessary and I am successful because people like you know that your money isn't just sitting in a "war chest." Your money is going out the door to help Republicans take back the majority and help build a strong, governing conservative movement.
The vast majority of my days are spent crafting legislation, messaging on conservative policies to an audience of millions, and supporting Republican candidates who have the best chance to win in November.
In short, I try to be the congressman that attracts donations because of my actions and the success of my efforts legislatively and politically. It's effective. Hundreds of thousands of donors have stepped up to help. Most of these are small donations.
[And I could not be more grateful to patriots like you who are willing to donate.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_eobnTkhQcOYuF9EaWN2709-iv6pOYuaYw92L6HL9TuQskLvF71KDzQ3aZSJ4tvPphdiry7loMHwCNvXdcY3BhrN6cnfpebRnwBR54gAZx4mPylcAZET1FvcfbgXSaC7XBXMQD-UEO_O6N4AZJW4LwHkSI3yb5J9-tToBwd8rS-_iu_KrC3dRfQwzdwd9T1U2zW5R4_JTF7AEDGQ51n4yYLSks3fKZo5Moui7S6v0-LAqm0_X9oLEWicQE3iu8RVNuhAqAs1scaNX44i2Ed0IlNVQrnw_1Dbt-WBhb_fhUN6DPB69Hc3Sl79HRjenzgB4dvcQhAQ-WIHtMTK1KzBeejFcdxBhACa&c=tJ3MODjijyZMDAfvopg_DYs4M3mB2ua0pN15RFwbUCC51TMKhLOWKA==&ch=op-Dqrro2aGnD-NMBL1MfR1s1nfNJHEu7rFshfr-7yCuRD8sFxNBgg==)
Without you, none of this is possible.
In Service,
---
|
---
| Dan Crenshaw

---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_eobnTkhQcOYuF9EaWN2709-iv6pOYuaYw92L6HL9TuQskLvF71KDzQ3aZSJ4tvPphdiry7loMHwCNvXdcY3BhrN6cnfpebRnwBR54gAZx4mPylcAZET1FvcfbgXSaC7XBXMQD-UEO_O6N4AZJW4LwHkSI3yb5J9-tToBwd8rS-_iu_KrC3dRfQwzdwd9T1U2zW5R4_JTF7AEDGQ51n4yYLSks3fKZo5Moui7S6v0-LAqm0_X9oLEWicQE3iu8RVNuhAqAs1scaNX44i2Ed0IlNVQrnw_1Dbt-WBhb_fhUN6DPB69Hc3Sl79HRjenzgB4dvcQhAQ-WKL13lqsTSVmjm5pub7kXN_&c=tJ3MODjijyZMDAfvopg_DYs4M3mB2ua0pN15RFwbUCC51TMKhLOWKA==&ch=op-Dqrro2aGnD-NMBL1MfR1s1nfNJHEu7rFshfr-7yCuRD8sFxNBgg==)
---
| | |
---
|
Raising $11M since 2021, Dan Crenshaw has become one of the biggest fundraisers on Capitol Hill Jeremy Wallace, Houston Chronicle
---
| Houston's Dan Crenshaw has become one of the biggest fundraisers on Capitol Hill, deepening his influence in the halls of Congress and making him a formidable statewide candidate if he ever chose to run for higher office in Texas.
Crenshaw has raised nearly $11 million for his re-election campaign since the start of 2021 -- the 3rd highest total of the 435 members of the U.S. House. Only House Speaker Nancy Pelosi and Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy have raised more, according to Federal Election Commission records.
No other member of the U.S. House from Texas ranks within the top 40 fundraisers, and more is coming for Crenshaw.
He continues to blast fundraising appeals to his supporters, pledging to help elect more Republicans to Congress to take control from House Speaker Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats.
"This is the most important midterm election of our lifetimes -- and Dan Crenshaw will not let your contributions go to waste," one recent letter says.
Crenshaw, a 38-year-old retired Navy SEAL, has built a national fundraising platform starting shortly after he was elected in 2018, when he was lampooned on Saturday Night Live by comic Pete Davidson, who made fun of his eye patch. Crenshaw lost use of his right eye in a 2012 bomb blast in Afghanistan that nearly killed him.
The resulting media coverage -- and a Crenshaw appearance on SNL after Davidson apologized -- helped build the then-freshman's national profile. Nearly $1 million of his donations since 2021 have come from California, New York or Florida, according to FEC records.
Thanks to partisan redistricting Crenshaw, who is seeking a third term in the House this year, doesn't really need the money for his own re-election.
Top leadership fund contributor
After a closer than expected 2020 re-election victory, the Texas Legislature redrew his district, removing tens of thousands of voters just west of downtown Houston and replaced with 380,000 Montgomery County residents to make it a rock-solid GOP stronghold.
Crenshaw does have opposition in November. Democratic activist Robin Fulford of The Woodlands, is trying to unseat Crenshaw. She has raised just over $60,000 for the race so far.
That has freed Crenshaw to send hundreds of thousands of dollars to other campaigns, local Republican groups and political causes. Crenshaw, who runs a political action committee called America Reloaded, has doled out more than $200,000 to 42 candidates in 17 states. That has included helping U.S. Senate and House candidates, Texas House candidates, county judge candidates and school board members.
While some members of Congress sit on their fundraising haul to project political power, Crenshaw says he is constantly spending as part of a mission he said to try to grow the party, not just in Congress, but beyond.
"I try not to be selfish with the money I raise," Crenshaw said. "I spend my time and resources helping quality Republicans keep their seats or flip Democrat seats across the country."
The splashiest example of that is a series of movie-trailer-like videos he's released over the last few years where he plays the part of a military leader recruiting a band of GOP soldiers to get into Congress. In 2020, that brought publicity and dollars to candidates including U.S. Reps. Tony Gonzales, R-San Antonio, and Beth Van Duyne, R-Irving. A spinoff ad in Georgia helped two incumbent U.S. Senate candidates who would go on to lose their runoff elections, solidifying the Democrat's majority in Congress.
This year, he's revived the reloaded theme, with new videos that have helped Republicans Wesley Hunt and Morgan Luttrell win their congressional primaries in Harris and Montgomery counties.
But it's not just Texas. Crenshaw is sending the maximum allowable $5,000 donation into races in places like California, Illinois and Minnesota, plus has poured $100,000 into the Congressional Leadership Fund, which targets dozens of seats to grow the GOP ranks in Congress. No member of Congress has given more to the Congressional Leadership Fund than Crenshaw.
Crenshaw has also spent more than $400,000 to put on an annual Youth Summit in Houston aimed at building connections with younger GOP voters.
'Best way to move up'
There is more to what Crenshaw is doing than just being charitable, said Brandon Rottinghaus, a University of Houston political science professor.
By involving himself in other races, he's building good will with other future members and alliances on Capitol Hill that can help him pass legislation, secure committee positions and grow his role in leadership in the House.
"The best way to move up in leadership in Congress is to be a hub for political funds," Rottinghaus said.
The only Republican doing more than Crenshaw on that front is McCarthy, who has raised $13 million since the start of 2021 and is trying to line up support to be the Speaker of the House next year if Republicans regain control of the House. McCarthy has been the top fundraiser among U.S. House members. Pelosi has raised just over $12 million.
Rottinghaus said Crenshaw's spending and ability to raise millions of dollars, even when he doesn't have a competitive re-election, is only fueling his options to run for higher office someday. Raising $11 million in just over a year already would make him a serious contender to run for the U.S. Senate if a seat opens up. Some have talked about Crenshaw as a presidential contender.
At his youth summit in September, a member of the audience asked him about running for president or governor someday.
"I don't know, you know, but to answer that honestly, always will keep options open," Crenshaw said.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Peter- Because of the financial support of patriots like you, I've been able to build one of the strongest political campaigns in the country. And people are starting to take notice. The Houston Chronicle is out this morning with a report on all our hard work. You can scroll down to read the full article. It highlights how we're the #3 biggest fundraiser in the U.S. House - only behind Leader McCarthy and Nancy Pelosi. The report also details how we are not letting the money sit idly in our campaign coffers. We put your resources to immediate use by supporting strong conservative candidates in swing districts across the country. And it highlights how we're growing the next generation of the conservative movement with big events like my annual youth summit. Your financial support allowed thousands of high school and college students from across America to spend two days in Houston with thought leaders and legends like Ben Shapiro, Tony Robbins, and Megyn Kelly. I try to spend as little time as possible on fundraising, but it's necessary and I am successful because people like you know that your money isn't just sitting in a "war chest." Your money is going out the door to help Republicans take back the majority and help build a strong, governing conservative movement. The vast majority of my days are spent crafting legislation, messaging on conservative policies to an audience of millions, and supporting Republican candidates who have the best chance to win in November. In short, I try to be the congressman that attracts donations because of my actions and the success of my efforts legislatively and politically. It's effective. Hundreds of thousands of donors have stepped up to help. Most of these are small donations. == Without you, none of this is possible. In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | == | | | | Raising $11M since 2021, Dan Crenshaw has become one of the biggest fundraisers on Capitol Hill Jeremy Wallace, Houston Chronicle | Houston's Dan Crenshaw has become one of the biggest fundraisers on Capitol Hill, deepening his influence in the halls of Congress and making him a formidable statewide candidate if he ever chose to run for higher office in Texas. Crenshaw has raised nearly $11 million for his re-election campaign since the start of 2021 -- the 3rd highest total of the 435 members of the U.S. House. Only House Speaker Nancy Pelosi and Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy have raised more, according to Federal Election Commission records. No other member of the U.S. House from Texas ranks within the top 40 fundraisers, and more is coming for Crenshaw. He continues to blast fundraising appeals to his supporters, pledging to help elect more Republicans to Congress to take control from House Speaker Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats. "This is the most important midterm election of our lifetimes -- and Dan Crenshaw will not let your contributions go to waste," one recent letter says. Crenshaw, a 38-year-old retired Navy SEAL, has built a national fundraising platform starting shortly after he was elected in 2018, when he was lampooned on Saturday Night Live by comic Pete Davidson, who made fun of his eye patch. Crenshaw lost use of his right eye in a 2012 bomb blast in Afghanistan that nearly killed him. The resulting media coverage -- and a Crenshaw appearance on SNL after Davidson apologized -- helped build the then-freshman's national profile. Nearly $1 million of his donations since 2021 have come from California, New York or Florida, according to FEC records. Thanks to partisan redistricting Crenshaw, who is seeking a third term in the House this year, doesn't really need the money for his own re-election. Top leadership fund contributor After a closer than expected 2020 re-election victory, the Texas Legislature redrew his district, removing tens of thousands of voters just west of downtown Houston and replaced with 380,000 Montgomery County residents to make it a rock-solid GOP stronghold. Crenshaw does have opposition in November. Democratic activist Robin Fulford of The Woodlands, is trying to unseat Crenshaw. She has raised just over $60,000 for the race so far. That has freed Crenshaw to send hundreds of thousands of dollars to other campaigns, local Republican groups and political causes. Crenshaw, who runs a political action committee called America Reloaded, has doled out more than $200,000 to 42 candidates in 17 states. That has included helping U.S. Senate and House candidates, Texas House candidates, county judge candidates and school board members. While some members of Congress sit on their fundraising haul to project political power, Crenshaw says he is constantly spending as part of a mission he said to try to grow the party, not just in Congress, but beyond. "I try not to be selfish with the money I raise," Crenshaw said. "I spend my time and resources helping quality Republicans keep their seats or flip Democrat seats across the country." The splashiest example of that is a series of movie-trailer-like videos he's released over the last few years where he plays the part of a military leader recruiting a band of GOP soldiers to get into Congress. In 2020, that brought publicity and dollars to candidates including U.S. Reps. Tony Gonzales, R-San Antonio, and Beth Van Duyne, R-Irving. A spinoff ad in Georgia helped two incumbent U.S. Senate candidates who would go on to lose their runoff elections, solidifying the Democrat's majority in Congress. This year, he's revived the reloaded theme, with new videos that have helped Republicans Wesley Hunt and Morgan Luttrell win their congressional primaries in Harris and Montgomery counties. But it's not just Texas. Crenshaw is sending the maximum allowable $5,000 donation into races in places like California, Illinois and Minnesota, plus has poured $100,000 into the Congressional Leadership Fund, which targets dozens of seats to grow the GOP ranks in Congress. No member of Congress has given more to the Congressional Leadership Fund than Crenshaw. Crenshaw has also spent more than $400,000 to put on an annual Youth Summit in Houston aimed at building connections with younger GOP voters. 'Best way to move up' There is more to what Crenshaw is doing than just being charitable, said Brandon Rottinghaus, a University of Houston political science professor. By involving himself in other races, he's building good will with other future members and alliances on Capitol Hill that can help him pass legislation, secure committee positions and grow his role in leadership in the House. "The best way to move up in leadership in Congress is to be a hub for political funds," Rottinghaus said. The only Republican doing more than Crenshaw on that front is McCarthy, who has raised $13 million since the start of 2021 and is trying to line up support to be the Speaker of the House next year if Republicans regain control of the House. McCarthy has been the top fundraiser among U.S. House members. Pelosi has raised just over $12 million. Rottinghaus said Crenshaw's spending and ability to raise millions of dollars, even when he doesn't have a competitive re-election, is only fueling his options to run for higher office someday. Raising $11 million in just over a year already would make him a serious contender to run for the U.S. Senate if a seat opens up. Some have talked about Crenshaw as a presidential contender. At his youth summit in September, a member of the audience asked him about running for president or governor someday. "I don't know, you know, but to answer that honestly, always will keep options open," Crenshaw said. | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Dan Crenshaw for Congress | | Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

| |

| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**April 4, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# ICYMI: Bill McSwain at PLC
_McSwain tied for first place in Pennsylvania Leadership Conference straw poll _ **West Chester, Pa.** **\-- ** Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, distinguished himself among a field of 9 represented gubernatorial candidates on Friday, tying for first place in the Pennsylvania Leadership Conference straw poll. Straw poll respondents represented over 65% of Pennsylvania’s counties, indicating significant grassroots support for McSwain and reflecting his growing momentum with Republican voters across the Commonwealth.

Ahead of the straw poll, McSwain participated in the PLC Governor's Forum and emphasized the importance of nominating a conservative outsider who can beat Josh Shapiro in November:
---
| [ ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=ae0dbc6f4b&e=b1ec95759b)
---
|
---
| McSwain explained that he will bring the mission-oriented mindset of a U.S. Marine to the Governor's office, and reaffirmed his commitment to school choice, law and order, election integrity, energy independence, and reducing red tape so that businesses, our economy, and Pennsylvanian families can thrive:
---
| [ ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=5bfeb1f2e6&e=b1ec95759b)
---
|
---
| McSwain also emphasized that he is the only candidate with law enforcement experience, and promised to restore law and order as Governor:
---
|
---
| [ ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=a346b55660&e=b1ec95759b)
---
|
---
| Want to learn more or volunteer? [Join the team here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=38388f5ae7&e=b1ec95759b)
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **

Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=1e7255ec42&e=b1ec95759b)
###

Hello, As a conservative, you know and feel the pressure being put on you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the radical Left. You know that fighting back for what you believe in is the best thing to do. In these trying times, we conservatives must turn to the greatest document in the history of the world that promises freedom and opportunity to its citizens for guidance, **our Constitution.** That’s why I’m writing personally to you today. I’d like to offer you the chance to gain [**free access to Heritage’s Guide to the Constitution today to help you defend your principles against those on the far left.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zu6e5u5aig5ilupla3ob79nfkofhrc35nqq7j52o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg6eo74clh2bs)

In this free digital interactive guide, you'll find:
* **Useful, clause-by-clause analysis** of the entire Constitution and each amendment
* Input from more than **100 constitutional scholars and legal experts** including President Reagan's former Attorney General Ed Meese
* **A thorough review** of what the Constitution actually says and how it applies today
* **A copy of the Constitution** and the documents that served as its foundation

This is a critical year in our nation’s history. The country is polarized and divided on a great number of issues, and roughly half of the voting population is being swayed towards greater government control over our lives through the trojan horse of “COVID safety. They want government control of anything they can get their hands on. It is for this reason we need to educate as many people as possible, of all age groups, on the freedoms safeguarded to us in the Constitution. Because if we don’t truly understand the freedoms that it protects for us as citizens, then we will not fight to defend those freedoms. To get your free access today and to help us make sure that everyone in the conservative movement has refreshed their understanding of the Constitution this year, will you activate your free access by [**clicking this link today**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ziigfo53ji2pv2ng7h1lscfjj12hkvbh5fcfqrto_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg6eo74clh2bs)? I think you'll enjoy reading it, and I know you'll find use for it each day. With this powerful Guide in hand, you'll be ready to stand up to the radical Left and confidently defend the vision of our Founding Fathers. [**I hope you'll claim your copy today.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zc4ibkd09ltuhs1luobarqpsuojcu3ts8s1b3fjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg6eo74clh2bs) Thank you, Dr. Kevin D. clean_body: As a conservative, you know and feel the pressure being put on you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the radical | | | Hello, As a conservative, you know and feel the pressure being put on you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the radical Left. You know that fighting back for what you believe in is the best thing to do. In these trying times, we conservatives must turn to the greatest document in the history of the world that promises freedom and opportunity to its citizens for guidance, our Constitution. That’s why I’m writing personally to you today. I’d like to offer you the chance to gain In this free digital interactive guide, you'll find: Useful, clause-by-clause analysis of the entire Constitution and each amendment Input from more than 100 constitutional scholars and legal experts including President Reagan's former Attorney General Ed Meese A thorough review of what the Constitution actually says and how it applies today A copy of the Constitution and the documents that served as its foundation This is a critical year in our nation’s history. The country is polarized and divided on a great number of issues, and roughly half of the voting population is being swayed towards greater government control over our lives through the trojan horse of “COVID safety. They want government control of anything they can get their hands on. It is for this reason we need to educate as many people as possible, of all age groups, on the freedoms safeguarded to us in the Constitution. Because if we don’t truly understand the freedoms that it protects for us as citizens, then we will not fight to defend those freedoms. To get your free access today and to help us make sure that everyone in the conservative movement has refreshed their understanding of the Constitution this year, will you activate your free access by ? If so, please use this link to activate your access to the guide today: This resource has been hailed across the nation as an "outstanding Guide," which is why I consider it one of the finest resources Heritage has ever produced. I think you'll enjoy reading it, and I know you'll find use for it each day. With this powerful Guide in hand, you'll be ready to stand up to the radical Left and confidently defend the vision of our Founding Fathers. Thank you, Dr. Kevin D. name: Emily Seidel
subject: The government is trying to take over your healthcare
body:
URGENT: Congress is considering price controls on prescription drugs representing a dangerous government takeover of your medici
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsb9sldavn35ec9d3mk4f1r8d0gi57bjmjdomceg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg6eo74cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf0s3nmlj3ed35cuqr5dtgcmom0tb4slojacph66qr2p3k65r78ctjmar68ddj61jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8omcs5n6dijfdr1cooj1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztnihfi1ng0dr1dopu7ia32regrnpck984b5dr1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg6eo74cdh2bs)
---
**URGENT: Congress is considering price controls on prescription drugs representing a dangerous government takeover of your medicine cabinet.** When it comes to prescription drugs, we all want affordability. But lower prices are meaningless if people can’t get the drugs they need in the first place. Unfortunately, Washington is looking to enact a government takeover of prescription drugs that will lead to drug rationing and leave you with less access to the drugs you need the most. We need to know where you stand, Friend:
---
**SHOULD THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT DICTATE THE PRICE OF LIFESAVING PRESCRIPTION DRUGS?**
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrbmuf2e41vvfkc6e0c9ai2ath78quvr2720d8ug_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg6eo74cdh2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpiv7qjf1kvnoubk2dk2uav31echlpkgan09m79o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg6eo74cdh2bs)
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5l4f8qb8dmbkeeeqe8imnvedao8gpjj4qjtqju0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg6eo74cdh2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg615ecl864d2mg7k7kdcmrki2ir0svkh7i2tlq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg6eo74cdh2bs)
---
| | _Please submit your response to represent your area by midnight tonight._
---
**Friend: If you do not believe the government should control the price of prescription drugs, then you must make your voice heard. ** The pandemic has shown that the way to get Americans more and quicker access to life-saving drugs and treatments is to get the government out of the way. Innovation is driven by competition and free markets, not the government. This is a lesson Washington always forgets. The federal government has repeatedly fumbled important healthcare issues:
* Despite $83 BILLION in funding for COVID-19 testing, the government failed for almost a year to give Americans access to affordable rapid test on demand
* 1 out of every 5 Medicaid dollars was misspent by Washington over the last two years costing taxpayers $143 billion
* Obamacare has increased the average health insurance premium by over 130%. Healthcare price controls enacted by Obamacare are the reasons premiums are high and access to doctors is shrinking.

A government takeover of our medicine cabinets is a prescription for disaster. This is why we have launched a petition to force your elected officials to vote against any consideration of drug pricing controls. But we need 100,000 signatures to make them think twice about ignoring your demands. **You can make your voice heard here:[https://americansforprosperity.org/drug-pricing-petition](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvg0s0gqlbgh6mnsi8aakq7afindepdhfki22afg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg6eo74cdh2bs)** We think enough is enough, but we need to know where top supporters like you stand, friend. That’s why we’re conducting a 1-question survey for readers in your area by midnight tonight.
---
**SHOULD THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT DICTATE THE PRICE OF LIFESAVING PRESCRIPTION DRUGS?**
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9r3kch6hqdq9j3l9nf5mlkueqishvi2cupmq4s0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg6eo74cdh2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmk3kblvikhbuv29uhm4r7ra6a50mgt2ud6qa9u0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg6eo74cdh2bs)
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9i1ul72av3ps8evfva4s88co8i7s8tg86860nko_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg6eo74cdh2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1tepbvlnbtsu8phqc8v37g1rcnh8haolcbdgi7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg6eo74cdh2bs)
---
| | Please take the 1-question survey right now and sign the open letter to lend your voice to the effort to stop a dangerous government takeover of your medicine cabinet now. Thank you for all you do, —Emily Emily Seidel
President and CEO, Americans for Prosperity
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsag3l5e4u0vr9h1o91esqsmu8f91a7bdi2d4pj0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shg6eo74cdh2bs)
---
Americans for Prosperity 1310 N Courthouse Road Suite 700 Arlington Virginia 22201 United States
This email was sent by Americans for Prosperity.
---

name: Team Franchot
subject: Please join us for an exciting Campaign Rally!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Hi Peter,
We’re reaching out to make sure that you heard about our upcoming Campaign Rally in Fort Washington on Saturday, April 23. Peter and Monique are excited to spend the afternoon sharing their bold vision for the future of Maryland with voters, and we hope that you’ll be able to join us!
We have an opportunity to redefine the possibility of state government this year. With your help, we can elect a Governor who will expand affordable healthcare, build a statewide mass transit system, help more Marylanders become homeowners, and so much more.
Click here to RSVP to join us for our Campaign Rally in Fort Washington. This is a FREE event, and everyone is invited! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ppo_YoIYkUKqmayznTxtXA2]
Thank you,
Team Franchot
https://secure.ngpvan.com/ppo_YoIYkUKqmayznTxtXA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ppo_YoIYkUKqmayznTxtXA2]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

name: Tony Vargas
subject: not asking for money;
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
I’m sincerely asking...

|
---

| | [**_I’m sincerely asking: will you add your name to endorse my campaign to flip this seat blue? If 1,000 supporters sign on, I’ll show everyone that I have the momentum to win this important race for Democrats. But if I miss my goal, it’ll be that much harder to get my campaign off the ground. Can I count on your endorsement at this pivotal moment? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43768953/338619087/958816626?source=20220404_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2I5NGMwZi00MWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AIF-z-tLQ1MJA8Zxq0mmutYJYK3TY5BaxEw-suunwno=&emci=05a346cb-ecb1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=17b94c0f-41b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=19927889) I made it through my first End of Quarter Deadline of the election year. But now, more than anything, I need your personal endorsement. [**_If you already have my back, you can go ahead and sign your name here. >>_ If you’re not sure yet, please give me a chance to earn your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43768954/338619088/958816626?source=20220404_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2I5NGMwZi00MWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AIF-z-tLQ1MJA8Zxq0mmutYJYK3TY5BaxEw-suunwno=&emci=05a346cb-ecb1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=17b94c0f-41b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=19927889)

Here’s what you need to know about me: I’m the proud son of union workers, a State Senator, former science teacher, and a Dad. I grew up in a working class family. My parents immigrated here in hopes of creating a good life for me and my brothers. It wasn’t easy -- we faced housing instability and lived paycheck to paycheck. But they believed in the American Dream, never gave up, and their hard work paid off.

[**_All of our families deserve a fighting chance at a good life. But my Republican opponent, Congressman Don Bacon, doesn’t have our backs -- he voted to cut taxes for the wealthy and left working class folks in the dust. I’m running for Congress to be the champion hardworking folks deserve, but this is going to be a close race. I need 1,000 endorsements today to prove I have the support of voters, so will you add your name now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43768956/338619089/958816626?source=20220404_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2I5NGMwZi00MWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AIF-z-tLQ1MJA8Zxq0mmutYJYK3TY5BaxEw-suunwno=&emci=05a346cb-ecb1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=17b94c0f-41b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=19927889) | | [Endorse Tony!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43768958/338619091/958816626?source=20220404_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2I5NGMwZi00MWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AIF-z-tLQ1MJA8Zxq0mmutYJYK3TY5BaxEw-suunwno=&emci=05a346cb-ecb1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=17b94c0f-41b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=19927889)
---
I’ll be honest: winning this race is going to take everything we’ve got.
Endorsements like yours will help me get a running start to lift my grassroots campaign off the ground.
I promise you this: I will have your back everyday in Congress.
[**_And right now I’m hoping you’ll have my back once more, with your endorsement. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43768959/338619092/958816626?source=20220404_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2I5NGMwZi00MWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AIF-z-tLQ1MJA8Zxq0mmutYJYK3TY5BaxEw-suunwno=&emci=05a346cb-ecb1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=17b94c0f-41b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=19927889)
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43768962/338619093/958816626?source=20220404_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2I5NGMwZi00MWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AIF-z-tLQ1MJA8Zxq0mmutYJYK3TY5BaxEw-suunwno=&emci=05a346cb-ecb1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=17b94c0f-41b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=19927889)

[**_Tony_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43768963/338619095/958816626?source=20220404_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2I5NGMwZi00MWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AIF-z-tLQ1MJA8Zxq0mmutYJYK3TY5BaxEw-suunwno=&emci=05a346cb-ecb1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=17b94c0f-41b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=19927889)

If 1,000 people join them and endorse me before midnight, it’ll be the largest wave of support my campaign has seen so far. I’d be honored to have your personal endorsement. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43768964/338619096/958816626?source=20220404_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2I5NGMwZi00MWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AIF-z-tLQ1MJA8Zxq0mmutYJYK3TY5BaxEw-suunwno=&emci=05a346cb-ecb1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=17b94c0f-41b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=19927889)

Here’s what you need to know about me: I’m the proud son of union workers, a State Senator, former science teacher, and a Dad. I grew up in a working class family. But they believed in the American Dream, never gave up, and their hard work paid off. | | I’ll be honest: winning this race is going to take everything we’ve got. body:
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=1c81ce1c3d21431991916d8f36be9e49&_m=a8c4176ce121403db7ea633cf9205c02&_e=K136gyKhp98blnllVqiuUzX19NIz6Hq1pXG8swrS3nyhF1NmhKiq55FZiLYX56fvJkzEa9I0kFOvI4KkYK2jhPvBq61rzd7_oYsQJ6TOVdjfk_dKAsrovaPsKd02ZnydSQ2mXJ0txnhzZUrOH6oquLk9Ogj63ws0_B6m4tzKM0F0zorqLAIKOSXKYvy1cSSLiXLiGlJgKqnpfE9aegEn35vL5U0CuWRdj8Oj2CY0nVLWR-X2H0jOoC6_iqvAHkqYR6ShQUhRRw0HRVawlhgWzFxFgbsh8wGlpjvb2_q_Gr_gakYuCOWuet1dAKGHUNtS) My friend, Early voting starts **tomorrow.** Our campaign has been working tirelessly to get Matt around the state and share his message of proven conservative leadership. Matt has been dominating debates, and our army of volunteers has been knocking on doors from Cleveland to Cincinnati. We are moving into the home stretch, and we have aggressive plans. This race is wide open, and Matt is climbing in the polls.
With early voting starting tomorrow, Matt needs your help more than ever. With your donation, we will fund our digital and GOTV efforts across Ohio. **[Will you support our efforts to spread our winning, solutions-focused message?](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=1c81ce1c3d21431991916d8f36be9e49&_m=a8c4176ce121403db7ea633cf9205c02&_e=K136gyKhp98blnllVqiuUzX19NIz6Hq1pXG8swrS3nyhF1NmhKiq55FZiLYX56fvJkzEa9I0kFOvI4KkYK2jhPvBq61rzd7_oYsQJ6TOVdif4VqfY8Ktax8_Z1yy3E2orqHw1zYNn2vS8GNdvPUHvPCPVVH6EFkP34BAwslMgkZ3FgKe1vXsv9D9Fn8EMJLDLMJPFDBdroEVS0CKaW2ak30m3tbNYghI1cSE9O-PDUORWddD81QRIWfoCR7glW6vYPA6WQs-QZrUdrGm2191DBewUXnG7obGeuHM-f7inbRUBqUn8VyhVKzvygKgFAIj)** Sincerely, Kathi Paroska _Campaign Manager_ _Dolan for Ohio_ [**< < Donate Now >>**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=1c81ce1c3d21431991916d8f36be9e49&_m=a8c4176ce121403db7ea633cf9205c02&_e=K136gyKhp98blnllVqiuUzX19NIz6Hq1pXG8swrS3nyhF1NmhKiq55FZiLYX56fvJkzEa9I0kFOvI4KkYK2jhPvBq61rzd7_oYsQJ6TOVdj6ZSmm9z0qNCKH7JKYOavaVAMXvj_M6t1aoNWn91xbBfiOOGj8PGJasXtJ8UjFgUeuxe7ZGyjAHehx-SpmnbNDfJmdhdIxJGIMboDJw0AXQYwE5vcxxcukyph6HvTJqJ_5ufKarekzEhS-nec1GUfmSYiA8ettXORopRajQqQvWsOxgXhWZJEBytUlr4SM4tezKB15hOaYzgv094bEUzff) P.S.
