name: Brian Burley
subject: Porter is Coming for Our Medical Freedoms
body:
Heck, it is not hard to imagine Porter pouncing on an opportunity to replace Joe Biden as President.
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WDskWVjbMAOMZ6sBDDvlhZqim8XQMu0DgeFYGugmMye34H8UISCwIXAOqB8pXEGIuu-DNXLQrADz25CHXwCo3KUqAxPfVN8WJPWEVRJVvorpsrYcBcsEhux9Da4qlRuSVWAt-fYq315TMgN_c3giP_EPLnvRdEYRwLZP1HztJxDHxTROz4-_cpOX7eieMJiKbfgAcOG2T6evt4uuImiZug==&c=WEk7h_qlFWxdipJXqgWJQqe1HU2BNkb_bQDmMZ6FVrJi7O-4Z4qIfg==&ch=GV4UwYyYC48Y2JdpfLmUd3iszN0UGEyytDQOg8UZUYV4s3cd68PDAw==)
---
---
| Just last week my opponent Katie Porter was ranting in Congress about how we need to abolish private health insurance. It was already public knowledge that Porter thinks hospitals should be able to reject unvaccinated patients.
Let me be clear - I support medical freedom, parental choice on vaccines as well as preserving our private health insurance system that allows for choice and freedom.
Porter wants to take your medical choice and medical freedoms away.
---
| | [DONATE TO DEFEND OUR MEDICAL FREEDOMS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WDskWVjbMAOMZ6sBDDvlhZqim8XQMu0DgeFYGugmMye34H8UISCwIXAOqB8pXEGIuu-DNXLQrADz25CHXwCo3KUqAxPfVN8WJPWEVRJVvorpsrYcBcsEhux9Da4qlRuSVWAt-fYq315TMgN_c3giP_EPLnvRdEYRwLZP1HztJxDHxTROz4-_cpOX7eieMJiKbfgAcOG2T6evt4uuImiZug==&c=WEk7h_qlFWxdipJXqgWJQqe1HU2BNkb_bQDmMZ6FVrJi7O-4Z4qIfg==&ch=GV4UwYyYC48Y2JdpfLmUd3iszN0UGEyytDQOg8UZUYV4s3cd68PDAw==)
---
| Out of all members in Congress, Porter has taken the most money from far-left groups who aim to end the Hyde Amendment and abolish our private insurance plans.
The Hyde Amendment is what safeguards against taxpayer-funded abortions. The Hyde Amendment is universally supported on all sides of the aisle.
No one in their right mind thinks that taxpayer funds should be used to pay for abortions.
No one except for Katie Porter and her Radical Squad Colt.
This election is so incredibly important. Porter not only wants a hostile take over of this Conservative district \- she wants to run for higher office. She has stockpiled fundraising dollars to replace Padilla in the U.S. Senate.
Heck, it is not hard to imagine Porter pouncing on an opportunity to replace Joe Biden as President.
She is in it for herself and she must be stopped before it is too late.
Porter is not appealing to the average voter in my district, but we cannot let her buy an election!
We need this seat to take back the House and to stop Radical Progressive Katie Porter before she gains momentum.
I am personally writing to you today to urge you to rush your best donation. I face off against Katie on the ballot for the first time in just two months!
[Rush your best donation of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $1000 or even the federal maximum $8,600 per individual/$17,200 per couple that my campaign can receive!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WDskWVjbMAOMZ6sBDDvlhZqim8XQMu0DgeFYGugmMye34H8UISCwIXAOqB8pXEGIuu-DNXLQrADz25CHXwCo3KUqAxPfVN8WJPWEVRJVvorpsrYcBcsEhux9Da4qlRuSVWAt-fYq315TMgN_c3giP_EPLnvRdEYRwLZP1HztJxDHxTROz4-_cpOX7eieMJiKbfgAcOG2T6evt4uuImiZug==&c=WEk7h_qlFWxdipJXqgWJQqe1HU2BNkb_bQDmMZ6FVrJi7O-4Z4qIfg==&ch=GV4UwYyYC48Y2JdpfLmUd3iszN0UGEyytDQOg8UZUYV4s3cd68PDAw==)
Remember I am personally matching every donation our campaign receives so EVERY dollar counts!

subject: Will you add your personal endorsement before it’s too late?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Personally endorsing Mark is a simple and small action, but it speaks volumes to what we are trying to do here.
#

**Mark Kelly Personal Endorsement Tracker**
**Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com**
**Your Endorsement: No Signature on Record**
**Action Requested: Add your name today!**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-april/?source=em220404-1-7&t=1&akid=2518%2E6688874%2EFAgvJl)**
Friends —
Now that we’re just a few months from Election Day, it’s crucial that we make sure Mark has the support of a big team behind him.
Here’s why: First, a Mitch McConnell-backed dark money group is spending big to beat us. Second, defeating Mark is one of Trump’s top priorities. And third, Republicans are getting close to picking Mark’s opponent.
So, we need more people to personally endorse our campaign and help Mark fight back. So far, over 75,000 people have signed on to say they have Mark’s back, and we’re hoping to make that number 100,000 by the end of this month.
That’s why we’re reaching out to those of you we haven’t seen on our list of folks who have signed on to make their personal endorsement.
[**Will you add your name to say you personally endorse our campaign for Senate? It’s important for Mark and our team to know that we can count on you to fight by our side and win this race.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-april/?source=em220404-1-7&t=2&akid=2518%2E6688874%2EFAgvJl)
[](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-april/?source=em220404-1-7&t=3&akid=2518%2E6688874%2EFAgvJl)
Personally endorsing Mark is a simple and small action, but it speaks volumes to what we are trying to do here: Elect Mark and return a reliance on science, data, and facts back to Congress.
Because when you and thousands of others all step up and say you’re with Mark, you become part of a campaign that is focused on improving people’s lives — and that’s something worth fighting for.
[**Endorse Mark Kelly’s re-election today.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-april/?source=em220404-1-7&t=4&akid=2518%2E6688874%2EFAgvJl)
Thank you in advance for adding your name,
Team Kelly
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-april/?source=em220404-1-7&t=5&akid=2518%2E6688874%2EFAgvJl)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=2518%2E6688874%2EFAgvJl).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kerry=20McQuisten=20for=20Oregon?=
subject: My meeting with Eric Trump
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7c472d32b7f3/were-off-and-running-6769498?e=ae2345792a)
---
| |
---
---
| **Oregon gubernatorial candidate Kerry McQuisten meets with Eric Trump**

Oregon Republican gubernatorial candidate, Kerry McQuisten, met with Eric Trump on Friday in Keizer, Oregon.

During the meeting, the two discussed election integrity combined with the dynamics of voter apathy in Oregon, and some specifics of McQuisten’s campaign
.
“I think people had almost given up on Oregon on a national level,” says McQuisten, “but this election is bringing fresh attention to our state.”

Solomon Yue, the Oregon Republican Party’s National Committeeman, also had a meeting with Eric Trump regarding the potential of a much-anticipated rally with President Trump in Oregon.

McQuisten notes, “The first thing Eric did was cross the room and give Mr. Yue a hug. This tells me that Oregon hasn’t been forgotten or written off. The past two years have shown us that our red-state governors have been the lions at the gate together, pushing back against this federal march into socialism. I look forward to joining them.”

Though the meeting had been arranged well in advance, McQuisten kept it off her campaign calendar for security reasons, with Eric Trump’s attendance at the Reawaken Tour also kept under wraps for the same purpose. He later went on stage as the keynote speaker for that event.

“Eric told the crowd that though he and his family didn’t need the abuse, they would never stop fighting. He expressed love for our country. He stressed the need for sincere, solid elected officials,” McQuisten said. “I’ve seen for myself that we aren’t in a Democrat versus Republican fight. This is good versus evil, and a fight to save America one state at a time.”

Last month, McQuisten was enthusiastically endorsed by President Trump’s first lady of election integrity, Dr. Kelli Ward, who serves as Chair of the Arizona Republican Party.

If elected, McQuisten, who is the mayor of Baker City, a seventh generation Oregonian, and a business owner, would become Oregon’s first female Republican governor, and the first governor from eastern Oregon since the 1950s. She would also be Oregon’s first Republican governor in four decades.

Additional information can be found at the candidate’s web site: [www.KerryMcQuisten.com.](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=d9b1b3d3d3&e=ae2345792a) # # #

name: Liz Cheney (WY-R)
subject: Asking for your attention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Cheney for Wyoming

Friends,

**I want to make sure you are paying attention to this.

[I am humbly asking for your financial support for my campaign.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=d6f76a2d5b124714b8b49c537e5d0954&_e=KKNiByVS0KR3HCIdEgG7uft71bjS4wPiuK9QQ5bFmCc9d6DHOl9LA49Qoj4MVVnuegzfFTDnxtZ3F3-NX3OhdmO6JFlA7EyVnTnvs_10tVLVSYamqr8TcMIseiz-WUvCxBgypEDHtW2gsDyc6APNLp6TGwXGpzaNN6kZRLZMd8Gu7HQRTAIDhOX0wiYdmMrXP8fMjHJOJxX6myjfbcU_Iwiuy_iTvtgGeb_yCz2-R5cz58L8hS77c9unrNrEfg8QCIwx0lXITIu39TCi7sugp0NNBDKynz8a2tAS2e_ZhHqp1abJu7Hn4b4ExeZXPGqQXFqZu68fvHbre0O3-qkPmvM5Rq3hXUhEfzl61cP198XAiDVvNc3yo8QfMUF46n82zVRpQ4r2JSeeAsEpWnFXVB-GCBNY7cEHNhjo2qs--sWYEzV642wPASFw3Q93okw_wOvs_jA21DZ1lQy2VXS_xxpeeX-xOfcdh1S7u7sJhZ-3iPZvadjTdLGI0CxMA4_qwxXMS2G47QnVgSbHE_tdgnLwuoRXL0jcTEOjZ3XsTtM%3D)** We need serious leaders, and I am fully committed to being an advocate for real representation. For me, nothing will change the way I fight for Wyoming and the future of this country.

As we have debates and discussions at home about what is going on in our world right now, and as we’re thinking about who we’re going to support and who we’re going to elect, it is so important for us to remember that the challenges we face as a country right now are grave. They are serious. **And we have to elect serious people.**

Right now in our party, we have people who are openly antisemitic. We have people who are openly racist. And we have people who have openly attended white supremacist conferences.

In politics, we always want to have a big tent. But no tent can ever be big enough for those views. And we all have to be very clear about that.

**[Can you chip in $5, $10, $20, or more to elect SERIOUS conservatives to Washington?>>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=d6f76a2d5b124714b8b49c537e5d0954&_e=KKNiByVS0KR3HCIdEgG7uft71bjS4wPiuK9QQ5bFmCc9d6DHOl9LA49Qoj4MVVnuegzfFTDnxtZ3F3-NX3OhdmO6JFlA7EyVnTnvs_10tVLVSYamqr8TcMIseiz-WUvCxBgypEDHtW2gsDyc6APNLp6TGwXGpzaNN6kZRLZMd8Gu7HQRTAIDhOX0wiYdmMrXP8fMjHJOJxX6myjfbcU_Iwiuy_iTvtgGeb_yCz2-R5cz58L8hS77c9unrNrEfg8QCIwx0lXITIu39TCi7sugp0NNBDKynz8a2tAS2e_ZhHoK0JyisJBFhUiHidlHzwGnhv9QmYteIFz6ne-D6sMRChfMlyVfaQyHq1i1whjFgV5-mnyL_il5QVIDJVrIiU0UCGt4JugglkYMcugq8fQ5VwRtSAPsWAU4QdzX7m3GTLIUvWd3Hv6_u5R8BoONBAxt50TdQo-227UzFfnpH5ALsOyU_7ejHnmLSqiGxbmDFxr-N99Ik5DVKC6OAj5DM6xNJ0vJom9dCj-6O22mggK6ppYA3TgIbdo3OPvMdEPROUvHE2-OIGal4f-GPREugM3h)**

Thank you,
Liz Cheney

Peter, with Senate Republicans sitting on more than $41 million in the bank to take back control for Mitch McConnell, we get how it can seem like a grassroots donation may not make a difference.
**We want to be honest: with national Republicans actively trying to kick Abby off the ballot – and $10,585 left to raise before our next big fundraising deadline at 11:59 p.m. tonight – every single contribution matters immensely.**
You see, the 50-50 Senate control is not working for the American people, and helping Abby Finkenauer defeat vulnerable GOP incumbent Sen. Chuck Grassley is the BEST way to expand Democratic Senate control.
With Sen. Grassley's approval ratings with Iowa voters tanking before our eyes, now is the time to seize momentum and finally flip this seat blue.
Abby can't win without major resources, and those resources won't materialize without unstoppable grassroots support.
**[So Peter, as one of Abby's grassroots supporters, we are respectfully asking you to make a donation of $5 or whatever you can spare before our next big fundraising deadline at midnight to help us raise another $10,585 so we don't fall short.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43776382/338654832/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk886-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTJmZTk1OS02NWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dL_6xYRxC_maWSk6Qc-Xeit8TBNt2ResKg4i2-10DpA=) Whatever you give will ensure we have the resources to defeat Chuck Grassley in Iowa, elect Democrat Abby Finkenauer to the Senate and expand our Democratic majority!**
Thank you so much.

Team Abby

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: One COVID Bill Passes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [1 Down, 7 to Go](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooNjgEaUucwu2G5wMDGAb-VUo8MbGFLyRjSWq5g2ujG1A&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr4_final&n=1) Gavin Newsom has relinquished the governorship for a two-week vacation in Central America. In his absence, I’m calling on Acting Governor Kounalakis to end the State of Emergency. I’ve also introduced a bill to make future “emergencies” end of their own accord. AB 2902 would put a 30-day time limit on any emergency declaration. This comes as the defeat of AB 1993, the employer mandate, is still reverberating through the Capitol. Its rejection was so emphatic that one of the bill’s co-authors “requested to remove my name.” Still, as I discussed with Steve Hilton [on Fox News](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Trwmtk_uyVQ0nz6QZoJharNQSMM-QpCUpi0bha01Xn-Kz-gUWQsFCJZYiRnkyqstUQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr4_final&n=2) last night, Newsom and the “Vaccine Work Group” are intent on extending the COVID era as long as possible. While we’ve killed one bill, at least seven remain: An intrusive new testing bill passed a committee last week, and the bill to defund police for not enforcing mask mandates is up this week. I’ll continue to update their status [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopHp8C5NAApBvI0WlVCOedu&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr4_final&n=3). Meanwhile, the backlash keeps growing against the Supermajority’s botched hijacking of my bill to suspend the gas tax, and the story continues to [dominate news coverage](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=kR3y99IPl5k1bOCK6WzvOdMHqfIrUsxFxCpAO6_n5nKvOG40M48FU3rTdBtx5rYWOO0zf64_4U0SKJd_ja8vP-N-Q1s0JDAutOF9_-w2jRPoERO-rfJiErkg_TMXidrcqgIaJfYh6CaDq9kNKxJmmQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr4_final&n=4). As Jon Coupal wrote, the Democrats “planed to ambush Kiley’s proposal. But their plan backfired badly.” On a final note: thank you! Last Thursday set a record for our campaign with 1,210 donations in a single day, putting us in the driver’s seat with two months to the Primary. We are showing the awesome power of a citizen-backed campaign. [Help get April off to a strong start](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr4_final&n=5) [See a list of our April events](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=46JphwgMS_nx4Jy_hVRltfVa2LAuro2ATBTgJF5BEnHrSkaMnUfh0-mF6ilnvo8J&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr4_final&n=6) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr4_final&n=7).

name: Greg Stanton
subject: We need to support our LGBTQ youth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/gFvSHm9qQsVghx5d12WLO-AhecUjy3kBtVVsbE7-PbI=/9JxwbIKFeK-DfE9FhhmNyOBROAohli3vPz72WaLD7xY=)
As Mayor of Phoenix, I was a passionate advocate of LGBTQ rights. After passing our Non-Discrimination Ordinance, Phoenix has consistently scored a "100" (on a scale of 0-100) on the Human Rights Campaign's equality index.
That's why it's gut-wrenching to see the anti-gay and anti-trans bills being passed in states across the country, including here at home in Arizona.
**No kid should _ever_ be ashamed of who they are. The Senate MUST pass the EQUALITY Act so we can protect our LGBTQ community across the nation.**
[**You can join my call to the Senate by signing on to my petition now >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gFvSHm9qQsVghx5d12WLO-AhecUjy3kBtVVsbE7-PbI=/pTEYV5qDTTlO58-I6u00zfFFto3xlojQgR-ajYxkIDg=)
Thanks for standing with me,
- _Greg_

name: Team Benson
subject: Trump’s top target
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

This past Saturday, Trump came to Michigan and rallied his army of supporters for another assault on our democracy. We’re not going to repeat all of his unhinged lunacy, but the goal was clear: unseat Jocelyn and put Trump loyalists in charge of our elections.
There’s a reason why Trump came to Michigan. He admitted it himself. His campaign against American democracy depends on taking over our elections and tapping into Michigan’s growing network of Big Lie extremists. So now we need to choose, friend: will Saturday’s rally be the beginning of the end of democracy in Michigan, or will we rise up to defend our elections for generations to come?

With Jocelyn’s leadership, the answer to that question is clear: We’re going to defend our elections for generations to come. You can start by supporting Jocelyn’s re-election campaign today. Let’s show Trump that democracy is alive and well in Michigan.

Donate>> secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=040422

subject: $1.4 million in attack against Finchem
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Soros on the attack! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5622d9e6c7&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
You won’t believe what the Dems will do to bring me down.

**They have launched countless smear campaigns, turned the media against me, and have done everything in their power to bemoan and disparage America’s Audit in Arizona.**

(But as you can see, [I’m still writing you today](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0a917bb400&e=44b8c466b0), so that wasn’t enough!)

So...

They had to take things to the next level.

According to _AZ Mirror..._
_MoveOn has spent more than $1.4 million against Republican Mark Finchem in his campaign to become Arizona’s next secretary of state._
They’ve spent $1.4 million against me, and its only the beginning April. We expect them to spend 10 times that amount against me in the coming months.

_Because, in their minds, if the people aren’t on your side, you need to buy the win or steal the win._

Here’s a hard fact.
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7bc0060c1b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| I am immensely proud of raising $663,000 in 2021. _This is a RECORD SETTING number!_

**And yet the Democrats are already outspending more than 2 to 1.**

Now, I know they are going to flood the market with ads and attacks with out of state, billionaire dollars. It is impossible to match what they are going to throw at me.

**But I don’t need to match them dollar for dollar,[I just need to enough to fight back.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f8838e281b&e=44b8c466b0)**

This is why I am asking you to contribute to my **_Emergency Campaign Fund._**

[I am looking for $23,000 in funds to fight back against these attacks and regain the offensive.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=dc27f54a58&e=44b8c466b0) We cannot let anti-Election Integrity Socialists gain ANY momentum.

[_Can you please contribute to our Emergency Campaign Fund to fight back against these terrible attacks? Anything will help, $25, $50, or even $100 or more!_

_Please help generously! We have made such great strides and we can’t let the campaign fall to these attacks._](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=73f2b8ae3a&e=44b8c466b0)

Thank you for your support!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1a3396590b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---

Mark Finchem for Secretary of State15508 W Bell Rd.STE 101-423Surprise, AZ 85374

name: Demings, Val
subject: this campaign means so much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I hope you'll give this email a read
| | |
---
Friend: This is a longer and especially important email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and tell you why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read.
I was raised in Jacksonville, Florida – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've _got_ to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked _hard._ And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had _faith. _I've carried that spirit with me my entire career.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43776683/338656286/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2832-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjM4OWY3My02N2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_6nfEzHlcetP-_ydcNi6JnuK7a__HNxCsjlRmMwaqo=)
That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me, "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – _never_ tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community.
**[I will never tire of the opportunities to do good or the challenges to tackle before me, and I'm asking you to do the same. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more before my midnight deadline to help me defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43776684/338656287/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2832-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjM4OWY3My02N2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_6nfEzHlcetP-_ydcNi6JnuK7a__HNxCsjlRmMwaqo=)**
_Never tire._ These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th District in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, especially as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire – and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized.
_Never tire,_ I said to myself as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I _never tire_ of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law.
This is my story, friend: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians.** ****I am ready to be the next U.S. senator for Florida – and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win.**
[**So I need your support, friend. This campaign is a battle of many things, and an unfortunate reality among them is** _resources._**The Republican Party is already proving they will spend whatever it takes to protect Marco Rubio, so if you're with me, if you want to elect Florida's first Black senator and defend our majority in the Senate, please donate $5 or whatever you can before my midnight deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43776685/338656289/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2832-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjM4OWY3My02N2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_6nfEzHlcetP-_ydcNi6JnuK7a__HNxCsjlRmMwaqo=)
Thank you for being in this with me. _Never tire._

Val Demings
| | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, **[click here if you’re on mobile](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43776686/338656290/1417698435?refcode=jtk2832-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjM4OWY3My02N2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_6nfEzHlcetP-_ydcNi6JnuK7a__HNxCsjlRmMwaqo=&emci=f80493d6-24b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=72389f73-67b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100) or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates.**

[Privacy Policy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43776689/338656293/1731636184?refcode=jtk2832-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjM4OWY3My02N2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_6nfEzHlcetP-_ydcNi6JnuK7a__HNxCsjlRmMwaqo=&emci=f80493d6-24b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=72389f73-67b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100) & [Terms of Service](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43776690/338656295/43942087?refcode=jtk2832-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjM4OWY3My02N2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_6nfEzHlcetP-_ydcNi6JnuK7a__HNxCsjlRmMwaqo=&emci=f80493d6-24b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=72389f73-67b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100). I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider [making a donation today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43776691/338656296/-890400302?recurring=0&refcode=jtk2832-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjM4OWY3My02N2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_6nfEzHlcetP-_ydcNi6JnuK7a__HNxCsjlRmMwaqo=). You can also click here to [receive fewer emails](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43776692/338656297/-144803992?refcode=jtk2832-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjM4OWY3My02N2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_6nfEzHlcetP-_ydcNi6JnuK7a__HNxCsjlRmMwaqo=&emci=f80493d6-24b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=72389f73-67b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100) or click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f80493d6-24b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/72389f73-67b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjM4OWY3My02N2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_6nfEzHlcetP-_ydcNi6JnuK7a__HNxCsjlRmMwaqo=&id=123159867).

subject: About my wife... please read
body:
|
---
| | My wife just did something you should know about...

She wrote a letter about me!

It's 100% her words... [check it out here if you'd like](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=6aeda53a4e&e=dea908e0fe "what my wife said").

Thanks for being a part of this,

Brian

**P.S.** I recently found out that The Citizens Alliance of Idaho, Conservatives of Idaho, Stop Idaho RINOs, and Young Americans for Liberty ALL endorsed me. This is great news for the fight to take our state back. Also, as of today, I've raised 86% more money than my opponent. Why? Because Idaho citizens are disgusted with politics as usual in Boise. So I wanted to share these wins with you, and say thanks for your help.

**P.P.S.** Please let people know to show up and VOTE LIBERTY on May 17th (it's coming up fast).

clean_body: | | | My wife just did something you should know about... She wrote a letter about me! It's 100% her words... "what my wife said". Thanks for being a part of this, Brian P.S. I recently found out that The Citizens Alliance of Idaho, Conservatives of Idaho, Stop Idaho RINOs, and Young Americans for Liberty ALL endorsed me. This is great news for the fight to take our state back. Also, as of today, I've raised 86% more money than my opponent. Why? Because Idaho citizens are disgusted with politics as usual in Boise. So I wanted to share these wins with you, and say thanks for your help. P.P.S. Please let people know to show up and VOTE LIBERTY on May 17th (it's coming up fast). | | Copyright © 2022 Brian Lenney for Idaho, All rights reserved.

Hi Peter – it's Team Tina.

We wanted to reach out personally to **thank you** for all the support you gave our campaign in March.

We're scared about some of the things heating up across the country. **We're even more scared by the fact that Republicans are trying to bring their national agenda here to Oregon.**

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: re: prescription drug costs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43770421/338625208/-241209467?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220404insulin_gv_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODc3ZGMyMi00OGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5fUjZC0U4VzcR2zovSPc1P_5xGZ_ughFQjEyovPw0z4=)
---
Friend, Last week, the House Democratic majority was successful in delivering on their promise to lower prescription drug prices by passing a bill that would cap insulin costs to $35/month for those with insurance. Sadly, only twelve Republicans joined Democrats in supporting this bill, _and Republican Rep. Yvette Herrell was not one of them._ **That’s right: Herrell voted against lowering insulin costs by hundreds and even thousands of dollars a year for millions of people.** It’s just another in a long list of examples of Herrell voting against the best interests of the people she was elected to represent in Washington. When we defeat Herrell at the ballot box this November, I promise you that I’ll fight to lower prescription drug costs in Congress. For too long, New Mexicans and Americans across the country have had to spend too much money on the medications they need to get by. **[If you’re ready for a representative who will actually vote to put more money in your pocket by lowering prescription drug prices, pitch in $10 or whatever you can to support our campaign and help me replace Herrell this year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43770422/338625209/-241209467?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220404insulin_gv_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODc3ZGMyMi00OGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5fUjZC0U4VzcR2zovSPc1P_5xGZ_ughFQjEyovPw0z4=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Friend, Last week, the House Democratic majority was successful in delivering on their promise to lower prescription drug prices by passing a bill that would cap insulin costs to $35/month for those with insurance. Sadly, only twelve Republicans joined Democrats in supporting this bill, and Republican Rep. Yvette Herrell was not one of them. That’s right: Herrell voted against lowering insulin costs by hundreds and even thousands of dollars a year for millions of people. It’s just another in a long list of examples of Herrell voting against the best interests of the people she was elected to represent in Washington. When we defeat Herrell at the ballot box this November, I promise you that I’ll fight to lower prescription drug costs in Congress. For too long, New Mexicans and Americans across the country have had to spend too much money on the medications they need to get by. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: I couldn’t be prouder
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]I wanted to reach out personally and thank you for your support so far in 2022. With your help, we were able to reach our goal before our first end-of-quarter deadline of the election year, and I couldn’t be prouder of the progress we’re making.

But the fight isn’t over yet. We still have a lot of ground to cover before Election Day, and we need all hands on deck to keep our momentum going strong.

We’re facing our toughest challenge yet this November, especially since I’m officially on the NRCC target list , but I know that we can win this race with supporters like you on my team.

Thanks again for all your help. I know that with your support, we can continue to make bipartisan progress and fight for the needs of all Americans.

All the best,

Josh

P.S. Please consider chipping in now if you didn’t have a chance to do so in March! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2204?amount=20]
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. clean_body: [#]I wanted to reach out personally and thank you for your support so far in 2022. With your help, we were able to reach our goal before our first end-of-quarter deadline of the election year, and I couldn’t be prouder of the progress we’re making. But the fight isn’t over yet. We still have a lot of ground to cover before Election Day, and we need all hands on deck to keep our momentum going strong. We’re facing our toughest challenge yet this November, especially since I’m officially on the NRCC target list , but I know that we can win this race with supporters like you on my team. Thanks again for all your help. I know that with your support, we can continue to make bipartisan progress and fight for the needs of all Americans. All the best, Josh P.S. Please consider chipping in now if you didn’t have a chance to do so in March! [] Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Michele Rayner
subject: If only this little girl knew what was ahead...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele Rayner for Florida P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43770493/338625593/-742096553?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDI4MTViYy00OGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8m7KxyV8YW6ecH2fRIow1iTJ7SBRRALZKDJfiuSJjJM=)
---
Peter, I want to tell you a longer story about my life, my family, and what called me to serve. It’s a deep look into exactly why I’m running for Congress.

If you’re busy and don’t have time to read it, I completely understand. But with the race heating up, my team has to raise $5,000 before midnight. [Would you consider chipping in $3 before you continue with your day?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43770494/338625594/1210045690?amount=3&refcode=MRFC_20220404_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDI4MTViYy00OGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8m7KxyV8YW6ecH2fRIow1iTJ7SBRRALZKDJfiuSJjJM=) | [$5,000 MIDNIGHT GOAL: CHIP IN $3 TO ELECT DEMOCRAT MICHELE RAYNER TO CONGRESS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43770495/338625595/1210045690?amount=3&refcode=MRFC_20220404_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDI4MTViYy00OGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8m7KxyV8YW6ecH2fRIow1iTJ7SBRRALZKDJfiuSJjJM=)
---
Looking back, it’s amazing to think the little girl in this picture had no idea just how far she’d go to fight for her community.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43770496/338625596/1210045690?amount=3&refcode=MRFC_20220404_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDI4MTViYy00OGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8m7KxyV8YW6ecH2fRIow1iTJ7SBRRALZKDJfiuSJjJM=)
My parents were changemakers – pioneering integration at the University of South Florida. Their dedication to service inspired me to step up and serve my community.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43770497/338625597/1210045690?amount=3&refcode=MRFC_20220404_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDI4MTViYy00OGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8m7KxyV8YW6ecH2fRIow1iTJ7SBRRALZKDJfiuSJjJM=)
My dad always told me to “Help others, do the right thing and most of all, always keep your head up high.”

That’s what led me to the Hillsborough County Public Defender’s office – working to do good for the most vulnerable in my community and advocating for clients who have been pushed to the margins of society.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43770498/338625598/1210045690?amount=3&refcode=MRFC_20220404_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDI4MTViYy00OGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8m7KxyV8YW6ecH2fRIow1iTJ7SBRRALZKDJfiuSJjJM=)
Working with underserved and historically excluded communities, I was infuriated by the way the legal system is often stacked against people – and I knew my next calling was to run for the state legislature.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43770499/338625599/1210045690?amount=3&refcode=MRFC_20220404_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDI4MTViYy00OGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8m7KxyV8YW6ecH2fRIow1iTJ7SBRRALZKDJfiuSJjJM=)
**So I became the first openly queer Black member of the legislature, and used my position fight for underserved communities.**

My story has one common thread throughout – service for my community. I will _always_ fight to help those who have been marginalized – and now I’m taking that fight to Congress.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43770500/338625600/1210045690?amount=3&refcode=MRFC_20220404_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDI4MTViYy00OGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8m7KxyV8YW6ecH2fRIow1iTJ7SBRRALZKDJfiuSJjJM=)
[But my outspoken advocacy has earned me some opposition from those resisting deeply needed change. So that’s why I need a grassroots movement behind me. Will you chip in $3 to help send me to Congress, Peter? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43770501/338625601/1210045690?amount=3&refcode=MRFC_20220404_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDI4MTViYy00OGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8m7KxyV8YW6ecH2fRIow1iTJ7SBRRALZKDJfiuSJjJM=)

Prepare Now to Repeal ObamaCare Later
By Bobby Jindal
_Republicans need to show voters they have a viable alternative._
After Sen. John McCain’s thumbs-down vote doomed Republican efforts to repeal ObamaCare in 2017, the party’s leadership largely abandoned the effort and shifted to other topics. Congress zeroed out the individual-mandate penalty as part of its tax-cut legislation; Republican attorneys general tried unsuccessfully to use that action to convince the courts to repeal the law; President Trump promised to replace ObamaCare with a better plan. Sens. Lindsey Graham and Bill Cassidy offered their own plan, but Republican leaders never brought it to the floor and seemed happier to forget the entire healthcare topic.

Republicans need to be better prepared the next time they control both chambers of Congress and the White House. President Biden’s sinking poll numbers and Democratic infighting may give them that opportunity in three years. To avoid another failure at repealing ObamaCare, Republicans need to convince voters that they have a viable replacement.

clean_body: Republicans need to show voters they have a viable alternative. | | Prepare Now to Repeal ObamaCare Later By Bobby Jindal Republicans need to show voters they have a viable alternative. After Sen. John McCain’s thumbs-down vote doomed Republican efforts to repeal ObamaCare in 2017, the party’s leadership largely abandoned the effort and shifted to other topics. Congress zeroed out the individual-mandate penalty as part of its tax-cut legislation; Republican attorneys general tried unsuccessfully to use that action to convince the courts to repeal the law; President Trump promised to replace ObamaCare with a better plan. Sens. Lindsey Graham and Bill Cassidy offered their own plan, but Republican leaders never brought it to the floor and seemed happier to forget the entire healthcare topic. Republicans need to be better prepared the next time they control both chambers of Congress and the White House. President Biden’s sinking poll numbers and Democratic infighting may give them that opportunity in three years. To avoid another failure at repealing ObamaCare, Republicans need to convince voters that they have a viable replacement. Finish Reading . Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by AmericaNext 5800 One Perkins Place Drive, Suite 8B, Baton Rouge, LA 70808

name: Crystal's iPhone
subject: Thank you
body:
| | | Peter, _**Thank you.**_ Yesterday, my team and I sat down to review my fundraising goals for the first 45 days of my campaign for Congress, and I'm very proud to announce that together we raised over $480,000 - _far exceeding our goal_! I am incredibly grateful to all of you who have rallied behind us in the first weeks of our campaign. Since announcing my candidacy, I've been overwhelmed by the outpouring of support and encouragement we have received. It is truly humbling to have the opportunity to represent my hometown in Congress and work towards conservative results for Virginia's families, parents, law enforcement, and small businesses. These campaign funds allow us to travel throughout the district, distribute campaign materials, and spread our shared conservative message to voters. If you haven't already chipped in, you can do so by [clicking here.](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/6c0bc1b7be0491ae/eb05050c6415d746c3d6b838967d376c/40203) As I've said previously, I'm running because I love our community and our country. I am committed to outfundraising and outworking my opponents to ensure we flip the U.S. House of Representatives in November. I'll have more to share in the coming days, but I wanted to quickly send this email to say _**thank you for your continued support and prayers!**_ Crystal VanuchRepublican Candidate for Congress P.S. - [If you are able, please consider making a donation today. **Friend: If you do not believe the government should control the price of prescription drugs, then you must make your voice heard.** The pandemic has shown that the way to get Americans more and quicker access to life-saving drugs and treatments is to get the government out of the way. Innovation is driven by competition and free markets, not the government. This is a lesson Washington always forgets. The federal government has repeatedly fumbled important healthcare issues:
* Despite $83 BILLION in funding for COVID-19 testing, the government failed for almost a year to give Americans access to affordable rapid test on demand
* 1 out of every 5 Medicaid dollars was misspent by Washington over the last two years costing taxpayers $143 billion
* Obamacare has increased the average health insurance premium by over 130%. Healthcare price controls enacted by Obamacare are the reasons premiums are high and access to doctors is shrinking.

A government takeover of our medicine cabinets is a prescription for disaster. This is why we have launched a petition to force your elected officials to vote against any consideration of drug pricing controls. But we need 100,000 signatures to make them think twice about ignoring your demands. **You can make your voice heard here:[https://americansforprosperity.org/drug-pricing-petition](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDk0LTZkMWE0MzI5MjA2YzRjZjRhZWVmZGM1M2NiNmYxNDQxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjUiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2FtZXJpY2Fuc2ZvcnByb3NwZXJpdHkub3JnL2RydWctcHJpY2luZy1wZXRpdGlvbi8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kcnVncHJpY2luZyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD12Mi1BRV9GRk8wNDA0MjAyMiJ9/Lqp3Fx4Dab1axf6XQy4SHg)** We think enough is enough, but we need to know where top supporters like you stand, friend. Hello,
Have you ever heard the term “tracker?” I know I hadn’t until I decided to run for office.
“Trackers” are what political campaign staff call what are essentially professional stalkers. They’re paid by Republican Super PACs and dark money organizations to follow you around with a video camera literally everywhere you go – yelling ridiculous questions and trying to get you to say something that they can edit up and spin into a fake scandal on Fox News.
Well, the first tracker of the campaign has been showing up to my events with Iowa voters, hired and paid to be there by the “unofficial research arm of the Republican Party.”
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to spend millions lying about me in TV ads. They’re scared because I’m a hard target for Republicans. They know that I can excite Independent voters and maybe even some Republicans to vote for someone who lives a life of Iowa values. **And if I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, Democrats will hold onto our Senate majority.**
And we can win: The latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows just 27% of Iowa voters want to re-elect Chuck Grassley!
**I’m not taking corporate PAC money, so if we’re going to be able to fight back against the GOP’s lies and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on you. We need to raise another $50,000 before our deadline at midnight tomorrow if we’re going to win, but right now, we’re still $23,802 short.**
[**Please, will you give $5, $25, or whatever you can afford before our critical deadline at midnight tomorrow to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43777061/338658347/-42398318?refcode=em20220404pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjg5NWRmNS02YWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3J2vtsAMA_GIvnAFDcfYuE1cvPlrM3HZNvvJQ8dfSK0=)

clean_body: Hello, Have you ever heard the term “tracker?” I know I hadn’t until I decided to run for office. “Trackers” are what political campaign staff call what are essentially professional stalkers. They’re paid by Republican Super PACs and dark money organizations to follow you around with a video camera literally everywhere you go – yelling ridiculous questions and trying to get you to say something that they can edit up and spin into a fake scandal on Fox News. Well, the first tracker of the campaign has been showing up to my events with Iowa voters, hired and paid to be there by the “unofficial research arm of the Republican Party.” Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to spend millions lying about me in TV ads. They’re scared because I’m a hard target for Republicans. They know that I can excite Independent voters and maybe even some Republicans to vote for someone who lives a life of Iowa values. And if I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, Democrats will hold onto our Senate majority. And we can win: The latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows just 27% of Iowa voters want to re-elect Chuck Grassley! I’m not taking corporate PAC money, so if we’re going to be able to fight back against the GOP’s lies and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on you. We need to raise another $50,000 before our deadline at midnight tomorrow if we’re going to win, but right now, we’re still $23,802 short. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m running for Senate because I care about the people of Iowa. I want to help Iowans achieve their potential and make our state a leader again in manufacturing, education, and clean energy. And I believe I’ve got the experience to get the job done. But the only way I can get that message out and correct the lies they’re going to tell about me is with your donation now to my campaign. Thank you for being a part of the team, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

| Peter,

I just saw an article that stopped me in my tracks: _**“Poll shows declining Dem, rising GOP midterm motivation.”**_

This is NOT good. Republicans are hellbent on taking back the House and destroying our democracy...and polls show **most Democrats aren’t motivated enough to stop them.**
---
| [FIGHT BACK ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43777505/338659732/-1812294166?refcode=BLU-BRP-20220404-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzJiNGFhNi02YmI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yZgGqu2npIvmtS9Tbf7SoCOUJA1CovPic52rMSiZcio=)

* The January 6 commission will end.

* Voting rights will be rolled back.

* Abortion rights will be curtailed.

* LGBTQ+ protections will be threatened.

* _And so much more!_

name: Emily Seidel
subject: Are you concerned about the rising cost of prescription drugs?
body:
URGENT: Congress is considering price controls on prescription drugs representing a dangerous government takeover of your medici
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfbbhlnlu9d2l6u3d5vidoakfu97dbd4a1jfo1m8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shi6coj5cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t1nmphj0olmmmqb6tbje5q3aplhecoj5dlkc1gbdd33chq3bclk6qo69pb0s3jjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5l63g7cor66jibbcr7m2qmash5u)
| | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zv757tl6iigbcs1n297okhmbttb3dkqu4f9g3gno_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shi6coj5cdh2bs)
---
**URGENT: Congress is considering price controls on prescription drugs representing a dangerous government takeover of your medicine cabinet.** How much is the life of your spouse or children or grandchildren worth? If some in Congress get their way, they will empower government officials to decide which medicines you or your loved ones can take. We need to know where you stand, Friend:
---
**SHOULD THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT DICTATE THE PRICE OF LIFESAVING PRESCRIPTION DRUGS?**
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqvlegt4c37qvhao4mfjm8ceuaot1gv6uuqcfld0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shi6coj5cdh2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z7qlqi50hgle1u7dlvqoscc4ab73ec76vf5lqkjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shi6coj5cdh2bs)
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqrq3oft4is6m6oegh2r428vhceu1qmgit1dmpk8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shi6coj5cdh2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zcq85u4lggnl2ga9n50lq326jf115cc09qg8reb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shi6coj5cdh2bs)
---
| | _Please submit your response to represent your area by midnight tonight._
---
**Friend: If you do not believe the government should control the price of prescription drugs, then you must make your voice heard. ** Members of Congress are moving quickly on legislation that would give government officials the ability to dictate prices for prescription medications regardless of patient need or doctor recommendation. The cost of certain drugs could stand to be lower, but government price controls are absolutely the wrong way to do it. When governments with single-payer health care systems engage in price fixing, the result is fewer options for patients. The European Union is routinely unable to import critical drugs due to its stifling price controls. Canada also suffers from this misguided policy causing them to ban some drugs that are “too expensive” even if those drugs are most effective at saving lives. We’ve got to bolster our natural allies in the Senate and House to make sure they hold firm. AFP’s grassroots activists will play a key role as they lobby congressional, local, and Washington, D.C. offices. We’ve got to mobilize people who don’t want federal government control over drug pricing that will lead to drug shortages and fewer new breakthrough cures. Experts say government price controls would mean 135 fewer new cures and a loss of 331 million life years. This approach is deadly. This is why we have launched a petition to force your elected officials to vote against any consideration of drug pricing controls. But we need 100,000 signatures to make them think twice about ignoring your demands. **You can make your voice heard here:[https://americansforprosperity.org/drug-pricing-petition](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zoha5hlrhnfsm4kjmc05667b9htl6at6km9bp0d0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shi6coj5cdh2bs)** We think enough is enough, but we need to know where top supporters like you stand, Friend. That’s why we’re conducting a 1-question survey for readers in your area by midnight tonight.
---
**SHOULD THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT DICTATE THE PRICE OF LIFESAVING PRESCRIPTION DRUGS?**
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z9d4jvv9fji6625262knau03sei05j649p2r75lg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shi6coj5cdh2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zv6sd5mdmfbu5odiqc863ftf1f6l36p8uisk877o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shi6coj5cdh2bs)
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z8lenrmeuakptd7ukrjfg04pe4eekikb2q9j11d8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shi6coj5cdh2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zno2a0ecmbi6ri25do5pbnv59apnerfb6ejv229g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shi6coj5cdh2bs)
---
| | Best, —Emily Emily Seidel
President and CEO, Americans for Prosperity
---

---

name: Brett Lindstrom
subject: BREAKING: Mayor Stothert Endorses Brett Lindstrom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Lindstrom Campaign - 2437 S
body:
| | | |

[](www.votelindstrom.com)

Friends,
This afternoon Mayor Jean Stothert of Omaha endorsed my campaign for Governor!
This is a sign of the momentum and enthusiasm we have in our campaign. We will WIN on May 10th and in November!
Under Mayor Stothert’s leadership Omaha has seen 2 property tax cuts, added over 100 new police officers, approved over eight billion dollars in new building permits and doubled funding for roads.
Like Mayor Stothert, my administration will bring even more tax cuts and more investment into our communities.

Mayor Stothert had this to say about her endorsement:
_“Brett Lindstrom has the experience, vision, and proven record of cutting taxes to ensure our state is competitive and a place where families and communities thrive.” said Stothert. “When I think of who should be Nebraska’s next Governor, economic development is at the top of my mind. Unlike his opponents, Brett is a proven tax cutter who knows how to work alongside businesses to get results for Nebraskans. In the May 10th Republican Primary, please join me in supporting Brett Lindstrom.”_ I am honored to have the support of Mayor Stothert and hope you are ready to join our team.
[_**Give $25, $50, $100, $250 or more NOW!**_](http://url5297.votelindstrom.com/ls/click?upn=HTMZIboFmIG-2BMNluIWzOsBTM4DsVO5dYxx4wQHjUHXH9JmySPBcu9TB68NBIH9PjrTVmQnw2rJ2aQ-2Fl432NMdmSdbnTyKG3IMAFA9HmA64w-3DTwpB_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6ek9DZlAHQid7jOK2vcToMLLxxU1wdvZN4klbB30Ba8caLng76ZlYNePDTXQeuO4WkHf2KISjAhsSh27vI1ThKI3D8wsJmSCInBoUeC7RS75YMJWqjuiTc9UXtcXmF9EPEMs4uqTN9HvrlaLcLZ07kCj-2Bp3mf5CeCtkiAWVzby65t-2F-2Bxms18Ak8G-2FSY6uu3ZpxZ8wQThoX6taJrQtJ-2F485OdldqH-2BFwapR7SPuLwnqVYzPS0-2BJjVOsIzc1OqlAATx3lskwUkv21Uu62Kc-2FfmJPYsphnY91yB1lUR3xh2a-2BmGrl9uwxtPJnbMPcoaaXW7YWQNJocna0LD1kle5cmGQ8EvQPl9qUgR7Mj3UUFH6VczM9-2FnzTb3VARSgG3oJkNquk5jHTtgIQJkl7ptr2MwKKPjfcaiG-2BiavmgIS3lEAyPCMlx6Otw9e7vrJMz4xYgPbKChvt5cBlx2pqj1MfvYR1TvrL1GMXKLVFY6V-2B7uu7UVpzL56xjmcKefrutMhLqjw7V1eHpcI27IwnSFyORvdppnu-2BNtbjnfnaxroqRFTRziwiYwHlLRGOOBdFLNj7AyVLjBEtsrvID2IhNp1TTFYLxZ13vkCBCtrOdg9lGxhyh4JK2C2cMiILvcXW81KxCmkatYHh6bfWjLZALBZI0frHrZrdF2npYcRWdYT6zLu5QE863iPgQKMIA9DQLEWM34rPW5CL3uGu-2BjeM6jk6lBK6NV8NtKyvdJT6bNasg4x1ZpxZA9b2mhVhf48MMQ6cWtPBX7xP0CN4lZIqBnoPDe7vMzMfq-2FBCn2oNY5Uipwg-2FLVtSSq0uaeI7cblImy2gjNe)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztkjhpg6s7cr8697t7dt58ra1no590rm3pe3r490_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboe8d9jm8qe9dbim4oj5d74e6pb0phgmepb2ob26thmddplcgp32dpimlqj4ojgsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66libac70ephmcd72mmq3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5ie8p36c9jmaoh5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zet4aon5n4mu275dnt4rqf78qe3vn37ae16247no_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shi6coj7clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6f6aoujasqpspv1kr18n6k395gt50ims9gmo3gg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shi6coj7clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgkdjrdre3cpa0bn0fvejl1n5b8h9jle8of13i1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shi6coj7clh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: What Lindsey Graham just said about Judge Jackson:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Judge Jackson showed why she will make us proud as a Supreme Court justice. And Senate Republicans showed why we can’t trust them to control the chamber. Add your name if you agree that the Senate must confirm her right away. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43778005/338661960/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ4E_SCO_E_20220404_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmJiNGIyYi03MGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4W5bfOpcK-aDwZcjUzhFjZeQlcRiDn4JJWnMXcrNGQ=&emci=b4bb4b2b-70b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b6bb4b2b-70b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)
---
Now that her nomination has moved to the Senate floor, Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson is one big step closer to becoming a Supreme Court justice. **I’m beyond happy. But I’m still deeply disturbed — and deeply angry — about the disrespectful treatment she received at the hands of Senate Republicans in her confirmation hearings.** Not just disagreement with her views — that’s fair game — but outright personal hostility and contempt. They sneered, interrupted, invented fake issues to attack her with, shouted, and showed a profound lack of respect for an accomplished, intelligent, thoughtful, and thoroughly professional federal judge. **And one of them, Lindsey Graham, just came right out and admitted that if the GOP controlled the Senate, she wouldn’t have even _gotten_ a hearing, let alone a vote. Infuriating, but not surprising.** **The Republicans who mugged for the cameras as they attacked Judge Jackson should be ashamed of themselves.** And they’ve made it clear that if they flip the Senate, they’ll block President Biden’s judicial nominees, just like they blocked President Obama’s. [_**Judge Jackson showed why she will make us proud as a Supreme Court justice. And Senate Republicans showed why we can’t trust them to control the chamber. Add your name if you agree that the Senate must confirm her right away.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43778019/338661974/-299026285?refcode=EMZ4E_SCO_E_20220404_V1S1&ms=EMZ4E_SCO_E_20220404_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmJiNGIyYi03MGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4W5bfOpcK-aDwZcjUzhFjZeQlcRiDn4JJWnMXcrNGQ=&emci=b4bb4b2b-70b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b6bb4b2b-70b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908) So, the hearings were tough. But there was a second part to what we saw — and that’s Judge Jackson herself. She remained calm and controlled. She gave no one any room to attack her judicial demeanor. She did not throw a tantrum, the way an earlier GOP nominee did. She persevered with courage and conviction. Together, we can look forward to a Supreme Court that has Judge Jackson’s experience. And together, we will keep up the fight for a judicial system that lives up to the words engraved on the Supreme Court: Equal Justice Under Law. We make that promise a reality by focusing on the people who sit on our courts, the senators who confirm those judges and justices, and the structural reforms we need to make. In our country’s history, 115 people have served on the Supreme Court. You know how many of them have been former federal public defenders, like Judge Jackson? Zero. And how many Black women? Another zero. Judge Jackson also has more trial court experience than any sitting Supreme Court justice, and she’ll be only the second sitting justice to have served in all three levels of the federal judiciary. Some Republicans have complained about the very idea of having a public defender on the Supreme Court. They should read the Constitution. They seem to forget that the Sixth Amendment grants criminal defendants the right to counsel. Public defenders help America live up to our constitutional ideals. Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s legal background is unusual for our federal courts. That’s not an indictment of her candidacy — it’s an indictment of the narrow, blinkered perspective of our judiciary. Her work in the trenches, representing those without means or power, provided her with an invaluable perspective into our system of justice. By bringing that experience to the Supreme Court, she will make our judiciary that much stronger. She’s exceptionally well-qualified — so it’s no wonder that the GOP has resorted to manufacturing fake objections. But it’s still appalling, and it’s no way to treat someone who’s devoted her career to exceptional public service. The Republican senators were beyond despicable during this process, and we must both hold them accountable and make sure they can’t make good on their promise to block qualified judges like Judge Jackson. **[Add your name to say you support Judge Jackson’s Supreme Court nomination. And let’s fight side by side for equal justice under law.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43778021/338661976/925484059?refcode=EMZ4E_SCO_E_20220404_V1S1&ms=EMZ4E_SCO_E_20220404_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmJiNGIyYi03MGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4W5bfOpcK-aDwZcjUzhFjZeQlcRiDn4JJWnMXcrNGQ=&emci=b4bb4b2b-70b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b6bb4b2b-70b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)** Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43778022/338661977/-2090080882?refcode=EMZ4E_SCO_E_20220404_V1S1&ms=EMZ4E_SCO_E_20220404_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmJiNGIyYi03MGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4W5bfOpcK-aDwZcjUzhFjZeQlcRiDn4JJWnMXcrNGQ=)

## **GRATEFUL TO YOU**
---
| Peter,

**The support our campaign received as we raced to meet our end-of-quarter fundraising goal was beyond what I hoped for, and I’m so grateful, humbled and appreciative of your support.**

Team Beach is growing every single day because the people of this district, just like people across the country, want a representative who brings real-life experience to the job and addresses your priorities: our environment, affordable housing and homelessness, mental health, education, women’s reproductive freedom, and a fair and equitable economy. You also want a return to civility in Washington, and a government that works for everyday people – not just the political establishment and entrenched special interests.

That’s why people from every city in our district – teachers, students, retirees, nonprofit workers, veterans and so many more – have donated from $10 to $5,000 and amounts everywhere in between to our campaign.
---
| [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=e5b907d28b&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| I can’t do this without you, let’s keep our momentum going! Join me on Saturday 4/9 in [San Mateo](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=66b43fb34c&e=de8b2615ea) and [San Carlos](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=d859420adf&e=de8b2615ea) to knock doors and talk to voters about the future of our country. **[You can RSVP and find the details here.](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=7c9171662b&e=de8b2615ea)**
---
| Onward**–**

Emily Beach

body:
I am outraged by the passing of extreme anti-choice bills across the country, including our nei | | | [](http://links.drharderforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2ce7fc2f213d46c3bce90d6745e9707f&_m=dfd99f8f983c474dace46ed99006a857&_e=lDmHVNN_257Ix6jl_-tl7QM-iMPBa_QfE7smggLfvtCmYb1xyYvMKRdIUiDJDrBqQWWN9DGpMTAKRdZ8a8etFsIiwtXJoqFxhWzJeyNh4DsPR2JWaceOgoYjINuo7BE6uQdtjGw16XwGfKekz3KtIsLCnqbmVmaBoN7F3Z2LqMTT0LebOeNdzya4otwpzDWx7sMWQiMdN5TGsHiTAODU6YVLSxENLH4MZlxoVLYjUQC33G6U3YcamWwxkMyyVtD6X6FsJnO_K_bVmTVfvSdNzEGIgbTFfx-NY3aA5H4tGyE%3D) Peter, I am outraged by the passing of extreme anti-choice bills across the country, including our neighbors in Idaho. This cannot be ignored! Last year, the House passed the Women’s Health Protection Act, which would make _Roe v Wade_ the law of the land. Now that bill is stuck in the Senate. **[Sign our petition to call on the Senate and Joe Biden to protect women’s reproductive rights by passing the Women’s Health Protection Act!](http://links.drharderforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2ce7fc2f213d46c3bce90d6745e9707f&_m=dfd99f8f983c474dace46ed99006a857&_e=lDmHVNN_257Ix6jl_-tl7QM-iMPBa_QfE7smggLfvtCmYb1xyYvMKRdIUiDJDrBqQWWN9DGpMTAKRdZ8a8etFjd2tNgy6NKUwMybQ1ErWdtqm1R8H-1tjXQ1Q0AMvvP0P1pxC44xygzYc5_sIq0Ap3k-bKfcEkn3kcieX-zhux_8ol7lP7itYJ1yxyQKNSCVxRtfZS7ZeEqi4NOQ0bK98rCFX-dDZqbp2BUnKJ3FlyihNG7StfV3whnxW-7OdRtlAlFCNiNo5dR5l5w1Bd_Ujt5-AZlQ5-2LP4kaZCxya40%3D)** **[**SIGN YOUR NAME >>>**](http://links.drharderforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2ce7fc2f213d46c3bce90d6745e9707f&_m=dfd99f8f983c474dace46ed99006a857&_e=lDmHVNN_257Ix6jl_-tl7QM-iMPBa_QfE7smggLfvtCmYb1xyYvMKRdIUiDJDrBqQWWN9DGpMTAKRdZ8a8etFgyqkd3nFBhNW7UiJDyRkeE0ZetloXp0dNQj9skTJ4Pwqtok1uHSRPgUKcxjItu9eJHgK8CHoEth7WMPRrc-4kDBUc90OnAotPsBfMXYffYGEBNchwwX5xGPbGngvCqxKbNVqNCqESaRwBMv1iqZQ9OwLFKhLdEL5SGDmwNEPH8wCiog9U7ZTMBJMn7d9KSy-Lu4Cw5hkDC1JcjbgS6AVKU%3D)** Women’s rights are non-negotiable. It is our right to choose when and how we start a family, not the government’s. That is why I am proud of the work I did on the Board of Planned Parenthood Advocates of Oregon, helping to pass Oregon’s Reproductive Health Equity Act. We must codify _Roe v Wade_ and make sure everyone, regardless of zip code and insurance status has access to the full array of reproductive healthcare. name: Team Morgan Harper
subject: The GOP is rallying behind Josh Mandel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Josh Mandel just received an endorsement from Ted Cruz — this is why it’s so dangerous.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220404-897-footer-ak&t=2&akid=897%2E90090%2E3Undc2)
**Our far-right opponent Josh Mandel just received the endorsement of Ted Cruz** — another “Big Lie” spreader who still thinks the 2020 election was stolen, is anti-reproductive rights, holds extreme and problematic immigration views, and thinks that critical race theory is “as racist as Klansmen in white sheets.”1
_No wonder Ted Cruz and Josh Mandel get along._
Establishment Republicans have officially stepped up their involvement in this race, and you can bet that it won’t only be endorsements flowing in but tons of dark money too. Our Republican opponents have a huge war chest and they want this seat to be red — no matter the cost.
**_[Can you rush a donation of $5 to our campaign right now to help Morgan defeat Josh Mandel once and for all? Ohioans deserve better than an extreme far-right conspiracy theorist.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31021?t=3&akid=897%2E90090%2E3Undc2)_**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31027?refcode=em20220404-897&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=897%2E90090%2E3Undc2)**
With our Democratic majority hanging by a thread, and our primary election **less than 30 days away** , this race is more important than ever. We can’t afford to lose even one seat, especially to someone like Josh Mandel.
[**_Will you pitch in $5 or anything you can to show Ted Cruz and Josh Mandel that the GOP establishment is not a match for our grassroots people-powered movement for Ohio?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31021?t=23&akid=897%2E90090%2E3Undc2)
We can’t do this without you.
Thank you for everything you do,
Team Morgan Harper

* * *
1 - [The Hill](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31039?t=24&akid=897%2E90090%2E3Undc2)
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220404-897-footer&t=25&refcode2=897_90090_3Undc2&akid=897%2E90090%2E3Undc2)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.

name: Peter Welch
subject: What my organizing days in Chicago taught me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Those families still inspire me.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=181%2E61531%2ERuLXfl)
Hello,
When I was twenty, I hitchhiked to Chicago to start community organizing.
I arrived during the Civil Rights movement, joining up with a group supporting Black families in the Lawndale neighborhood as they worked to end the predatory housing practices of banks, brokers, and home sellers.
Together, we staged demonstrations out in suburban Chicago where the lenders lived, organized rent payment strikes, went toe to toe with Mayor Daley to end those predatory practices, and eventually helped families in Chicago afford to buy and stay in their homes.
The families that my group was working with made change and got results because of their incredible courage, perseverance, and willingness to take enormous risks. They politely thanked us for our help, but really, I was the one who needed to thank them.
They taught me important lessons about fighting for justice, equality, and basic freedoms. They showed me how we need to address the root causes of problems—the laws that legalize and perpetuate racial discrimination, which become systemic—by fighting for policies that are just. And they’ve inspired me to keep up the fight.
I’ve always believed in listening to what people need and teaming up with them to make it happen. It’s how I worked as a community organizer, it’s how I serve my community now as congressman, and it’s how I want to continue serving as Vermont’s next senator.
I’m committed to fighting for our shared future: Medicare for All, a green economy, lower prescription drug costs, quality and affordable child care, and much more. But first, we need to win this race, and that comes down to growing this grassroots movement.
[**I’m grateful to have you on our team. If you can, please make a
contribution to this Senate campaign today and help fight to protect and strengthen our democracy.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1742?t=3&akid=181%2E61531%2ERuLXfl)
Thanks again,
Peter

---
