name: Team WisGOP
subject: One Day Out!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
Take the pledge to vote Tomorrow!

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1dayout_wi_1&n=1)
---
Hi Friend -- **Tomorrow is Election Day!!** **The Spring election is Tomorrow, April 5th** , and it is more important than ever to go to the polls and vote for candidates who value the principles of accountability, transparency, and responsibility. Your lives and the lives of your family members and children are most impacted by local government. Many candidates and current board members want to introduce and continue with policies and practices that contradict what the people of Wisconsin truly desire. We must do all we can to get everyone we know to the polls. **Do your part to make the VOICE of the people heard!** **By making this pledge, you promise to vote on April 5th** [****](https://act.wisgop.org/votepledge_wi?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1dayout_wi_1&n=2) Thank you for joining voters all around Wisconsin who are standing up to demand change! If you are unsure who is on your ballot, please visit **[myvote.wi.gov](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6tHPUOz_QyJBsFbb3HDnJj2oXbbIoglmEkF7rO8ZMAeBuay5CGbW87_VUow_ACcN&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1dayout_wi_1&n=3)** to find your sample ballot! | [](https://act.wisgop.org/votepledge_wi?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1dayout_wi_1&n=4 "Take the Pledge!") [Take the Pledge!](https://act.wisgop.org/votepledge_wi?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1dayout_wi_1&n=4)
---
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6myz1ydj26pS20sqllUBZd4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1dayout_wi_1&n=5) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tr24D9XbJYDft_QizpripYs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1dayout_wi_1&n=6) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y0VJVp2OCKNw8zDVmWeSo7yP6jlGmDIaYIm5b1oT1T4S&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1dayout_wi_1&n=7) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1dayout_wi_1&n=8)

name: Charles Booker
subject: Rand Paul’s top priority if he wins re-election this year...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, we can’t
afford six more years of Rand Paul.

This is Rand Paul’s top priority if he wins re-election this year:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220404?refcode=em20220404-1719&amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1719_346206_cUxWbI&akid=1719%2E346206%2EcUxWbI ][IMG]

I wish this man cared as much about Kentuckians as he does about his
obsession with Dr. Fauci.

While Rand is plotting his next tantrum to get on Fox News, the people of
the state he represents — my family — are suffering. Not because of Dr.
Fauci, but because of Rand Paul.

We are at the bottom of nearly every quality of life index. Our schools
are underfunded, hundreds of thousands of people haven’t had clean
drinking water in decades, and one in four people in Appalachia are living
in poverty.

I can promise you,
Peter, playing political games
isn’t going to be on the top of my mind if I get elected to the Senate.
The people of Kentucky are — and have always been — my top priority.

From ensuring that folks can afford their prescription drugs to creating
economic opportunities in communities that have been left behind. These
are the things that people care about. And that’s exactly what I’m going
to do when I get to the United States Senate.

We’re working to build a campaign that represents ALL of us, from the hood
to the holler. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220404?refcode=em20220404-1719&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1719_346206_cUxWbI&akid=1719%2E346206%2EcUxWbI ]Will you chip in $5 or anything you can
right now to support our movement to replace Rand Paul?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220404?refcode=em20220404-1719&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1719_346206_cUxWbI&akid=1719%2E346206%2EcUxWbI ]Contribute $5

Rand Paul led a dangerous push to spread COVID misinformation to make a
profit off Big Pharma. He’s voted down countless bills that would support
workers and families who have been hurt the most in this pandemic. And now
instead of focusing on ways to help Kentucky — he’s planning his next
political show.

Enough is enough. I’m running to replace Rand Paul because the cost of
inaction is too high.

I’ve lived in poverty. I’ve been unhoused. I’ve lost family members to gun
violence. I am still paying off my student loans. And I know that when our
politicians ignore these struggles, our pain only continues.

Together, we have the power to change the future of Kentucky. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220404?refcode=em20220404-1719&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&refcode2=1719_346206_cUxWbI&akid=1719%2E346206%2EcUxWbI ]But this
kind of deep organizing work requires significant resources and funding.
Please chip in $5 or anything you can today so that we can
sustain this work to replace Rand Paul.

Together,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220404-1719-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1719_346206_cUxWbI&akid=1719%2E346206%2EcUxWbI

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1719%2E346206%2EcUxWbI

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

And I know that when our politicians ignore these struggles, our pain only continues. Together, we have the power to change the future of Kentucky. [ ]But this kind of deep organizing work requires significant resources and funding. Please chip in $5 or anything you can today so that we can sustain this work to replace Rand Paul. Together, Charles Contribute to Charles Booker:

clean_body: | = | | Folks, Doyle Canning here, writing to say thank you for your continued support. Last Thursday was our biggest fundraising deadline of this campaign, and thanks to the generosity of our incredible supporters like you, we were able to surpass our End of Quarter goal, with over 1,300 contributions. Our grassroots campaign is powered by folks like you who believe that when we come together and take action we can create the political changes we need for our country and our climate. I’m incredibly grateful to be in this fight together with you, and to accept no funds from the fossil fuel industry, billionaires, or big corporate PACs. With only 43 days until the May 17th primary, we need all hands on deck! Join our volunteer events happening through the district - talking with voters, texting from home, hosting a meet and greet - you can find more information It takes a movement to power change. Thank you for being a part of it. Thank you for your generosity and continued support. name: Team Lira
subject: Empowering Texas families
body:
Peter,

This week, John took a trip down to Austin to meet with legislators and to start talking about policies that will help Texas families by bridging the gap between state and national policies.

What we love about John is that he isn’t going to wait until we elect him to start working for us, Peter — he’s already putting in the hours to serve the people of TX-23.

Will you help us send John from the state capital in Austin to the national capital in Washington, so he can continue working with state and national leaders to advocate for us and our families? Chip in any amount to stand with us in this fight.

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220404?refcode=em20220404]

John knows that to help Texas families, we have to be able to work together while fighting for bold policies that working families have been needing for years.

We have to begin building that strong bond between federal, state, and local leaders so all governments can work for the people. This trip was just the beginning of that mission for John.

John can’t wait to fight to empower Texas families by ensuring small business support, affordable, quality healthcare, long-term immigration reform with a path to citizenship, and more.

But to do that we need your help. For months like this, between the primary and the month or two before the general election, it can be difficult to build excitement and raise the money we need to keep the campaign going.

It’s essential that we keep up that momentum so we can continue getting John out to more communities to meet folks and more opportunities like this to work with legislators now, so John can hit the ground running when we WIN this election.

Chip in anything you can afford now to keep up that momentum and fund our fight on the ground.

Let’s get to work,
Team Lira

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220404?refcode=em20220404]

https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

John Lira for Congress
1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120
#8096
San Antonio, TX 78220
United States

Peter Willis,
Corporate lobbyists and dark money groups have a stranglehold on every branch of our government — and it’s time to root it out.
Last cycle, I introduced the **PAID BY Act** , which would force transparency on politicians by requiring them to disclose corporate and special interest campaign donations. Under this law, we will know exactly which politicians are selling their votes to the highest corporate bidder, undermining legislative priorities for personal gain at the expense of the people they’re supposed to serve.
But we can’t stop there. With the news of Clarence Thomas’s conflicts of interest coming to light, it’s necessary to root out corruption in the courts as well. **That’s why I’m reintroducing my PAID BY Act to the public — with new provisions for nominees to the federal courts.**
[Add your name TODAY to show your support for anti-corruption legislation that ensures politicians (and Supreme Court Justices) never put personal gain before the needs of the American people.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8oaa9asEYwibNy8ENsF8rHUoN3CLKlaskpDT7j_a6TRaA-T4CH9HpvRRjKMlpStfff3tJc5LKQj0GDw8i2k_WCRepMF5Kclre8cv-txABLXUxoUvJY6Enp1KHHgamn_ct416rTGDaqtqCUqLx5nNfREF8Y1gBpVfApoQIbpRhaQYEiDw0dtRC0pAXomxT9r-QOos7fdvT-l1hhhWJSH3I4_N4FFXPxnN-hMrnsrmW2DRmN-QEcyNUtw6lO51MAIYi7cRJ5U077gVy25pPHdf0EmfgyHTDg8ju6mJ3cEKxJvrtodXPGot6IsUu-y0y3BZR62QcMgRrakP0t-pTciXOQanBqwnEbi5GxFRaoJiZSW8/3kx/_hgmaBj7TGy0lc3lqRywyQ/h1/E7in0s871Gb6Le2NBX0w7mMeCpoJQm232QHJR3_eCkA)

****
Here’s how the new provisions for federal court nominees would work:
1. My plan would require dark money groups lobbying for federal judicial appointments to disclose their donors.

2. My plan would require judicial nominees to publicly disclose possible conflicts of interest during a nomination process, and on a yearly basis if confirmed.

3. And finally, my plan would require the Administrative Office of the U.S. Courts to investigate nominees’ history of conduct as well as their public disclosures — and make their findings and recommendations public _before_ the Senate votes to confirm.

I was the first candidate in my race to call for Clarence Thomas’s removal. And today, I’m proud to be the first candidate in my race to release a plan to make sure we never see that level of corruption again.
**I got into this race to be a champion for working people, and to speak truth to power on their behalf.** Americans deserve representation that fights in their best interest, and if they don’t, we deserve to know who they’re paid by.
I’m calling on all the candidates in my primary to join me in supporting this comprehensive, common-sense plan—and I’m asking you to join me in this fight as well. | Team, did you know that Arizona is now in its 26th straight year in a drought? Now, forecasters say our drought is **likely to worsen this spring!**

For Arizonans who rely on the Colorado River for water, the situation is growing direr by the year. Without a doubt, climate change has made a tough problem even worse.

Democrats have brought millions to Arizona to upgrade our water infrastructure, thanks to the bipartisan infrastructure bill.

**_A bill in which every AZ GOP member of Congress voted NO!_**

**[Team, the AZ GOP is chasing election fraud fantasies instead of focusing on problems that matter the most. clean_body: | | | Help protect our Democratic majorities | | | Team, did you know that Arizona is now in its 26th straight year in a drought? Now, forecasters say our drought is likely to worsen this spring! For Arizonans who rely on the Colorado River for water, the situation is growing direr by the year. Without a doubt, climate change has made a tough problem even worse. Democrats have brought millions to Arizona to upgrade our water infrastructure, thanks to the bipartisan infrastructure bill. A bill in which every AZ GOP member of Congress voted NO! Arizona is not the only state dealing with water shortages or extreme climate issues. While the GOP is chasing the lies and fantasies of the last president, our Democratic majorities are delivering results. If we want to continue to find solutions to tough issues, we need to keep Democrats in charge. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you, AZ Dems For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . body:
Read what's new with Tanya's campaign. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4ff81c7552aa/team-tanya-alert-former-senator-jon-kyl-endorses-tanya-wheeless-7041933?e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| | |
---
| | | **Tanya For Arizona Campaign Round-Up**
From officially qualifying to be on the ballot to Chair Elise Stefanik's endorsement, this was a BIG week for Team Tanya.

**We made it on the ballot! Thank you!!**

Thank you so much to all of you who helped knock doors and signed Tanya's petition yourself. This week Team Tanya turned in over 3,000 signatures to get Tanya on the ballot. This is just the beginning as we look to defeat Greg Stanton and flip this seat red. Rest assured, Tanya is ready for the battle ahead and she's thrilled to have you along for the ride.

**ICYMI: Chair Elise Stefanik endorsed Tanya at a press conference this week.**

Chair Elise Stefanik announced her endorsement of Tanya at a press conference this week. Rep. Elise Stefanik is a champion for Republican Women stepping up to run for office as she uses E-PAC to support Republican women running for office. Tanya is proud to have her support and looks forward to working with her to take back our country on November 8th.
[_**WATCH THE PRESS CONFERENCE HERE**_](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=826f3a7c17&e=bd2b55b0e3)

name: Team Scheller
subject: Will you stand with Lisa?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
We need Conservative fighters representing the great state of Pennsylvania. Lisa is a true Conservative leader, fighting to restore American greatness Peter, **_We need Conservative fighters representing the great state of Pennsylvania. _** Lisa is a true Conservative leader, fighting to restore American greatness by lowering taxes, bringing American energy independence back, empowering parents, and so much more. **Nancy Pelosi and Susan Wild** are undermining our great country and Pennsylvania **_every SINGLE day_** in Washington, and we need to send a message that proud Americans won’t stand for it. Unfortunately, our country is far weaker today than it was just 3 short years ago... clean_body: We need Conservative fighters representing the great state of Pennsylvania. name: Malcolm Kenyatta for Senate
subject: Pennsylvania voters have 3 options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Friends,
Last night’s debate in Allentown made one thing perfectly clear: Pennsylvania voters have 3 options in this year’s Democratic primary for U.S. Senate.
They can choose a senator who literally won’t show up for them...
They can choose a senator who voted to fund Trump’s border wall...
Or, they can choose a senator who will listen to them, empathize with them, and fight for them in the United States Senate.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43773210/338641922/-347403939?refcode2=e1ef85d2-58b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220404-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWVmODVkMi01OGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R7Mwv482ZdpcC3chiwLPCi7LygXBkPQ6HouGRvs3TbY=)
Only Malcolm will be that senator — but he needs your help to win this primary next month and flip Pennsylvania’s open Senate seat.
We only have 43 days left to reach as many voters as we can across all of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties, and it’s going to take a huge amount of resources to do it. So we are asking:
Can we count on your to show up for Malcolm today, just like he showed up for working families across Pennsylvania and the country on last night’s debate stage?
[Please make a contribution to show the world the strength of this grassroots campaign and power our campaign to victory in next month’s Democratic primary.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43773211/338641923/-347403939?refcode2=e1ef85d2-58b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220404-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWVmODVkMi01OGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R7Mwv482ZdpcC3chiwLPCi7LygXBkPQ6HouGRvs3TbY=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43773212/338641924/-347403939?refcode2=e1ef85d2-58b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220404-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWVmODVkMi01OGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R7Mwv482ZdpcC3chiwLPCi7LygXBkPQ6HouGRvs3TbY=)**
Your support means so much to Malcolm, and to this team.
Thank you,
Team Malcolm

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tyler=20Lee=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Calling All Moms!
body:
Moms, join me for a free cup of coffee from 10AM to 11AM on Thursday, April 7th at Wake Coffee Co. | |
---
| | |
---
| Moms,

Come enjoy a free cup of coffee with me from 10AM to 11AM on Thursday, April 7th at Wake Coffee Co.

It will be important and insightful for me to hear from you. I'll share my platform, listen to your concerns and observations, and answer any questions you may have. Please register here: [Tyler Lee for Congress Facebook](https://VoteTylerLee.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d53477f3b0918affd4642c9ec&id=0909ddea32&e=4ed8243e91)

I look forwarding to seeing you there!

Regards,

Tyler Lee

---
| **Background on Tyler Lee**

Tyler Lee is a proponent of America First policies. He has a history of taking on projects others shy away from by successfully bringing new life and vision.

Tyler graduated with a Bachelor’s Degree in Business Marketing from Liberty University. During his tenure at Liberty, he served as the Executive Assistant to the President. In 2011, he opened a sweetFrog self-serve frozen yogurt franchise; he was the youngest store owner in company history. In 2017, Tyler began buying and renovating houses across the Carolinas and Virginia, contributing hundreds of jobs to local communities.

Tyler is an active member and serves as an usher at his church in Charlotte, Freedom House Church.

Tyler will bring his successful business experience to Congress to make a positive difference on improving the economy, stopping runaway inflation, and preserving our conservative values.

name: Team Padilla
subject: We’re writing to ask you to join Alex in supporting President Biden’s Billionaire Minimum Income Tax
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
It’s important to have a big, grassroots movement fighting alongside us.
#

Hey there,
We’re writing today to ask you to join Alex in supporting President Biden’s Billionaire Minimum Income Tax.
We’ll explain more in a minute, but if you’re already on board, please let us know here:
[**https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/Tax-The-Billionaires**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Billionaire-tax-em-apr22/?source=em220404-1-30&refcode2=719.159979.IL8dCP&akid=719%2E159979%2EIL8dCP)
It’s a simple proposal when it comes down to it:
Under President Biden’s Billionaire Minimum Income Tax, no household worth over $100 million will pay less than 20% in taxes. Over half of the revenue would come from those worth more than $1 billion.
That seems pretty fair, don’t you think? $100 million is a LOT of money, and 20% is a lower tax rate than many teachers or first responders who live on much, much less than that.
And particularly as we’ve seen the rich become even richer over the course of the coronavirus pandemic, it’s all the more important that they pay their fair share and ensure our country has the resources to give _everyone_ a chance to succeed.
**But the ultra wealthy are not going to give up without a fight, so it’s important to have a big, grassroots movement fighting alongside us.**
[**Can you add your name to stand with Alex and say you support President Biden’s Billionaire Minimum Income Tax?**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Billionaire-tax-em-apr22/?source=em220404-1-30&refcode2=719.159979.IL8dCP&akid=719%2E159979%2EIL8dCP)
Thank you!
\- Team Padilla
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Billionaire-tax-em-apr22/?source=em220404-1-30&refcode2=719.159979.IL8dCP&akid=719%2E159979%2EIL8dCP)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate

clean_body: | | | We finished our first quarter strong! I couldn't have done it without grassroots supporters like you. = Thank you. We're building a movement of people who believe that change is possible and who are ready to work for it. And what a movement! Since the start of this campaign thousands of individuals have pitched in to fuel the fight, and I'm very grateful. We have a real path to victory with your support and the support of over 70 elected officials and community leaders, and 15 prominent organizations including five unions, Planned Parenthood Action Fund, and the League of Conservation Voters Action Fund. I'm honored to stand at your side. Your support means so much. Andrea P.S. Weren't able to give before the end of the quarter? No problem! With only 23 days until ballots drop for the primary, and an out-of-state billionaire ramping up spending to buy this seat, I still need your support.= Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Andrea Salinas for Oregon. ---|--- | This email was sent by Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 United States Email is an important way for Andrea Salinas to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. | Dear Friend,

**We’ve officially qualified for the GOP primary in June!**

I am overwhelmed by the support we’ve received from volunteers across the state. **We couldn’t have done it without you,** so from the bottom of my heart,**thank you. **

You are part of an **unprecedented movement,** and it’s time to elect a senator **who values the vision we share** for our state and country.
---
| As always, **thank you for your enduring support.** Together, we can bring more productive, proactive, and inclusive solutions to Washington.

**Share this with a friend and stay connected as #TeamBecky prepares for the primary on June 28th!**
**Let’s do this! **

clean_body: Our Democrat opponent isn’t even hiding it: he needs West Coast money to win in Georgia. | Fellow American, Our Democrat opponent raised $9.8 million in the last quarter of 2021, and a whopping 25% of his online money came from just three states on the West Coast (California, Oregon and Washington)! Take a look at an email from a liberal PAC raising dollars for this race: Fellow American, if you want to stop West Coast Democrats from turning Georgia into the next California, - If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | I'm running for Senate because I represent the conservative values of Georgians - not West Coast Democrats. A victory here will put our country back on the right track. Please don't let the Left Coast buy the Senate seat in Georgia! Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican for U.S. Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Then, our team was honored to receive the endorsement of former State Senator Art Helton. Marylanders are in need of smart, sustainable, and safe housing options, which Art has dedicated his career to providing. He's a phenomenal businessman whose company has created jobs and housing for countless Harford County residents. Even better, Art has always respected the environment by renovating existing properties instead of developing new buildings. It's great to have him on Team Gansler-Hollingsworth!

name: John + Gisele Fetterman
subject: Standing room only in “red” PA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We can + will compete in every county in Pennsylvania.
#
Hi Derek, it’s John + Gisele.
We just got back from putting another few hundred miles on the Ram in southern PA! Now it’s time to tell (+ show) yinz how exciting things are getting on the ground.
But first, we need to say **THANK YOU, Derek** 🙏. The unmatched enthusiasm we’re seeing from voters across the Commonwealth is *only* possible because of grassroots supporters like you powering our campaign to fight for Every County, Every Vote.
[**_If you feel ready, we’d be so, so grateful if you donate your first $5 to keep us on the road + face-to-face with voters._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46308?amount=5&refcode=em20220404-5254&t=1&akid=5254%2E434096%2ENfECQB)
Okay. Let’s get to the good stuff!
Our first stop was Bedford County, where Trump won 84%-16% in 2016. Let’s face it, not every Democrat is going to invest time in a place like Bedford. But we’re SO glad we did, because dozens of folks showed up to meet John! Including one cute-as-a-button future PA voter. 🗳️
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46308?refcode=em20220404-5254&t=2&akid=5254%2E434096%2ENfECQB)
Next up was Chambersburg, another deep-red county 🔴. But guess what? Our meet-and-greet ended up being _standing room only_. This is the energy we need to win in November, Derek. 👇
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46308?refcode=em20220404-5254&t=3&akid=5254%2E434096%2ENfECQB)
Our last + biggest stop of the entire trip was in Gettysburg. John got to share our message with over 170 folks at a meet-and-greet, and we even got to spend time with the Gettysburg College Democrats, who we just couldn’t be more proud of. 💪
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46308?refcode=em20220404-5254&t=4&akid=5254%2E434096%2ENfECQB)
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46308?refcode=em20220404-5254&t=5&akid=5254%2E434096%2ENfECQB)
_Gisele: I’m *totally* blending in with the students, right? Lie to me please 😂 _
Listen, we seriously can’t thank folks in Bedford, Chambersburg, and Gettysburg enough for showing up + offering us such deeply heartfelt hospitality. It’s hard to pick, but maybe one of the most special moments was getting this card from Sean + Andrea. ❤️
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46308?refcode=em20220404-5254&t=6&akid=5254%2E434096%2ENfECQB)
**We're so, so proud to be running a clean, kind and honest Democratic campaign.** Kindness has long been missing in politics and we need to elect leaders who will change politics for good. **We also believe not all money is good money.** With us, there will never be any dirty corporate PAC money. No shady super PACs. Just people power, all the way.
[**_That said, we’d be so grateful if you chipped in your first $5 today to help us get back on the road ASAP. With our grassroots campaign, any amount you can spare makes a difference._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46308?amount=5&refcode=em20220404-5254&t=7&akid=5254%2E434096%2ENfECQB)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46308?amount=5&refcode=em20220404-5254&t=26&akid=5254%2E434096%2ENfECQB)**
Thank you, thank you, thank you so much for all you do for our campaign, Derek. Together, we can + will compete in every county in Pennsylvania!
With love from our family to yours,
John + Gisele Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220404-5254-footer&t=27&refcode2=5254_434096_NfECQB&akid=5254%2E434096%2ENfECQB)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=28&akid=5254%2E434096%2ENfECQB)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=5254%2E434096%2ENfECQB)

Hey friends, A lot happened in March — in large part due to your generosity of endorsements, time, and financial resources. I wanted to share some special thanks: > Thank you to the hundreds of local Democrats who put their faith in our vision and helped my campaign earn the **_unanimous_ endorsement of the California Democratic Party!** > Thank you to the volunteers who knocked on doors, hosted meet and greets, and joined Team Kermit at parades across the district. We had a blast and can’t wait to see you again soon. > Finally, thank you to our donors. **Last month we hit 10,000 donations, reached our FEC End-of-Quarter goal, and even raised more than $18,000 for medical supplies for Ukraine!** It is clear the community is ready for change, and that the momentum is on our side to flip this seat blue in November. Thank you, and onward! — Dr. Kermit Jones [P.S. name: Team Erica Smith
subject: [Add your Name] Tell Democratic leaders to say in one voice: Putin's invasion reaffirms America must lead on clean energy. End dependence on fossil fuels!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
Russia's invasion of Ukraine reaffirms that America must lead the world in a clean energy transition.
#
Russia's invasion of Ukraine reaffirms that America must lead the world in a clean energy transition.
Our dependence on fossil fuel harms our environment and empowers authoritarians like Vladimir Putin, rogue oil-producing nations, and price-gouging oil companies. **For the sake of our national security and planet, we call on our leaders to take immediate action to invest in domestic clean energy jobs and end our dependence on fossil fuel.**
[**If you agree, will you sign the petition to demand that our Democratic leaders say in one voice: America must lead on clean energy. End dependence on fossil fuels!**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/47748?t=1&akid=1059%2E3698%2EzgiyrN) _Signatures will be delivered to the White House and allies in Congress._
**[Sign the Petition](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/47748?t=2&akid=1059%2E3698%2EzgiyrN)**
In addition to the national security and climate imperatives for ending our dependence on fossil fuels, the corporations that supply fossil fuels are using the tragedy in Ukraine to price-gouge Americans at the pump.
**Right now, in North Carolina and across the country, we’re paying more for gas while Big Oil is raking in massive profits.** Bloomberg News reports that billionaire oil and gas CEOs increased their net worths by more than 10% since Russia invaded Ukraine last month — that’s over $24 billion!
Why? Corporate greed. Tycoons and the corporations they own shouldn't get rich off of human suffering. If we end our dependence on fossil fuel, they won’t.
[**It’s time for a clean energy future that’ll create millions of good-paying jobs and secure energy freedom — that’s why Erica Smith is proud to join the Sierra Club, League of Conservation Voters, and others calling on our Democratic leaders to act. Will you add your name to join us?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/47748?t=3&akid=1059%2E3698%2EzgiyrN)
— Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220404-1059-footer&t=4&refcode2=1059_3698_zgiyrN&akid=1059%2E3698%2EzgiyrN)**

PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
clean_body: Russia's invasion of Ukraine reaffirms that America must lead the world in a clean energy transition. Russia's invasion of Ukraine reaffirms that America must lead the world in a clean energy transition. Our dependence on fossil fuel harms our environment and empowers authoritarians like Vladimir Putin, rogue oil-producing nations, and price-gouging oil companies. For the sake of our national security and planet, we call on our leaders to take immediate action to invest in domestic clean energy jobs and end our dependence on fossil fuel. Signatures will be delivered to the White House and allies in Congress. In addition to the national security and climate imperatives for ending our dependence on fossil fuels, the corporations that supply fossil fuels are using the tragedy in Ukraine to price-gouge Americans at the pump. Right now, in North Carolina and across the country, we’re paying more for gas while Big Oil is raking in massive profits. Bloomberg News reports that billionaire oil and gas CEOs increased their net worths by more than 10% since Russia invaded Ukraine last month — that’s over $24 billion! Why? Corporate greed. Tycoons and the corporations they own shouldn't get rich off of human suffering. If we end our dependence on fossil fuel, they won’t. — Team Erica Smith Email us: mailto: info@ericaforus.com

body:

Educators and Allies Tomorrow is Election Day in Wisconsin, and right now, our 17 School Board Champions are fighting for every last vote. **Elect Educators Everywhere is proud to help these selfless educators tell their stories to voters throughout Wisconsin. They are champions for students, educators, and parents alike. ** **** | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43775148/338648648/-1107671996?refcode=em_20220404wisbedayeveb_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5NTA5ZTEwLTYwYjQtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4RZS5iA3hotuIPLoLpyx43MYgdfArIZ-K941UF7thz8=)
---
Last fall, in similar school board elections in Ohio, one educator won by just 46 votes. We expect one of these educators will be in a razors-edge election too, but since we don't who it will be, we're making sure to help all of them.
[Please support our final voter education push for these candidates now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43775149/338648649/-1107671996?refcode=em_20220404wisbedayeveb_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5NTA5ZTEwLTYwYjQtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4RZS5iA3hotuIPLoLpyx43MYgdfArIZ-K941UF7thz8=)
We can't afford to let QAnon conspiracy theorists, avowed racists, and anti-LGBTQ bigots take over local school boards and harm students. And with your help, we don't have to sit by and watch them do it.
We're finalizing plans to make sure everyone in their districts knows what's at stake in these elections and how valuable an educator's experience is to students.
While right-wing candidates are promising to ban books, censor history, and roll back anti-discrimination policies, these educators are focused on what students need to thrive and what educators need to serve their kids.
Thanks in advance for your support,
Elect Educators Everywhere

college faculty, and all types of public educators to office from coast to coast. With your help, we can ensure that educators have a seat at the table when it comes to making policy decisions in this country.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathleen?=
subject: It will take all of us.
body:
In 2020, Democrats made huge | |
---
| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=bf3e2198af&e=4712f71bea)
---
| **Friends,**

In 2020, Democrats and patriots like us fought to make generational progress at the ballot box in Texas, winning Joe Biden the most votes in Texas that any Democrat has ever received.

In 2022, if we want to live in a country we can be proud of, we must put in even more work to make progress. I'm asking you for that increased level of vigor and determination as we work to deliver for Texans in this time of crisis-- so we can make _real history_ in Texas. We can win this race for the 13th AND bring the Blue Wave to Texas, but it will take all of us working our hardest to get it done.

[Your support is indispensable to our campaign. Will you contribute $5 before we fall behind our MAGA funded opponent?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=9fd3074a64&e=4712f71bea)

Whether you've heard of my candidacy from the day I announced, or you're just coming on board now, I'm so grateful to have you on our team.

Just months from now, we can shock Texas and the world, bringing the 13th representation it can be proud of for the first time in a generation. I know how much of your time, effort, and dollars this fight will take, which is why I am honored to work alongside you all.

[So, will you help our campaign stay on track by contributing $5 or whatever you can afford?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=d7611a9987&e=4712f71bea)

Thank you for anything you can give,

Kathleen Brown
Democrat
TX-13

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Victory: Court Declares Unconstitutional California’s Racial, Ethnic, LGBT Quota for Corporate Boards
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that a California court ruled unconstitutional the state’s racial, ethnic, and LGBT quota for corporate boards of directors. The court granted Judicial Watch’s motion for summary judgment in its taxpayer lawsuit asking the court to declare the quota scheme unconstitutional under California’s constitution.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Apr 4, 2022
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58489&L=27054&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcXVvdGEtZm9yLWNvcnBvcmF0ZS1ib2FyZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) | **[Judicial Watch Victory: Court Declares Unconstitutional California’s Racial, Ethnic, LGBT Quota for Corporate Boards](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58489&L=27054&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcXVvdGEtZm9yLWNvcnBvcmF0ZS1ib2FyZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)** Judicial Watch announced recently that a California court ruled unconstitutional the state’s racial, ethnic, and LGBT quota for corporate boards of directors. The court granted Judicial Watch’s motion for summary judgment in its taxpayer lawsuit asking the court to declare the quota scheme unconstitutional under California’s constitution. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58489&L=27054&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcXVvdGEtZm9yLWNvcnBvcmF0ZS1ib2FyZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58489&L=27055&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGhyZWF0cy10by1lbGVjdGlvbi1vZmZpY2lhbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) | **[Judicial Watch Sues Justice Department for Records about Task Force Set Up to Address Threats to Election Officials](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58489&L=27055&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGhyZWF0cy10by1lbGVjdGlvbi1vZmZpY2lhbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)** Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) for records concerning a new task force set up to address threats to election officials. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58489&L=27055&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGhyZWF0cy10by1lbGVjdGlvbi1vZmZpY2lhbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58489&L=27059&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY292aWQtMTktYm9vc3RlcnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) | **[Judicial Watch Sues HHS for Records about Gov Agency Research into COVID-19 Boosters](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58489&L=27059&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY292aWQtMTktYm9vc3RlcnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)** “The American people deserve to know the data about COVID-19 vaccines and boosters, especially data hidden by little known but powerful government agencies such as BARDA,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58489&L=27059&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY292aWQtMTktYm9vc3RlcnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58489&L=27060&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2lkZS1lZmZlY3RzLWdvdnQtYmFja2VkLWhwdi12YWNjaW5lLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) | **[More Debilitating Side Effects after Teens Get Government-Backed HPV Vaccine](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58489&L=27060&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2lkZS1lZmZlY3RzLWdvdnQtYmFja2VkLWhwdi12YWNjaW5lLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)** Despite life-threatening side effects exposed by Judicial Watch more than a decade ago the government keeps pushing a dangerous cervical and genital cancer vaccine for children and two recent legal cases help illustrate the ongoing risks. The vaccine is called Gardasil and in the last ten years Judicial Watch has uncovered troves of government records documenting its harmful side effects, though adverse event reports don’t necessarily mean a causal connection to the vaccines. The vaccine was scandalously fast-tracked by the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) and was ardently promoted by the Obama administration as a miracle shot that can prevent certain strains of cervical and genital cancer caused by the sexually transmitted Human Papillomavirus (HPV). The vaccine is called Gardasil and in the last ten years Judicial Watch has uncovered troves of government records documenting its harmful side effects, though adverse event reports don’t necessarily mean a causal connection to the vaccines. The vaccine was scandalously fast-tracked by the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) and was ardently promoted by the Obama administration as a miracle shot that can prevent certain strains of cervical and genital cancer caused by the sexually transmitted Human Papillomavirus (HPV). = ---|--- | | | The Wall Street Journal The conservative legal outfit Judicial Watch sued, arguing the law violated the state Constitution’s equal protection clause by establishing explicit set-asides based on racial, ethnic or sexual preference. TimCast.com The lawsuit was filed by Judicial Watch, a nonprofit judicial and government watchdog group, on behalf of 12 registered Maryland voters who “object to Maryland’s 2021 congressional redistricting plan on the grounds that it is a partisan gerrymander that diminishes their rights to participate in free, fair elections for the U.S. Congress on an equal basis with other Maryland voters, in violation of the Maryland Constitution. The trial also included plaintiffs from a separate lawsuit,” the group wrote in a press release. NPR The brief ruling granted summary judgment to Judicial Watch, a conservative legal group that sought a permanent injunction against the measure that was signed into law last year. Did you see Gov. Lujan Grisham's message, Peter? I'm reaching out because there are HOURS left before our fundraising blackout, and **the Governor is STILL short of her midnight goal.**
From December to early March, the Governor wasn't able to raise _a single dollar_ due to regulations around legislative sessions. After only three weeks of fundraising, she's heading into ANOTHER fundraising blackout at midnight.
**This is bad news, Peter _._ The GOP is pushing harder than ever to remove Gov. Lujan Grisham from office. If we run out of resources, we may have to make budget cuts just when this race is heating up. **

[Please, will you donate $5 – or even more! – to help the Governor reach her midnight goal and keep New Mexico blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43776086/338653335/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1210-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGNkMDY0Ny02M2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iQO16kgC4RMCeAThyJF4sYA06ZVk2YRFneITepRvp2M=)
Thanks for your help,

Margaret

subject: The mandates may be gone, but the consequences aren't.
body:

| | | | Dear Friend,

Since Kate Brown finally lifted her mask and vaccine mandates a few weeks ago, the State of Oregon has been quietly finding other ways to intimidate those who have decided not to get the vaccine. That includes refusing to re-hire former state employees who were previously fired for not getting the vaccine -- _**even though it's no longer a requirement for work!**_ All of this amid a worker shortage, no less.

It's clearer than ever that we can't trust Salem politicians to keep their word. We need a governor who brings no nonsense business experience to get our state back on the right track. _**If you agree, will you donate to our grassroots campaign?**_ The primary is just over a month away, and we need all the support we can get to win this primary and restore balance to state government!

---
| [Donate Today!](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=8f664a06b7&e=7e91be8cad "Donate Today!")
---
| Salem politicians have all of their priorities backward. It's time for new leadership that will respect Oregonians' medical decisions, period. | |
Thanks for your support,

Jessica Gomez
Republican for Governor

name: George Bochetto
subject: Have you heard the news?
body:
|
---
Peter, If you weren’t already aware, there is a U.S. Senate debate coming up on April 25. Having been endorsed by law enforcement organizations across Pennsylvania, I have proven that I am the conservative choice for Pennsylvania. **HOWEVER.** The debate organizers have now set an arbitrary public polling threshold in order to be admitted to the debate - stopping campaigns like ours from presenting our vision for a better Pennsylvania. **This is outrageous!** **If you stand with my conservative, grassroots campaign and agree that ALL candidates on the ballot should be able to speak to the 50% of undecided GOP voters at this April 25 debate, sign our petition today!** [****](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYhRECXP9zpGAeiJcLx1o7CFxRyGLgQBGzjK4pI1wax-O83DzdtjosCNHDa8Mo--BkQ&e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_email_1&n=1) The debate organizers’ decision to exclude our grassroots campaign is an affront to democracy. They are saying, in effect, that money can buy this election because ultra-wealthy, self-funding candidates from out of state have stacked the deck with millions of dollars in ads before other candidates have a chance to introduce themselves to the public. **Incredibly, more than fifty percent of primary voters are still undecided. That means many are still in search of another candidate to support.** I implore the debate organizers to allow all legitimate candidates who have earned a place on the Election Day ballot to participate. It is the organizers’ duty and obligation to treat everyone fairly - not put their thumb on the scale to help Goliath defeat David. **If you stand with my conservative, grassroots campaign, donate $25 RIGHT NOW to help me fight back. ** [](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYhRECXP9zpGAeiJcLx1o7CFFPtuewKeicOw2OZyISYhTgm-LMRCui3arKNxYYTvPYA&e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_email_1&n=2) Without you, our campaign cannot stay up on television through Election Day. Thank you for your support, George Bochetto
Bochetto for Senate · PA 19102, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_email_1&n=3).

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Cancel it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, the moratorium on federal student loan payments is set to expire on May 1st.
**That's a big problem:** 9 in 10 student loan borrowers aren't prepared for payments to resume, especially as the rising costs of groceries and basic necessities eat into their paychecks.
**But there's a solution to this crisis:** With a swipe of the pen, President Biden can free millions of people across America from the crushing burden of nearly $2 trillion in student loan debt.
[**Can you add your name next to mine on a grassroots petition urging the president not just to extend the moratorium again — but immediately**** _cancel_****student loan debt?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11895?t=1&akid=1159%2E420207%2EHPPAmu)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11895?t=2&akid=1159%2E420207%2EHPPAmu)**
Forgiving student debt is an economic issue AND a racial justice issue. Women hold two-thirds of student debt, and Black borrowers owe $25,000 more on average than white borrowers.
And the burden of student loan debt is not just a pandemic problem — 1 in 4 borrowers were already behind on payments even before the very first case of COVID-19 was found in America. **Restarting student loan payments will dramatically increase delinquencies, causing unnecessary financial catastrophe for many Americans.**
[**Enough. It's time to cancel student loan debt once and for all. If you agree, add your name to our petition today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11896?t=3&akid=1159%2E420207%2EHPPAmu)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11895?t=4&akid=1159%2E420207%2EHPPAmu)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220404-1159-footer&t=5&refcode2=1159_420207_HPPAmu&akid=1159%2E420207%2EHPPAmu)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=1159%2E420207%2EHPPAmu)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1159%2E420207%2EHPPAmu)

body:
| | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDH71PPGrEzdfegloc-4ZZqW99zJc5MzSVzm_NrFMisweTmMwHq_7Xb0U1QiZD-lwuunZrR6nVggzuwjf-GROjeKZ95ZyINDIKVRk1XQsPfxYPUoTsZ8KIb8toUNu-OVA8NO5h00BQHqjI9UEZLfXkkU-LDakpCDehvKU_DomoPzjOreqVIFXzz4IVE1WfRa_aEYwLkbEw_V2MZrO9Hx9UqWwI18Q4rZAIVB2P6iYjC9_/3kx/Yrqn2yJMSUOtqWVbFdcwtw/h0/hx3sNMGFLI07NmRVG6YynEc4YzdvsiiF2FNhgk6Cfws)

Hi Peter, The latest polling from WA-03 says that if the election were held today, I'd be the frontrunner in the race. The bad news is that the Republican challenger from the (far) right, Joe Kent, is polling right behind me. People are rightfully fed up with our inaccessible and out-of-touch incumbent GOP Rep Jaime Herrera Beutler, but we cannot allow Trump-endorsed Joe Kent to gain power in Congress. I'm not a career politician. I'm a stay-at-home dad who's ready to go to Congress to fight for all our kids' futures and heal Washington. There is no way around it: Our Congressional majority and our democracy are in deep trouble. But my team and I know exactly what we need to do to win this race. We'll need to purchase our direct mail campaign, literature for our field team to leave at the doors, and signage out across the district. I also need to grow my team. But right now, we don't have the budget to plan ahead and execute. I've set a realistic goal for our team this week. The best way to get us in a position to plan ahead is to grow our recurring money -- that's money we can count on coming in monthly. If 130 people step up to become Sustaining Members of our team, we will significantly increase our odds of flipping WA-03 and stop the GOP from doing any more damage. So if you're ready to help us defeat our out-of-touch incumbent and stop a far-right darling from gaining a seat in Congress, I need you with me today. Can I count on you to step up with a monthly contribution to our campaign now? You can use this link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brent-hennrich-for-washington](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zdG1fUgG8aFKTw4TdAFcV3OYIkIXLeXYGdiD76HGOclWZYG428h3SLdZNmun5o9X7VDxoXQLi_BOhtle6qURl-lUcKt0sRSHPYMMFH-Xd_3BsxeYcSXKdIdm2qRwr27CmS17rKffCJEZcY737FaZVmpn0f0r6L6h3bdEZNstBQlXvg-B6KD0kHaLNoExfU1zjxT3aJIU8DQguUeijAriRICY9C26wlc5Sj28S982t6GzVD6ohaO3xrPhuipMX9joF6kdzu4VrwCyiKkgE9Roahb6fBm2wB1LWt3TUi33MhbgM9mYxdUs-piQ0z_j7D-mktteweUwcsBUpdB6T3sfth/3kx/Yrqn2yJMSUOtqWVbFdcwtw/h1/VShnYhmSpkzWDpVlnwb33FRTxGuZa1068Wert5B9Rp0)** I appreciate your support. | | Peter,

First and foremost, we want to thank you for being part of our team.

Grassroots supporters like you have stepped up in a big way to help get out our message, as we ramp up to rally common-sense conservatives behind us to SEND MTG PACKING!

**Today, we just wanted to remind you that you must be registered to vote in this primary.**

[**Follow this link to check your status & register to vote if necessary >>>**](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=8f74b6a7f2&e=daf3f68050)

| Don’t wait until it’s too late. The deadline to register is coming up fast on **April 25th.**

And early in-person voting in this primary will begin in just FOUR WEEKS on May 2nd!

Every vote counts – it's all hands on deck to get folks out to the polls to defeat MTG and her outsider backers and restore representation for our 14th District communities in Congress.

[**Please make sure you’re registered to vote**](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=5f2cbad644&e=daf3f68050), and then share this message with your family and friends. Urge them to check their status too, and to VOTE FOR JENNIFER STRAHAN in the Republican primary for this seat.

\- Jennifer Strahan & Team Strahan

PS – [_If you’d like to help us start off April strong in regards to fundraising, please consider contributing $5, $20.22_ or any amount to help us send Jennifer to Congress and send MTG home!](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=0f8adc94d5&e=daf3f68050)

name: Brad Pfaff
subject: My story:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
I wanted to share my story with you, and tell you how it shaped me into the person I am today.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43777095/338658389/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.04.04_b1_story_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjg5NWRmNS02YWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d2jZ8G6fiaEqlDkmtIGpAjFV2jhaElxCJpxlo_1ogWY=)
---
I wanted to share my story with you, and tell you how it shaped me into the person I am today.

**[I hope you’ll read it all the way through and, if you can, chip in a few of your hard-earned dollars to help me raise the kind of money I need to defeat a Capitol Insurrectionist>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43777096/338658390/-774467154?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.04.04_b1_story_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.04.04_b1_story_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjg5NWRmNS02YWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d2jZ8G6fiaEqlDkmtIGpAjFV2jhaElxCJpxlo_1ogWY=)**

I was raised on a dairy farm right here in rural Wisconsin. I met my wife here, and we raised our family here, just as my family has done since they came to our country in the 1800s. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43777097/338658391/-774467154?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.04.04_b1_story_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.04.04_b1_story_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjg5NWRmNS02YWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d2jZ8G6fiaEqlDkmtIGpAjFV2jhaElxCJpxlo_1ogWY=) That’s how I know that rural America is just as important as anywhere else.

I had my dream job as Secretary of the Wisconsin Department of Agriculture, Trade and Consumer Protection. I understood the help and protections that our farmers were looking for.

**But after I sparred with Republican legislators over funding for a farmer suicide prevention program, they unanimously voted to fire me from the job.**

Even though it cost me my job, I don’t regret speaking out. I saw a need, and I will always fight for what’s right.

Because that’s what rural Americans do. We don’t just go away. We’re resilient. So, I ran for State Senate. And I won. Instead of going away, I’m with them every day, holding Madison accountable to the people of Wisconsin.

**But my opponent, Derrick Van Orden? Well, he was a part of the Capitol Riots on January 6th and then tried to lie to Wisconsinites about it.**

We can’t let a person like that represent us in Congress. So I’m going to win this race the only way I know how: by going everywhere and talking with everyone. But I won’t kid myself. I know it’s going to be a tough race, so I need your help to build this campaign strong.

**[Will you chip in $5 to help us start this month strong? clean_body: I wanted to share my story with you, and tell you how it shaped me into the person I am today. | = I wanted to share my story with you, and tell you how it shaped me into the person I am today. = I was raised on a dairy farm right here in rural Wisconsin. I met my wife here, and we raised our family here, just as my family has done since they came to our country in the 1800s. = That’s how I know that rural America is just as important as anywhere else. I had my dream job as Secretary of the Wisconsin Department of Agriculture, Trade and Consumer Protection. I understood the help and protections that our farmers were looking for. But after I sparred with Republican legislators over funding for a farmer suicide prevention program, they unanimously voted to fire me from the job. Even though it cost me my job, I don’t regret speaking out. I saw a need, and I will always fight for what’s right. Because that’s what rural Americans do. We don’t just go away. We’re resilient. So, I ran for State Senate. And I won. Instead of going away, I’m with them every day, holding Madison accountable to the people of Wisconsin. But my opponent, Derrick Van Orden? Well, he was a part of the Capitol Riots on January 6th and then tried to lie to Wisconsinites about it. We can’t let a person like that represent us in Congress. So I’m going to win this race the only way I know how: by going everywhere and talking with everyone. But I won’t kid myself. I know it’s going to be a tough race, so I need your help to build this campaign strong. = | = = = = = = This race will be close, so $5 or whatever you can give will make a huge difference. Rural Americans know how to work together, and when everyone chips in, we can show people like Derrick Van Orden what it really means to care about rural America. body:
Misguided and wasteful.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43777656/338660461/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTYzMjBjMy02Y2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1yWEF7U7s2Vdsl7N9G6UEaReFz2KhwgaICTuu-xz59M=)
---
Peter, the "war on drugs" was, at best, a misguided and failed approach to ending illegal drug consumption.

_At worst, it created a new Jim Crow, threw a generation of Black men into prison for nonviolent offenses, tore apart families, and created fresh generational trauma for young people._

**Peter, I’m so proud to have helped pass the MORE Act in the House to take our first step in undoing the "war on drugs" and the widespread damage it has created. This bill would decriminalize marijuana and begin a process to erase prior marijuana-related convictions.**

[**But ending the wasteful "war on drugs" is facing a lot of opposition in the Senate — especially from Republicans. So, if you care about racial justice, I need 1,000 good Democrats to sign my petition demanding the Senate end the war on drugs immediately. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43777657/338660462/-311383620?refcode=MTFC_20220404_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTYzMjBjMy02Y2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1yWEF7U7s2Vdsl7N9G6UEaReFz2KhwgaICTuu-xz59M=&emci=efda07fc-46b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=fa6320c3-6cb4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18839602) | [SIGN IMMEDIATELY: END THE "WAR ON DRUGS" »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43777658/338660463/-311383620?refcode=MTFC_20220404_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTYzMjBjMy02Y2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1yWEF7U7s2Vdsl7N9G6UEaReFz2KhwgaICTuu-xz59M=&emci=efda07fc-46b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=fa6320c3-6cb4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18839602)
---
Look, America is no stranger to racist incarceration – from slavery to Jim Crow to Japanese American internment camps to the prison-industrial complex and more.

**It's far past time that we undo this outdated and wasteful policy that has done more harm than good.**

[**Peter, take a few seconds (literally!) to sign my petition and tell the Senate to join us in ending the "war on drugs". It's imperative that we act fast while the MORE Act has momentum. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43777659/338660464/-311383620?refcode=MTFC_20220404_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTYzMjBjMy02Y2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1yWEF7U7s2Vdsl7N9G6UEaReFz2KhwgaICTuu-xz59M=&emci=efda07fc-46b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=fa6320c3-6cb4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18839602)

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. clean_body: Misguided and wasteful. | = Peter, the "war on drugs" was, at best, a misguided and failed approach to ending illegal drug consumption. At worst, it created a new Jim Crow, threw a generation of Black men into prison for nonviolent offenses, tore apart families, and created fresh generational trauma for young people. Peter, I’m so proud to have helped pass the MORE Act in the House to take our first step in undoing the "war on drugs" and the widespread damage it has created. This bill would decriminalize marijuana and begin a process to erase prior marijuana-related convictions. | Look, America is no stranger to racist incarceration – from slavery to Jim Crow to Japanese American internment camps to the prison-industrial complex and more. It's far past time that we undo this outdated and wasteful policy that has done more harm than good. \-- Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, our Democratic House Majority is seriously at risk. name: BREAKING NEWS
subject: re: SCOTUS nomination
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Quick, before the Senate votes on her confirmation:
| | | **BREAKING:** Senate Judiciary Committee votes on Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination!

This is a MAJOR milestone, **but we still don’t have your support on record!** With Judge Jackson’s final confirmation vote upcoming, our campaign strategists need to know where you stand!
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7284?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220404-BreakingNews-KBJCommitteeVote-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220404-BreakingNews-KBJCommitteeVote-Pros-sl1&akid=3673%2E9716520%2EKgNxv7)
**The final confirmation vote is just days away, so please tell us now: Do you support Judge Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/7284?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220404-BreakingNews-KBJCommitteeVote-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220404-BreakingNews-KBJCommitteeVote-Pros-sl1&akid=3673%2E9716520%2EKgNxv7)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/7284?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220404-BreakingNews-KBJCommitteeVote-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220404-BreakingNews-KBJCommitteeVote-Pros-sl1&akid=3673%2E9716520%2EKgNxv7)
---

Team -- After today's vote, the Senate is closer than EVER to confirming Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court!

But the GOP is doing everything they can to sink Judge Jackson’s confirmation. It started with a blatant smear campaign, and earlier today, **not a single Republican on the Senate Judiciary Committee voted to advance her nomination!**

**We've launched an URGENT live poll to find out if Democrats are standing with Judge Jackson and President Biden.**

**We’re still 53 responses short in Pennsylvania -- and your response is MISSING! Please answer _TODAY_ , so our top strategists can track changes in public opinion:**

Deadline | TONIGHT
---|---
Status | RESPONSE MISSING

**Before midnight, we need your answer: Do you support Judge Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court?**
| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/7284?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220404-BreakingNews-KBJCommitteeVote-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220404-BreakingNews-KBJCommitteeVote-Pros-sl1&akid=3673%2E9716520%2EKgNxv7)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/7284?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220404-BreakingNews-KBJCommitteeVote-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220404-BreakingNews-KBJCommitteeVote-Pros-sl1&akid=3673%2E9716520%2EKgNxv7)

Thank you,

Team DSCC

name: Jenna Henry,  Keystone Progress
subject: It's coming fast -- only 4 days away.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress, www
body:
Dear Friend,

This is a major weekend for progressives!

Sign up NOW for the 13th annual Keystone Progress Summit -- Pennsylvania's Progressive Summit. [https://hopin.com/events/keystone-progress-summit-2022?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=040422]

We need you in this fight! We have so much to lose and so much work to do. But together, we can build a progressive PA.

The way to do that? Register today to join us on April 8-9 at the summit. [https://hopin.com/events/keystone-progress-summit-2022?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=040422] We'll be talking about major issues like threats to our climate and abortion rights and finding our way forward during these challenging times. We cannot do this without you.

Please also forward this to your friends who also want to take action. Join Keystone Progress and our 2022 KP Summit sponsoring partner, the ACLU of Pennsylvania. There's TOO MUCH at stake to not rise up now.

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

REGISTER [https://hopin.com/events/keystone-progress-summit-2022?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=040422]
https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress, www.keystoneprogress.org.

Keystone Progress
354 S Atlantic Ave
Pittsburgh, PA 15224

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Donald Trump, Madison Cawthorn and Ted Budd are rallying far-right voters in North Carolina on Saturday
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Donald Trump is coming to North Carolina on Saturday to hold a rally for Ted Budd
#

Donald Trump is coming to North Carolina on Saturday to hold a rally for Ted Budd — his hand-picked candidate in this race.
That’s not all. They just announced that Madison Cawthorn will be joining them on stage as well.
Ted’s campaign is flailing. Trump, Ted Budd’s super PAC, and multiple GOP insiders have all said as much to reporters. So this is a clear effort to prop up his campaign, fire up the far-right base, and pretend that their brand of divisive politics is what the people of North Carolina want.
So we have to be prepared for anything. Trump may be coming to North Carolina and may even attack our campaign. Ted Budd may have his super PACs spending $14 million dollars to buy this seat.
The good news is we have each other, and if we are in this together, we will be ready for anything they throw our way.
[**Can you please make a $3 donation before Donald Trump gets here for his rally with Ted Budd and Madison Cawthorn? Every dollar will help us flip this seat and expand the Senate majority for Democrats.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220404-1-T2T3&refcode2=663.357359.tM35mt&t=1&akid=663%2E357359%2EtM35mt)
